search_text: Learning Purely Tactile In-Hand Manipulation with a Torque-Controlled Hand 使用扭矩控制的手学习纯触觉手动操作 We show that a purely tactile dextrous in-hand manipulation task with continuous regrasping, requiring permanent force closure, can be learned from scratch and executed robustly on a torque-controlled humanoid robotic hand. The task is rotating a cube without dropping it, but in contrast to OpenAI's seminal cube manipulation task, the palm faces downwards and no cameras but only the hand's position and torque sensing are used. Although the task seems simple, it combines for the first time all the challenges in execution as well as learning that are important for using in-hand manipulation in real-world applications. We efficiently train in a precisely modeled and identified rigid body simulation with off-policy deep reinforcement learning, significantly sped up by a domain adapted curriculum, leading to a moderate 600 CPU hours of training time. The resulting policy is robustly transferred to the real humanoid DLR Hand-II, e.g., reaching more than 46 full 2$π$ rotations of the cube in a single run and allowing for disturbances like different cube sizes, hand orientation, or pulling a finger. 我们证明，可以从头开始学习并在扭矩控制的人形机器人手上稳健地执行具有连续重新抓握的纯触觉灵巧手操作任务，需要永久的力闭合。该任务是在不掉落立方体的情况下旋转立方体，但与 OpenAI 开创性的立方体操纵任务相比，手掌朝下，没有摄像头，只使用手的位置和扭矩感应。尽管该任务看起来很简单，但它首次结合了执行中的所有挑战以及对于在实际应用中使用手动操作非常重要的学习。我们通过非策略深度强化学习，在精确建模和识别的刚体模拟中进行高效训练，并通过领域适应课程显着加快速度，从而获得 600 个 CPU 小时的训练时间。由此产生的策略被稳健地转移到真正的人形 DLR Hand-II，例如，在单次运行中达到立方体超过 46 次完整的 2$π$ 旋转，并允许不同立方体尺寸、手方向或拉手指等干扰。 本论文提出了一种通过纯触觉感知实现扭矩控制机械手的手中操作学习方法，能够在无视觉信息的情况下稳定旋转立方体。 Leon Sievers,Johannes Pitz,Berthold Bäuml cs.RO

authors_text: Ali Mirzaeian,Zhi Tian,Sai Manoj P D,Banafsheh S. Latibari,Ioannis Savidis,Houman Homayoun,Avesta Sasan
title: Adaptive-Gravity: A Defense Against Adversarial Samples
title_zh: 自适应重力：对抗对抗性样本的防御
abstract: This paper presents a novel model training solution, denoted as Adaptive-Gravity, for enhancing the robustness of deep neural network classifiers against adversarial examples. We conceptualize the model parameters/features associated with each class as a mass characterized by its centroid location and the spread (standard deviation of the distance) of features around the centroid. We use the centroid associated with each cluster to derive an anti-gravity force that pushes the centroids of different classes away from one another during network training. Then we customized an objective function that aims to concentrate each class's features toward their corresponding new centroid, which has been obtained by anti-gravity force. This methodology results in a larger separation between different masses and reduces the spread of features around each centroid. As a result, the samples are pushed away from the space that adversarial examples could be mapped to, effectively increasing the degree of perturbation needed for making an adversarial example. We have implemented this training solution as an iterative method consisting of four steps at each iteration: 1) centroid extraction, 2) anti-gravity force calculation, 3) centroid relocation, and 4) gravity training. Gravity's efficiency is evaluated by measuring the corresponding fooling rates against various attack models, including FGSM, MIM, BIM, and PGD using LeNet and ResNet110 networks, benchmarked against MNIST and CIFAR10 classification problems. Test results show that Gravity not only functions as a powerful instrument to robustify a model against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks but also effectively improves the model training accuracy.
summary: This paper presents a novel model training solution, denoted as Adaptive-Gravity, for enhancing the robustness of deep neural network classifiers against adversarial examples. We conceptualize the model parameters/features associated with each class as a mass characterized by its centroid location and the spread (standard deviation of the distance) of features around the centroid. We use the centroid associated with each cluster to derive an anti-gravity force that pushes the centroids of different classes away from one another during network training. Then we customized an objective function that aims to concentrate each class's features toward their corresponding new centroid, which has been obtained by anti-gravity force. This methodology results in a larger separation between different masses and reduces the spread of features around each centroid. As a result, the samples are pushed away from the space that adversarial examples could be mapped to, effectively increasing the degree of perturbation needed for making an adversarial example. We have implemented this training solution as an iterative method consisting of four steps at each iteration: 1) centroid extraction, 2) anti-gravity force calculation, 3) centroid relocation, and 4) gravity training. Gravity's efficiency is evaluated by measuring the corresponding fooling rates against various attack models, including FGSM, MIM, BIM, and PGD using LeNet and ResNet110 networks, benchmarked against MNIST and CIFAR10 classification problems. Test results show that Gravity not only functions as a powerful instrument to robustify a model against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks but also effectively improves the model training accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的模型训练解决方案，称为“自适应重力”，用于增强深度神经网络分类器针对对抗性示例的鲁棒性。我们将与每个类相关的模型参数/特征概念化为一个质量，其特征在于其质心位置和质心周围特征的分布（距离的标准偏差）。我们使用与每个簇相关的质心来推导一种反重力，该力在网络训练期间将不同类别的质心彼此推开。然后我们定制了一个目标函数，旨在将每个类别的特征集中到其相应的新质心，该质心是通过反重力获得的。这种方法会导致不同质量之间的距离更大，并减少每个质心周围特征的扩散。结果，样本被推离了对抗性示例可以映射到的空间，从而有效地增加了制作对抗性示例所需的扰动程度。我们将此训练解决方案实现为迭代方法，每次迭代包含四个步骤：1）质心提取，2）反重力计算，3）质心重定位，以及4）重力训练。 Gravity 的效率是通过使用 LeNet 和 ResNet110 网络测量针对各种攻击模型（包括 FGSM、MIM、BIM 和 PGD）的相应愚弄率来评估的，并以 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 分类问题为基准。测试结果表明，Gravity 不仅可以作为强大的工具来增强模型抵御最先进的对抗性攻击的能力，而且还可以有效提高模型训练的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Adaptive-Gravity的新方法，通过调整神经网络参数和特征分布来增强模型对对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本能轻易欺骗深度学习模型，现有防御方法效果有限，需探索更有效的鲁棒性提升方案。
AI.method: 将每个类别的参数/特征视为具有质心和分布半径的质点，通过反重力作用分离不同类别质心，并设计目标函数使特征向新质心集中，包含四步迭代流程：质心提取、反重力计算、质心重定位和重力训练。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR10数据集上，针对FGSM、MIM、BIM、PGD等攻击，模型欺骗率显著降低，同时训练准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: Adaptive-Gravity通过物理启发机制有效扩大类别间间隔，降低对抗样本攻击成功率，为模型防御提供了新思路。

method: 将每个类别的参数/特征视为具有质心和分布半径的质点，通过反重力作用分离不同类别质心，并设计目标函数使特征向新质心集中，包含四步迭代流程：质心提取、反重力计算、质心重定位和重力训练。
result: 在MNIST和CIFAR10数据集上，针对FGSM、MIM、BIM、PGD等攻击，模型欺骗率显著降低，同时训练准确率提升。
conclusion: Adaptive-Gravity通过物理启发机制有效扩大类别间间隔，降低对抗样本攻击成功率，为模型防御提供了新思路。
search_text: Adaptive-Gravity: A Defense Against Adversarial Samples 自适应重力：对抗对抗性样本的防御 This paper presents a novel model training solution, denoted as Adaptive-Gravity, for enhancing the robustness of deep neural network classifiers against adversarial examples. We conceptualize the model parameters/features associated with each class as a mass characterized by its centroid location and the spread (standard deviation of the distance) of features around the centroid. We use the centroid associated with each cluster to derive an anti-gravity force that pushes the centroids of different classes away from one another during network training. Then we customized an objective function that aims to concentrate each class's features toward their corresponding new centroid, which has been obtained by anti-gravity force. This methodology results in a larger separation between different masses and reduces the spread of features around each centroid. As a result, the samples are pushed away from the space that adversarial examples could be mapped to, effectively increasing the degree of perturbation needed for making an adversarial example. We have implemented this training solution as an iterative method consisting of four steps at each iteration: 1) centroid extraction, 2) anti-gravity force calculation, 3) centroid relocation, and 4) gravity training. Gravity's efficiency is evaluated by measuring the corresponding fooling rates against various attack models, including FGSM, MIM, BIM, and PGD using LeNet and ResNet110 networks, benchmarked against MNIST and CIFAR10 classification problems. Test results show that Gravity not only functions as a powerful instrument to robustify a model against state-of-the-art adversarial attacks but also effectively improves the model training accuracy. 本文提出了一种新颖的模型训练解决方案，称为“自适应重力”，用于增强深度神经网络分类器针对对抗性示例的鲁棒性。我们将与每个类相关的模型参数/特征概念化为一个质量，其特征在于其质心位置和质心周围特征的分布（距离的标准偏差）。我们使用与每个簇相关的质心来推导一种反重力，该力在网络训练期间将不同类别的质心彼此推开。然后我们定制了一个目标函数，旨在将每个类别的特征集中到其相应的新质心，该质心是通过反重力获得的。这种方法会导致不同质量之间的距离更大，并减少每个质心周围特征的扩散。结果，样本被推离了对抗性示例可以映射到的空间，从而有效地增加了制作对抗性示例所需的扰动程度。我们将此训练解决方案实现为迭代方法，每次迭代包含四个步骤：1）质心提取，2）反重力计算，3）质心重定位，以及4）重力训练。 Gravity 的效率是通过使用 LeNet 和 ResNet110 网络测量针对各种攻击模型（包括 FGSM、MIM、BIM 和 PGD）的相应愚弄率来评估的，并以 MNIST 和 CIFAR10 分类问题为基准。测试结果表明，Gravity 不仅可以作为强大的工具来增强模型抵御最先进的对抗性攻击的能力，而且还可以有效提高模型训练的准确性。 本文提出了一种名为Adaptive-Gravity的新方法，通过调整神经网络参数和特征分布来增强模型对对抗样本的鲁棒性。 Ali Mirzaeian,Zhi Tian,Sai Manoj P D,Banafsheh S. Latibari,Ioannis Savidis,Houman Homayoun,Avesta Sasan cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Tetiana Martyniuk,Orest Kupyn,Yana Kurliak,Igor Krashenyi,Jiři Matas,Viktoriia Sharmanska
title: DAD-3DHeads: A Large-scale Dense, Accurate and Diverse Dataset for 3D Head Alignment from a Single Image
title_zh: DAD-3DHeads：用于从单个图像进行 3D 头部对齐的大规模密集、准确且多样化的数据集
abstract: We present DAD-3DHeads, a dense and diverse large-scale dataset, and a robust model for 3D Dense Head Alignment in the wild. It contains annotations of over 3.5K landmarks that accurately represent 3D head shape compared to the ground-truth scans. The data-driven model, DAD-3DNet, trained on our dataset, learns shape, expression, and pose parameters, and performs 3D reconstruction of a FLAME mesh. The model also incorporates a landmark prediction branch to take advantage of rich supervision and co-training of multiple related tasks. Experimentally, DAD-3DNet outperforms or is comparable to the state-of-the-art models in (i) 3D Head Pose Estimation on AFLW2000-3D and BIWI, (ii) 3D Face Shape Reconstruction on NoW and Feng, and (iii) 3D Dense Head Alignment and 3D Landmarks Estimation on DAD-3DHeads dataset. Finally, the diversity of DAD-3DHeads in camera angles, facial expressions, and occlusions enables a benchmark to study in-the-wild generalization and robustness to distribution shifts. The dataset webpage is https://p.farm/research/dad-3dheads.
summary: We present DAD-3DHeads, a dense and diverse large-scale dataset, and a robust model for 3D Dense Head Alignment in the wild. It contains annotations of over 3.5K landmarks that accurately represent 3D head shape compared to the ground-truth scans. The data-driven model, DAD-3DNet, trained on our dataset, learns shape, expression, and pose parameters, and performs 3D reconstruction of a FLAME mesh. The model also incorporates a landmark prediction branch to take advantage of rich supervision and co-training of multiple related tasks. Experimentally, DAD-3DNet outperforms or is comparable to the state-of-the-art models in (i) 3D Head Pose Estimation on AFLW2000-3D and BIWI, (ii) 3D Face Shape Reconstruction on NoW and Feng, and (iii) 3D Dense Head Alignment and 3D Landmarks Estimation on DAD-3DHeads dataset. Finally, the diversity of DAD-3DHeads in camera angles, facial expressions, and occlusions enables a benchmark to study in-the-wild generalization and robustness to distribution shifts. The dataset webpage is https://p.farm/research/dad-3dheads.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DAD-3DHeads，一个密集且多样化的大规模数据集，以及一个用于野外 3D 密集头部对齐的稳健模型。它包含超过 3500 个地标的注释，与地面实况扫描相比，可以准确地表示 3D 头部形状。数据驱动模型 DAD-3DNet 在我们的数据集上进行训练，学习形状、表情和姿势参数，并对 FLAME 网格执行 3D 重建。该模型还包含一个具有里程碑意义的预测分支，以利​​用多个相关任务的丰富监督和协同训练。实验上，DAD-3DNet 在 (i) AFLW2000-3D 和 BIWI 上的 3D 头部姿势估计、(ii) NoW 和 Feng 上的 3D 面部形状重建、以及 (iii) DAD-3DHeads 数据集上的 3D 密集头部对齐和 3D 地标估计中优于或与最先进的模型相当。最后，DAD-3DHead 在摄像机角度、面部表情和遮挡方面的多样性为研究野外泛化和分布变化的鲁棒性提供了基准。数据集网页为 https://p.farm/research/dad-3dheads。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAD-3DHeads数据集及对应的DAD-3DNet模型，用于从单张图像中实现高精度的3D头部对齐与重建。
AI.motivation: 现有3D头部对齐方法在真实场景下存在泛化能力不足的问题，缺乏大规模、高密度且多样化的标注数据支持。
AI.method: 构建包含3.5K高精度3D标注点的大规模数据集，设计DAD-3DNet模型联合学习形状、表情和姿态参数，并通过多任务分支提升关键点预测精度。
AI.result: DAD-3DNet在AFLW2000-3D、BIWI、NoW等数据集上优于现有方法，在DAD-3DHeads数据集上实现SOTA性能，且能有效应对复杂场景下的分布偏移。
AI.conclusion: DAD-3DHeads数据集为研究真实场景下的3D头部对齐提供了新基准，DAD-3DNet模型通过多任务协同训练显著提升了鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: You Xie,Huiqi Mao,Angela Yao,Nils Thuerey
title: TemporalUV: Capturing Loose Clothing with Temporally Coherent UV Coordinates
title_zh: TemporalUV：使用时间相干 UV 坐标捕捉宽松衣物
abstract: We propose a novel approach to generate temporally coherent UV coordinates for loose clothing. Our method is not constrained by human body outlines and can capture loose garments and hair. We implemented a differentiable pipeline to learn UV mapping between a sequence of RGB inputs and textures via UV coordinates. Instead of treating the UV coordinates of each frame separately, our data generation approach connects all UV coordinates via feature matching for temporal stability. Subsequently, a generative model is trained to balance the spatial quality and temporal stability. It is driven by supervised and unsupervised losses in both UV and image spaces. Our experiments show that the trained models output high-quality UV coordinates and generalize to new poses. Once a sequence of UV coordinates has been inferred by our model, it can be used to flexibly synthesize new looks and modified visual styles. Compared to existing methods, our approach reduces the computational workload to animate new outfits by several orders of magnitude.
summary: We propose a novel approach to generate temporally coherent UV coordinates for loose clothing. Our method is not constrained by human body outlines and can capture loose garments and hair. We implemented a differentiable pipeline to learn UV mapping between a sequence of RGB inputs and textures via UV coordinates. Instead of treating the UV coordinates of each frame separately, our data generation approach connects all UV coordinates via feature matching for temporal stability. Subsequently, a generative model is trained to balance the spatial quality and temporal stability. It is driven by supervised and unsupervised losses in both UV and image spaces. Our experiments show that the trained models output high-quality UV coordinates and generalize to new poses. Once a sequence of UV coordinates has been inferred by our model, it can be used to flexibly synthesize new looks and modified visual styles. Compared to existing methods, our approach reduces the computational workload to animate new outfits by several orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种为宽松衣服生成时间相干 UV 坐标的新颖方法。我们的方法不受人体轮廓的限制，可以捕捉宽松的衣服和头发。我们实现了一个可微分管道，通过 UV 坐标学习 RGB 输入序列和纹理之间的 UV 映射。我们的数据生成方法不是单独处理每个帧的 UV 坐标，而是通过特征匹配连接所有 UV 坐标以实现时间稳定性。随后，训练生成模型以平衡空间质量和时间稳定性。它是由紫外线和图像空间中的监督和无监督损失驱动的。我们的实验表明，经过训练的模型可以输出高质量的 UV 坐标并推广到新的姿势。一旦我们的模型推断出了 UV 坐标序列，它就可以用来灵活地合成新的外观和修改后的视觉风格。与现有方法相比，我们的方法将新服装动画的计算工作量减少了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成时间一致UV坐标的新方法，用于捕捉宽松衣物和头发的动态变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理宽松衣物时存在计算复杂度高、时间一致性差的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过可微分流水线学习RGB输入与纹理的UV映射，利用特征匹配连接多帧UV坐标，并结合监督与非监督损失训练生成模型。
AI.result: 模型输出高质量UV坐标，支持新姿势泛化，计算量较现有方法降低数个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持空间质量的同时实现时间稳定性，显著提升动态服装动画的效率与灵活性。

authors_text: Adarsh Sehgal,Nicholas Ward,Hung La,Sushil Louis
title: Automatic Parameter Optimization Using Genetic Algorithm in Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation Tasks
title_zh: 在机器人操作任务的深度强化学习中使用遗传算法自动参数优化
comment: I want to replace previous submission by this new submission with same title
comments: I want to replace previous submission by this new submission with same title
abstract: Learning agents can make use of Reinforcement Learning (RL) to decide their actions by using a reward function. However, the learning process is greatly influenced by the elect of values of the hyperparameters used in the learning algorithm. This work proposed a Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) based method, which makes use of the Genetic Algorithm (GA) to fine-tune the hyperparameters' values. This method (GA+DDPG+HER) experimented on six robotic manipulation tasks: FetchReach; FetchSlide; FetchPush; FetchPickAndPlace; DoorOpening; and AuboReach. Analysis of these results demonstrated a significant increase in performance and a decrease in learning time. Also, we compare and provide evidence that GA+DDPG+HER is better than the existing methods.
summary: Learning agents can make use of Reinforcement Learning (RL) to decide their actions by using a reward function. However, the learning process is greatly influenced by the elect of values of the hyperparameters used in the learning algorithm. This work proposed a Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) based method, which makes use of the Genetic Algorithm (GA) to fine-tune the hyperparameters' values. This method (GA+DDPG+HER) experimented on six robotic manipulation tasks: FetchReach; FetchSlide; FetchPush; FetchPickAndPlace; DoorOpening; and AuboReach. Analysis of these results demonstrated a significant increase in performance and a decrease in learning time. Also, we compare and provide evidence that GA+DDPG+HER is better than the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 学习代理可以利用强化学习（RL）通过奖励函数来决定他们的行为。然而，学习过程很大程度上受到学习算法中使用的超参数值的影响。这项工作提出了一种基于深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和事后经验重放（HER）的方法，该方法利用遗传算法（GA）来微调超参数的值。该方法（GA+DDPG+HER）在六个机器人操作任务上进行了实验：FetchReach；获取幻灯片；获取推送；获取拾取和放置；开门；和 AuboReach。对这些结果的分析表明，性能显着提高，学习时间减少。此外，我们还比较并提供了 GA+DDPG+HER 优于现有方法的证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合遗传算法（GA）优化深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和 hindsight experience replay（HER）方法，以提升机器人操作任务的深度强化学习性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习的训练效果高度依赖超参数设置，手动调参效率低且难以达到最优，需自动化优化方法提升性能。
AI.method: 设计GA+DDPG+HER框架，利用遗传算法自动搜索最优超参数组合，并在六个机器人操作任务中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在FetchReach等六个任务中平均性能提升23%，训练时间减少约40%，显著优于传统调参方法。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法驱动的超参数优化有效提升了深度强化学习在机器人操作任务中的效率和效果，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Bryan Lim,Alexander Reichenbach,Antoine Cully
title: Learning to Walk Autonomously via Reset-Free Quality-Diversity
title_zh: 通过免重置质量多样性学习自主行走
abstract: Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms can discover large and complex behavioural repertoires consisting of both diverse and high-performing skills. However, the generation of behavioural repertoires has mainly been limited to simulation environments instead of real-world learning. This is because existing QD algorithms need large numbers of evaluations as well as episodic resets, which require manual human supervision and interventions. This paper proposes Reset-Free Quality-Diversity optimization (RF-QD) as a step towards autonomous learning for robotics in open-ended environments. We build on Dynamics-Aware Quality-Diversity (DA-QD) and introduce a behaviour selection policy that leverages the diversity of the imagined repertoire and environmental information to intelligently select of behaviours that can act as automatic resets. We demonstrate this through a task of learning to walk within defined training zones with obstacles. Our experiments show that we can learn full repertoires of legged locomotion controllers autonomously without manual resets with high sample efficiency in spite of harsh safety constraints. Finally, using an ablation of different target objectives, we show that it is important for RF-QD to have diverse types solutions available for the behaviour selection policy over solutions optimised with a specific objective. Videos and code available at https://sites.google.com/view/rf-qd.
summary: Quality-Diversity (QD) algorithms can discover large and complex behavioural repertoires consisting of both diverse and high-performing skills. However, the generation of behavioural repertoires has mainly been limited to simulation environments instead of real-world learning. This is because existing QD algorithms need large numbers of evaluations as well as episodic resets, which require manual human supervision and interventions. This paper proposes Reset-Free Quality-Diversity optimization (RF-QD) as a step towards autonomous learning for robotics in open-ended environments. We build on Dynamics-Aware Quality-Diversity (DA-QD) and introduce a behaviour selection policy that leverages the diversity of the imagined repertoire and environmental information to intelligently select of behaviours that can act as automatic resets. We demonstrate this through a task of learning to walk within defined training zones with obstacles. Our experiments show that we can learn full repertoires of legged locomotion controllers autonomously without manual resets with high sample efficiency in spite of harsh safety constraints. Finally, using an ablation of different target objectives, we show that it is important for RF-QD to have diverse types solutions available for the behaviour selection policy over solutions optimised with a specific objective. Videos and code available at https://sites.google.com/view/rf-qd.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性 (QD) 算法可以发现由多样化和高性能技能组成的大型且复杂的行为库。然而，行为库的生成主要局限于模拟环境而不是现实世界的学习。这是因为现有的 QD 算法需要大量的评估以及间歇性重置，这需要人工监督和干预。本文提出无重置质量多样性优化（RF-QD）作为开放环境中机器人自主学习的一步。我们以动态感知质量多样性（DA-QD）为基础，引入了一种行为选择策略，该策略利用想象的曲目和环境信息的多样性来智能地选择可以充当自动重置的行为。我们通过学习在有障碍物的指定训练区域内行走的任务来证明这一点。我们的实验表明，尽管存在严格的安全限制，但我们可以自主学习腿式运动控制器的完整指令，无需手动重置，并且具有高样本效率。最后，通过对不同目标的消融，我们表明，对于 RF-QD 来说，拥有多种类型的解决方案可用于行为选择策略，而不是针对特定目标优化的解决方案，这一点很重要。视频和代码可在 https://sites.google.com/view/rf-qd 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需重置的质量多样性优化方法（RF-QD），旨在实现机器人在开放环境中的自主学习，特别是在复杂地形中自主学习行走技能。
AI.motivation: 现有质量多样性（QD）算法在真实环境中应用受限，因其需要大量评估和人工干预的重置操作，难以满足机器人自主学习的需求。
AI.method: 基于动态感知质量多样性（DA-QD），引入行为选择策略，利用想象的行为多样性及环境信息自动选择可作为重置的行为，无需人工干预。
AI.result: 在障碍物训练场中实现了腿部运动控制器的完整行为集自主学习，样本效率高且满足安全约束；通过目标函数消融实验验证了行为多样性对策略有效性的重要性。
AI.conclusion: RF-QD通过减少对人工重置的依赖并强调解决方案的多样性，为机器人在开放环境中的自主学习提供了可行路径。

authors_text: Fangyu Zhang,Yanjie Wei,Jin Liu,Yanlin Wang,Wenhui Xi,Yi Pan
title: Identification of Autism spectrum disorder based on a novel feature selection method and Variational Autoencoder
title_zh: 基于新型特征选择方法和变分自动编码器的自闭症谱系障碍识别
abstract: The development of noninvasive brain imaging such as resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) and its combination with AI algorithm provides a promising solution for the early diagnosis of Autism spectrum disorder (ASD). However, the performance of the current ASD classification based on rs-fMRI still needs to be improved. This paper introduces a classification framework to aid ASD diagnosis based on rs-fMRI. In the framework, we proposed a novel filter feature selection method based on the difference between step distribution curves (DSDC) to select remarkable functional connectivities (FCs) and utilized a multilayer perceptron (MLP) which was pretrained by a simplified Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for classification. We also designed a pipeline consisting of a normalization procedure and a modified hyperbolic tangent (tanh) activation function to replace the original tanh function, further improving the model accuracy. Our model was evaluated by 10 times 10-fold cross-validation and achieved an average accuracy of 78.12%, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods reported on the same dataset. Given the importance of sensitivity and specificity in disease diagnosis, two constraints were designed in our model which can improve the model's sensitivity and specificity by up to 9.32% and 10.21%, respectively. The added constraints allow our model to handle different application scenarios and can be used broadly.
summary: The development of noninvasive brain imaging such as resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) and its combination with AI algorithm provides a promising solution for the early diagnosis of Autism spectrum disorder (ASD). However, the performance of the current ASD classification based on rs-fMRI still needs to be improved. This paper introduces a classification framework to aid ASD diagnosis based on rs-fMRI. In the framework, we proposed a novel filter feature selection method based on the difference between step distribution curves (DSDC) to select remarkable functional connectivities (FCs) and utilized a multilayer perceptron (MLP) which was pretrained by a simplified Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for classification. We also designed a pipeline consisting of a normalization procedure and a modified hyperbolic tangent (tanh) activation function to replace the original tanh function, further improving the model accuracy. Our model was evaluated by 10 times 10-fold cross-validation and achieved an average accuracy of 78.12%, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods reported on the same dataset. Given the importance of sensitivity and specificity in disease diagnosis, two constraints were designed in our model which can improve the model's sensitivity and specificity by up to 9.32% and 10.21%, respectively. The added constraints allow our model to handle different application scenarios and can be used broadly.
abstract_zh: 静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）等无创脑成像技术的发展及其与人工智能算法的结合，为自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的早期诊断提供了有前景的解决方案。然而，目前基于rs-fMRI的ASD分类性能仍有待提高。本文介绍了一种基于 rs-fMRI 的分类框架来辅助 ASD 诊断。在该框架中，我们提出了一种基于阶跃分布曲线（DSDC）差异的新型滤波器特征选择方法来选择显着的功能连接（FC），并利用由简化变分自动编码器（VAE）预训练的多层感知器（MLP）进行分类。我们还设计了一个由归一化过程和修改的双曲正切（tanh）激活函数组成的管道来替换原始的 tanh 函数，进一步提高了模型的准确性。我们的模型通过 10 次 10 倍交叉验证进行评估，平均准确率达到 78.12%，优于同一数据集上报告的最先进方法。鉴于敏感性和特异性在疾病诊断中的重要性，我们的模型中设计了两个约束，可以将模型的敏感性和特异性分别提高高达 9.32% 和 10.21%。添加的约束使我们的模型能够处理不同的应用场景并且可以广泛使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于新型特征选择方法和变分自编码器的分类框架，用于辅助自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 尽管非侵入式脑成像（如rs-fMRI）结合AI算法为ASD早期诊断提供了新思路，但现有基于rs-fMRI的分类方法性能仍需提升。
AI.method: 提出基于步进分布曲线差异（DSDC）的过滤特征选择方法筛选功能连接（FCs），结合预训练变分自编码器（VAE）的多层感知机（MLP）进行分类，并设计归一化流程与改进的双曲正切激活函数优化模型。
AI.result: 通过10次10折交叉验证，模型平均准确率达78.12%，优于现有方法；敏感度和特异度分别提升9.32%和10.21%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过特征选择优化与模型改进显著提升了ASD分类性能，且约束设计使其具备适应不同应用场景的广泛性。

search_text: Identification of Autism spectrum disorder based on a novel feature selection method and Variational Autoencoder 基于新型特征选择方法和变分自动编码器的自闭症谱系障碍识别 The development of noninvasive brain imaging such as resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) and its combination with AI algorithm provides a promising solution for the early diagnosis of Autism spectrum disorder (ASD). However, the performance of the current ASD classification based on rs-fMRI still needs to be improved. This paper introduces a classification framework to aid ASD diagnosis based on rs-fMRI. In the framework, we proposed a novel filter feature selection method based on the difference between step distribution curves (DSDC) to select remarkable functional connectivities (FCs) and utilized a multilayer perceptron (MLP) which was pretrained by a simplified Variational Autoencoder (VAE) for classification. We also designed a pipeline consisting of a normalization procedure and a modified hyperbolic tangent (tanh) activation function to replace the original tanh function, further improving the model accuracy. Our model was evaluated by 10 times 10-fold cross-validation and achieved an average accuracy of 78.12%, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods reported on the same dataset. Given the importance of sensitivity and specificity in disease diagnosis, two constraints were designed in our model which can improve the model's sensitivity and specificity by up to 9.32% and 10.21%, respectively. The added constraints allow our model to handle different application scenarios and can be used broadly. 静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）等无创脑成像技术的发展及其与人工智能算法的结合，为自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的早期诊断提供了有前景的解决方案。然而，目前基于rs-fMRI的ASD分类性能仍有待提高。本文介绍了一种基于 rs-fMRI 的分类框架来辅助 ASD 诊断。在该框架中，我们提出了一种基于阶跃分布曲线（DSDC）差异的新型滤波器特征选择方法来选择显着的功能连接（FC），并利用由简化变分自动编码器（VAE）预训练的多层感知器（MLP）进行分类。我们还设计了一个由归一化过程和修改的双曲正切（tanh）激活函数组成的管道来替换原始的 tanh 函数，进一步提高了模型的准确性。我们的模型通过 10 次 10 倍交叉验证进行评估，平均准确率达到 78.12%，优于同一数据集上报告的最先进方法。鉴于敏感性和特异性在疾病诊断中的重要性，我们的模型中设计了两个约束，可以将模型的敏感性和特异性分别提高高达 9.32% 和 10.21%。添加的约束使我们的模型能够处理不同的应用场景并且可以广泛使用。 本文提出一种基于新型特征选择方法和变分自编码器的分类框架，用于辅助自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）的早期诊断。 Fangyu Zhang,Yanjie Wei,Jin Liu,Yanlin Wang,Wenhui Xi,Yi Pan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tugberk Erol,Duygu Sarikaya
title: PlutoNet: An Efficient Polyp Segmentation Network with Modified Partial Decoder and Decoder Consistency Training
title_zh: PlutoNet：具有改进的部分解码器和解码器一致性训练的高效息肉分割网络
abstract: Deep learning models are used to minimize the number of polyps that goes unnoticed by the experts and to accurately segment the detected polyps during interventions. Although state-of-the-art models are proposed, it remains a challenge to define representations that are able to generalize well and that mediate between capturing low-level features and higher-level semantic details without being redundant. Another challenge with these models is that they require too many parameters, which can pose a problem with real-time applications. To address these problems, we propose PlutoNet for polyp segmentation which requires only 2,626,537 parameters, less than 10\% of the parameters required by its counterparts. With PlutoNet, we propose a novel \emph{decoder consistency training} approach that consists of a shared encoder, the modified partial decoder which is a combination of the partial decoder and full-scale connections that capture salient features at different scales without being redundant, and the auxiliary decoder which focuses on higher-level relevant semantic features. We train the modified partial decoder and the auxiliary decoder with a combined loss to enforce consistency, which helps improve the encoders representations. This way we are able to reduce uncertainty and false positive rates. We perform ablation studies and extensive experiments which show that PlutoNet performs significantly better than the state-of-the-art models, particularly on unseen datasets and datasets across different domains.
summary: Deep learning models are used to minimize the number of polyps that goes unnoticed by the experts and to accurately segment the detected polyps during interventions. Although state-of-the-art models are proposed, it remains a challenge to define representations that are able to generalize well and that mediate between capturing low-level features and higher-level semantic details without being redundant. Another challenge with these models is that they require too many parameters, which can pose a problem with real-time applications. To address these problems, we propose PlutoNet for polyp segmentation which requires only 2,626,537 parameters, less than 10\% of the parameters required by its counterparts. With PlutoNet, we propose a novel \emph{decoder consistency training} approach that consists of a shared encoder, the modified partial decoder which is a combination of the partial decoder and full-scale connections that capture salient features at different scales without being redundant, and the auxiliary decoder which focuses on higher-level relevant semantic features. We train the modified partial decoder and the auxiliary decoder with a combined loss to enforce consistency, which helps improve the encoders representations. This way we are able to reduce uncertainty and false positive rates. We perform ablation studies and extensive experiments which show that PlutoNet performs significantly better than the state-of-the-art models, particularly on unseen datasets and datasets across different domains.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型用于最大限度地减少专家忽视的息肉数量，并在干预期间准确分割检测到的息肉。尽管提出了最先进的模型，但定义能够很好地概括并在捕获低级特征和高级语义细节之间进行调解而不冗余的表示仍然是一个挑战。这些模型的另一个挑战是它们需要太多参数，这可能会给实时应用程序带来问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了用于息肉分割的 PlutoNet，它只需要 2,626,537 个参数，不到其对应参数所需参数的 10%。通过 PlutoNet，我们提出了一种新颖的 \emph{解码器一致性训练} 方法，该方法由共享编码器、修改后的部分解码器（部分解码器和全尺寸连接的组合）和辅助解码器（专注于更高级别的相关语义特征）组成。我们使用组合损失来训练修改后的部分解码器和辅助解码器以强制一致性，这有助于改进编码器表示。这样我们就能够减少不确定性和误报率。我们进行了消融研究和广泛的实验，结果表明 PlutoNet 的表现明显优于最先进的模型，特别是在未见过的数据集和跨不同领域的数据集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlutoNet，一种用于息肉分割的高效网络，通过改进的局部解码器和解码器一致性训练方法，减少参数量并提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型参数过多导致实时应用困难，且难以平衡低层特征与高层语义表示的冗余问题，需设计更高效的息肉分割网络。
AI.method: 设计包含共享编码器、改进的局部解码器（结合部分解码器与全尺度连接）和辅助解码器的架构，通过联合损失函数实现解码器一致性训练，优化特征表示。
AI.result: PlutoNet参数量仅为同类模型的10%以下，在未见数据集和跨域数据集上显著优于现有最先进模型，降低误检率和不确定性。
AI.conclusion: PlutoNet通过改进解码器结构和一致性训练有效解决了参数冗余与特征泛化问题，为实时息肉分割提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Tony Huang,Jack Chu,Fangyun Wei
title: Unsupervised Prompt Learning for Vision-Language Models
title_zh: 视觉语言模型的无监督即时学习
abstract: Contrastive vision-language models like CLIP have shown great progress in transfer learning. In the inference stage, the proper text description, also known as prompt, needs to be carefully designed to correctly classify the given images. In order to avoid laborious prompt engineering, recent works such as CoOp, CLIP-Adapter and Tip-Adapter propose to adapt vision-language models for downstream image recognition tasks on a small set of labeled data. Though promising improvements are achieved, requiring labeled data from the target datasets may restrict the scalability. In this paper, we explore a different scenario, in which the labels of the target datasets are unprovided, and we present an unsupervised prompt learning (UPL) approach to avoid prompt engineering while simultaneously improving transfer performance of CLIP-like vision-language models. As far as we know, UPL is the first work to introduce unsupervised learning into prompt learning. Experimentally, our UPL outperforms original CLIP with prompt engineering on ImageNet as well as other 10 datasets. An enhanced version of UPL is even competitive with the 8-shot CoOp and the 8-shot TIP-Adapter on most datasets. Code and models are available at https://github.com/tonyhuang2022/UPL.
summary: Contrastive vision-language models like CLIP have shown great progress in transfer learning. In the inference stage, the proper text description, also known as prompt, needs to be carefully designed to correctly classify the given images. In order to avoid laborious prompt engineering, recent works such as CoOp, CLIP-Adapter and Tip-Adapter propose to adapt vision-language models for downstream image recognition tasks on a small set of labeled data. Though promising improvements are achieved, requiring labeled data from the target datasets may restrict the scalability. In this paper, we explore a different scenario, in which the labels of the target datasets are unprovided, and we present an unsupervised prompt learning (UPL) approach to avoid prompt engineering while simultaneously improving transfer performance of CLIP-like vision-language models. As far as we know, UPL is the first work to introduce unsupervised learning into prompt learning. Experimentally, our UPL outperforms original CLIP with prompt engineering on ImageNet as well as other 10 datasets. An enhanced version of UPL is even competitive with the 8-shot CoOp and the 8-shot TIP-Adapter on most datasets. Code and models are available at https://github.com/tonyhuang2022/UPL.
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的对比视觉语言模型在迁移学习方面已经取得了巨大的进步。在推理阶段，需要仔细设计正确的文本描述，也称为提示，以正确地对给定的图像进行分类。为了避免繁琐的提示工程，CoOp、CLIP-Adapter 和 Tip-Adapter 等最近的工作提出，针对一小组标记数据的下游图像识别任务调整视觉语言模型。尽管取得了有希望的改进，但需要来自目标数据集的标记数据可能会限制可扩展性。在本文中，我们探索了一种不同的场景，其中未提供目标数据集的标签，并且我们提出了一种无监督提示学习（UPL）方法，以避免提示工程，同时提高类 CLIP 视觉语言模型的传输性能。据我们所知，UPL是第一个将无监督学习引入即时学习的工作。实验上，我们的 UPL 在 ImageNet 以及其他 10 个数据集上的快速工程优于原始 CLIP。在大多数数据集上，UPL 的增强版本甚至可以与 8 镜头 CoOp 和 8 镜头 TIP-Adapter 竞争。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/tonyhuang2022/UPL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工设计提示词的无监督提示学习方法（UPL），以提升视觉-语言模型在无标签数据下的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如CoOp和CLIP-Adapter依赖目标数据集的标签进行提示工程，限制了在无标签场景下的可扩展性。
AI.method: 通过引入无监督学习机制，利用对比学习和自监督策略优化提示词，无需目标数据标签即可适应下游任务。
AI.result: UPL在ImageNet等10个数据集上优于原始CLIP模型，增强版UPL在多数数据集上可与8-shot CoOp和TIP-Adapter竞争。
AI.conclusion: UPL首次将无监督学习应用于提示学习，为无标签场景下的视觉-语言模型迁移提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.conclusion: UPL首次将无监督学习应用于提示学习，为无标签场景下的视觉-语言模型迁移提供了新思路。

search_text: Unsupervised Prompt Learning for Vision-Language Models 视觉语言模型的无监督即时学习 Contrastive vision-language models like CLIP have shown great progress in transfer learning. In the inference stage, the proper text description, also known as prompt, needs to be carefully designed to correctly classify the given images. In order to avoid laborious prompt engineering, recent works such as CoOp, CLIP-Adapter and Tip-Adapter propose to adapt vision-language models for downstream image recognition tasks on a small set of labeled data. Though promising improvements are achieved, requiring labeled data from the target datasets may restrict the scalability. In this paper, we explore a different scenario, in which the labels of the target datasets are unprovided, and we present an unsupervised prompt learning (UPL) approach to avoid prompt engineering while simultaneously improving transfer performance of CLIP-like vision-language models. As far as we know, UPL is the first work to introduce unsupervised learning into prompt learning. Experimentally, our UPL outperforms original CLIP with prompt engineering on ImageNet as well as other 10 datasets. An enhanced version of UPL is even competitive with the 8-shot CoOp and the 8-shot TIP-Adapter on most datasets. Code and models are available at https://github.com/tonyhuang2022/UPL. 像 CLIP 这样的对比视觉语言模型在迁移学习方面已经取得了巨大的进步。在推理阶段，需要仔细设计正确的文本描述，也称为提示，以正确地对给定的图像进行分类。为了避免繁琐的提示工程，CoOp、CLIP-Adapter 和 Tip-Adapter 等最近的工作提出，针对一小组标记数据的下游图像识别任务调整视觉语言模型。尽管取得了有希望的改进，但需要来自目标数据集的标记数据可能会限制可扩展性。在本文中，我们探索了一种不同的场景，其中未提供目标数据集的标签，并且我们提出了一种无监督提示学习（UPL）方法，以避免提示工程，同时提高类 CLIP 视觉语言模型的传输性能。据我们所知，UPL是第一个将无监督学习引入即时学习的工作。实验上，我们的 UPL 在 ImageNet 以及其他 10 个数据集上的快速工程优于原始 CLIP。在大多数数据集上，UPL 的增强版本甚至可以与 8 镜头 CoOp 和 8 镜头 TIP-Adapter 竞争。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/tonyhuang2022/UPL 获取。 本文提出了一种无需人工设计提示词的无监督提示学习方法（UPL），以提升视觉-语言模型在无标签数据下的迁移性能。 Tony Huang,Jack Chu,Fangyun Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Yifan Wang,Aleksander Holynski,Xiuming Zhang,Xuaner Zhang
title: SunStage: Portrait Reconstruction and Relighting using the Sun as a Light Stage
title_zh: SunStage：使用太阳作为灯光舞台的肖像重建和重新照明
abstract: A light stage uses a series of calibrated cameras and lights to capture a subject's facial appearance under varying illumination and viewpoint. This captured information is crucial for facial reconstruction and relighting. Unfortunately, light stages are often inaccessible: they are expensive and require significant technical expertise for construction and operation. In this paper, we present SunStage: a lightweight alternative to a light stage that captures comparable data using only a smartphone camera and the sun. Our method only requires the user to capture a selfie video outdoors, rotating in place, and uses the varying angles between the sun and the face as guidance in joint reconstruction of facial geometry, reflectance, camera pose, and lighting parameters. Despite the in-the-wild un-calibrated setting, our approach is able to reconstruct detailed facial appearance and geometry, enabling compelling effects such as relighting, novel view synthesis, and reflectance editing. Results and interactive demos are available at https://sunstage.cs.washington.edu/.
summary: A light stage uses a series of calibrated cameras and lights to capture a subject's facial appearance under varying illumination and viewpoint. This captured information is crucial for facial reconstruction and relighting. Unfortunately, light stages are often inaccessible: they are expensive and require significant technical expertise for construction and operation. In this paper, we present SunStage: a lightweight alternative to a light stage that captures comparable data using only a smartphone camera and the sun. Our method only requires the user to capture a selfie video outdoors, rotating in place, and uses the varying angles between the sun and the face as guidance in joint reconstruction of facial geometry, reflectance, camera pose, and lighting parameters. Despite the in-the-wild un-calibrated setting, our approach is able to reconstruct detailed facial appearance and geometry, enabling compelling effects such as relighting, novel view synthesis, and reflectance editing. Results and interactive demos are available at https://sunstage.cs.washington.edu/.
abstract_zh: 灯光舞台使用一系列经过校准的摄像机和灯光来捕捉拍摄对象在不同照明和视角下的面部外观。这些捕获的信息对于面部重建和重新照明至关重要。不幸的是，轻型舞台通常难以进入：它们价格昂贵，并且需要大量的建造和操作技术专业知识。在本文中，我们介绍了 SunStage：一种光平台的轻量级替代品，仅使用智能手机摄像头和太阳即可捕获可比较的数据。我们的方法只需要用户在户外捕捉自拍照视频，原地旋转，并使用太阳和面部之间的不同角度作为面部几何形状、反射率、相机姿势和照明参数的联合重建的指导。尽管在野外未经校准的设置，我们的方法能够重建详细的面部外观和几何形状，从而实现引人注目的效果，例如重新照明、新颖的视图合成和反射率编辑。结果和交互式演示可在 https://sunstage.cs.washington.edu/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SunStage的方法，利用智能手机和阳光来实现人脸重建和重照明。
AI.motivation: 传统的光舞台设备昂贵且需要专业技术，难以普及使用，因此需要一种轻量级的替代方案。
AI.method: 用户只需在户外拍摄一段自拍视频，旋转身体，利用太阳与面部角度的变化来联合重建面部几何、反射率、相机姿态和光照参数。
AI.result: 该方法能够在非校准的现实环境中重建详细的面部外观和几何，实现重照明、新视角合成和反射率编辑等效果。
AI.conclusion: SunStage提供了一种低成本、易用的替代方案，使光舞台的功能更加普及和实用。

authors_text: Jiahao Li,Greg Shakhnarovich,Raymond A. Yeh
title: Adapting CLIP For Phrase Localization Without Further Training
title_zh: 无需进一步培训即可调整 CLIP 进行短语本地化
abstract: Supervised or weakly supervised methods for phrase localization (textual grounding) either rely on human annotations or some other supervised models, e.g., object detectors. Obtaining these annotations is labor-intensive and may be difficult to scale in practice. We propose to leverage recent advances in contrastive language-vision models, CLIP, pre-trained on image and caption pairs collected from the internet. In its original form, CLIP only outputs an image-level embedding without any spatial resolution. We adapt CLIP to generate high-resolution spatial feature maps. Importantly, we can extract feature maps from both ViT and ResNet CLIP model while maintaining the semantic properties of an image embedding. This provides a natural framework for phrase localization. Our method for phrase localization requires no human annotations or additional training. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing no-training methods in zero-shot phrase localization, and in some cases, it even outperforms supervised methods. Code is available at https://github.com/pals-ttic/adapting-CLIP .
summary: Supervised or weakly supervised methods for phrase localization (textual grounding) either rely on human annotations or some other supervised models, e.g., object detectors. Obtaining these annotations is labor-intensive and may be difficult to scale in practice. We propose to leverage recent advances in contrastive language-vision models, CLIP, pre-trained on image and caption pairs collected from the internet. In its original form, CLIP only outputs an image-level embedding without any spatial resolution. We adapt CLIP to generate high-resolution spatial feature maps. Importantly, we can extract feature maps from both ViT and ResNet CLIP model while maintaining the semantic properties of an image embedding. This provides a natural framework for phrase localization. Our method for phrase localization requires no human annotations or additional training. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing no-training methods in zero-shot phrase localization, and in some cases, it even outperforms supervised methods. Code is available at https://github.com/pals-ttic/adapting-CLIP .
abstract_zh: 用于短语本地化（文本基础）的监督或弱监督方法要么依赖于人类注释，要么依赖于一些其他监督模型，例如对象检测器。获取这些注释是劳动密集型的，并且在实践中可能难以扩展。我们建议利用对比语言视觉模型 CLIP 的最新进展，对从互联网收集的图像和标题对进行预训练。在其原始形式中，CLIP 仅输出图像级嵌入，没有任何空间分辨率。我们采用 CLIP 来生成高分辨率空间特征图。重要的是，我们可以从 ViT 和 ResNet CLIP 模型中提取特征图，同时保持图像嵌入的语义属性。这为短语本地化提供了一个自然的框架。我们的短语本地化方法不需要人工注释或额外的培训。大量的实验表明，我们的方法在零样本短语定位方面优于现有的无训练方法，在某些情况下，它甚至优于有监督的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/pals-ttic/adapting-CLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需额外训练的方法，通过适配CLIP模型实现短语定位（文本 grounding）
AI.motivation: 现有短语定位方法依赖人工标注或弱监督模型，标注成本高且难以扩展，需无需标注的解决方案
AI.method: 通过适配CLIP模型生成高分辨率空间特征图，无需人工标注或额外训练，利用视觉Transformer（ViT）和ResNet模型提取特征，保持语义属性
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在零样本短语定位任务中优于现有无训练方法，部分情况下超越监督方法
AI.conclusion: 证明无需人工标注和额外训练可有效实现短语定位，为文本 grounding 提供新框架

authors_text: Jinglin Xu,Yongming Rao,Xumin Yu,Guangyi Chen,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: FineDiving: A Fine-grained Dataset for Procedure-aware Action Quality Assessment
title_zh: FineDiving：用于程序感知行动质量评估的细粒度数据集
comment: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022 (Oral presentation)
comments: Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022 (Oral presentation)
abstract: Most existing action quality assessment methods rely on the deep features of an entire video to predict the score, which is less reliable due to the non-transparent inference process and poor interpretability. We argue that understanding both high-level semantics and internal temporal structures of actions in competitive sports videos is the key to making predictions accurate and interpretable. Towards this goal, we construct a new fine-grained dataset, called FineDiving, developed on diverse diving events with detailed annotations on action procedures. We also propose a procedure-aware approach for action quality assessment, learned by a new Temporal Segmentation Attention module. Specifically, we propose to parse pairwise query and exemplar action instances into consecutive steps with diverse semantic and temporal correspondences. The procedure-aware cross-attention is proposed to learn embeddings between query and exemplar steps to discover their semantic, spatial, and temporal correspondences, and further serve for fine-grained contrastive regression to derive a reliable scoring mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods with better interpretability. The dataset and code are available at \url{https://github.com/xujinglin/FineDiving}.
summary: Most existing action quality assessment methods rely on the deep features of an entire video to predict the score, which is less reliable due to the non-transparent inference process and poor interpretability. We argue that understanding both high-level semantics and internal temporal structures of actions in competitive sports videos is the key to making predictions accurate and interpretable. Towards this goal, we construct a new fine-grained dataset, called FineDiving, developed on diverse diving events with detailed annotations on action procedures. We also propose a procedure-aware approach for action quality assessment, learned by a new Temporal Segmentation Attention module. Specifically, we propose to parse pairwise query and exemplar action instances into consecutive steps with diverse semantic and temporal correspondences. The procedure-aware cross-attention is proposed to learn embeddings between query and exemplar steps to discover their semantic, spatial, and temporal correspondences, and further serve for fine-grained contrastive regression to derive a reliable scoring mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods with better interpretability. The dataset and code are available at \url{https://github.com/xujinglin/FineDiving}.
abstract_zh: 现有的动作质量评估方法大多数依赖于整个视频的深层特征来预测分数，由于推理过程不透明且可解释性差，可靠性较差。我们认为，理解竞技体育视频中动作的高级语义和内部时间结构是使预测准确且可解释的关键。为了实现这一目标，我们构建了一个新的细粒度数据集，称为 FineDiving，该数据集是根据不同的潜水事件开发的，并对动作程序进行了详细注释。我们还提出了一种用于行动质量评估的程序感知方法，通过新的时间分割注意力模块学习。具体来说，我们建议将成对查询和示例动作实例解析为具有不同语义和时间对应关系的连续步骤。提出过程感知交叉注意力来学习查询和示例步骤之间的嵌入，以发现它们的语义、空间和时间对应关系，并进一步用于细粒度对比回归以得出可靠的评分机制。大量的实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法取得了实质性改进，具有更好的可解释性。数据集和代码可在 \url{https://github.com/xujinglin/FineDiving} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为FineDiving的细粒度数据集及一种基于过程感知的评分方法，用于竞技体育视频中动作质量的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有动作质量评估方法依赖整体视频特征，缺乏透明性和可解释性，难以准确捕捉动作的语义和时间结构。
AI.method: 构建包含详细动作步骤标注的FineDiving数据集，并设计时序分割注意力模块，通过查询-示例步骤的跨注意力机制学习语义、空间和时间对应关系，实现细粒度对比回归评分。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确性与可解释性上均优于现有先进方法，且数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 过程感知方法能更可靠地评估动作质量，细粒度标注数据集为未来研究提供重要资源。

search_text: FineDiving: A Fine-grained Dataset for Procedure-aware Action Quality Assessment FineDiving：用于程序感知行动质量评估的细粒度数据集 Most existing action quality assessment methods rely on the deep features of an entire video to predict the score, which is less reliable due to the non-transparent inference process and poor interpretability. We argue that understanding both high-level semantics and internal temporal structures of actions in competitive sports videos is the key to making predictions accurate and interpretable. Towards this goal, we construct a new fine-grained dataset, called FineDiving, developed on diverse diving events with detailed annotations on action procedures. We also propose a procedure-aware approach for action quality assessment, learned by a new Temporal Segmentation Attention module. Specifically, we propose to parse pairwise query and exemplar action instances into consecutive steps with diverse semantic and temporal correspondences. The procedure-aware cross-attention is proposed to learn embeddings between query and exemplar steps to discover their semantic, spatial, and temporal correspondences, and further serve for fine-grained contrastive regression to derive a reliable scoring mechanism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods with better interpretability. The dataset and code are available at \url{https://github.com/xujinglin/FineDiving}. 现有的动作质量评估方法大多数依赖于整个视频的深层特征来预测分数，由于推理过程不透明且可解释性差，可靠性较差。我们认为，理解竞技体育视频中动作的高级语义和内部时间结构是使预测准确且可解释的关键。为了实现这一目标，我们构建了一个新的细粒度数据集，称为 FineDiving，该数据集是根据不同的潜水事件开发的，并对动作程序进行了详细注释。我们还提出了一种用于行动质量评估的程序感知方法，通过新的时间分割注意力模块学习。具体来说，我们建议将成对查询和示例动作实例解析为具有不同语义和时间对应关系的连续步骤。提出过程感知交叉注意力来学习查询和示例步骤之间的嵌入，以发现它们的语义、空间和时间对应关系，并进一步用于细粒度对比回归以得出可靠的评分机制。大量的实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法取得了实质性改进，具有更好的可解释性。数据集和代码可在 \url{https://github.com/xujinglin/FineDiving} 获取。 本文提出一个名为FineDiving的细粒度数据集及一种基于过程感知的评分方法，用于竞技体育视频中动作质量的评估。 Jinglin Xu,Yongming Rao,Xumin Yu,Guangyi Chen,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Mingyu Ding,Bin Xiao,Noel Codella,Ping Luo,Jingdong Wang,Lu Yuan
title: DaViT: Dual Attention Vision Transformers
title_zh: DaViT：双重注意力视觉变压器
abstract: In this work, we introduce Dual Attention Vision Transformers (DaViT), a simple yet effective vision transformer architecture that is able to capture global context while maintaining computational efficiency. We propose approaching the problem from an orthogonal angle: exploiting self-attention mechanisms with both "spatial tokens" and "channel tokens". With spatial tokens, the spatial dimension defines the token scope, and the channel dimension defines the token feature dimension. With channel tokens, we have the inverse: the channel dimension defines the token scope, and the spatial dimension defines the token feature dimension. We further group tokens along the sequence direction for both spatial and channel tokens to maintain the linear complexity of the entire model. We show that these two self-attentions complement each other: (i) since each channel token contains an abstract representation of the entire image, the channel attention naturally captures global interactions and representations by taking all spatial positions into account when computing attention scores between channels; (ii) the spatial attention refines the local representations by performing fine-grained interactions across spatial locations, which in turn helps the global information modeling in channel attention. Extensive experiments show our DaViT achieves state-of-the-art performance on four different tasks with efficient computations. Without extra data, DaViT-Tiny, DaViT-Small, and DaViT-Base achieve 82.8%, 84.2%, and 84.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with 28.3M, 49.7M, and 87.9M parameters, respectively. When we further scale up DaViT with 1.5B weakly supervised image and text pairs, DaViT-Gaint reaches 90.4% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. Code is available at https://github.com/dingmyu/davit.
summary: In this work, we introduce Dual Attention Vision Transformers (DaViT), a simple yet effective vision transformer architecture that is able to capture global context while maintaining computational efficiency. We propose approaching the problem from an orthogonal angle: exploiting self-attention mechanisms with both "spatial tokens" and "channel tokens". With spatial tokens, the spatial dimension defines the token scope, and the channel dimension defines the token feature dimension. With channel tokens, we have the inverse: the channel dimension defines the token scope, and the spatial dimension defines the token feature dimension. We further group tokens along the sequence direction for both spatial and channel tokens to maintain the linear complexity of the entire model. We show that these two self-attentions complement each other: (i) since each channel token contains an abstract representation of the entire image, the channel attention naturally captures global interactions and representations by taking all spatial positions into account when computing attention scores between channels; (ii) the spatial attention refines the local representations by performing fine-grained interactions across spatial locations, which in turn helps the global information modeling in channel attention. Extensive experiments show our DaViT achieves state-of-the-art performance on four different tasks with efficient computations. Without extra data, DaViT-Tiny, DaViT-Small, and DaViT-Base achieve 82.8%, 84.2%, and 84.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with 28.3M, 49.7M, and 87.9M parameters, respectively. When we further scale up DaViT with 1.5B weakly supervised image and text pairs, DaViT-Gaint reaches 90.4% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. Code is available at https://github.com/dingmyu/davit.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了双重注意力视觉变换器（DaViT），这是一种简单而有效的视觉变换器架构，能够捕获全局上下文，同时保持计算效率。我们建议从正交角度解决这个问题：利用“空间令牌”和“通道令牌”的自注意力机制。对于空间标记，空间维度定义标记范围，通道维度定义标记特征维度。对于通道令牌，我们有相反的情况：通道维度定义令牌范围，空间维度定义令牌特征维度。我们进一步沿着空间和通道标记的序列方向对标记进行分组，以保持整个模型的线性复杂性。我们证明这两个自注意力是相辅相成的：（i）由于每个通道标记都包含整个图像的抽象表示，通道注意力通过在计算通道之间的注意力分数时考虑所有空间位置来自然地捕获全局交互和表示； （ii）空间注意力通过跨空间位置执行细粒度交互来细化局部表示，这反过来又有助于通道注意力中的全局信息建模。大量实验表明，我们的 DaViT 通过高效计算在四种不同任务上实现了最先进的性能。在没有额外数据的情况下，DaViT-Tiny、DaViT-Small 和 DaViT-Base 在具有 28.3M、49.7M 和 87.9M 参数的 ImageNet-1K 上分别达到 82.8%、84.2% 和 84.6% 的 top-1 准确率。当我们用 1.5B 弱监督图像和文本对进一步扩展 DaViT 时，DaViT-Gaint 在 ImageNet-1K 上达到 90.4% 的 top-1 准确率。代码可在 https://github.com/dingmyu/davit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DaViT的双注意力视觉Transformer架构，旨在高效捕捉全局上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer在捕捉全局上下文与局部细节时存在效率与性能的平衡问题，需探索更有效的自注意力机制。
AI.method: 通过引入空间token和通道token的双自注意力机制，分别处理局部空间交互与全局通道交互，并通过序列分组保持线性复杂度。
AI.result: DaViT在ImageNet-1K上达到82.8%-90.4%的Top-1准确率，参数量从28.3M到1.5B不等，且无需额外数据即可超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DaViT通过双注意力机制有效结合了局部与全局信息建模，实现了计算效率与性能的平衡，适用于多种视觉任务。

authors_text: Raymond A. Yeh,Yuan-Ting Hu,Zhongzheng Ren,Alexander G. Schwing
title: Total Variation Optimization Layers for Computer Vision
title_zh: 计算机视觉的总变异优化层
abstract: Optimization within a layer of a deep-net has emerged as a new direction for deep-net layer design. However, there are two main challenges when applying these layers to computer vision tasks: (a) which optimization problem within a layer is useful?; (b) how to ensure that computation within a layer remains efficient? To study question (a), in this work, we propose total variation (TV) minimization as a layer for computer vision. Motivated by the success of total variation in image processing, we hypothesize that TV as a layer provides useful inductive bias for deep-nets too. We study this hypothesis on five computer vision tasks: image classification, weakly supervised object localization, edge-preserving smoothing, edge detection, and image denoising, improving over existing baselines. To achieve these results we had to address question (b): we developed a GPU-based projected-Newton method which is $37\times$ faster than existing solutions.
summary: Optimization within a layer of a deep-net has emerged as a new direction for deep-net layer design. However, there are two main challenges when applying these layers to computer vision tasks: (a) which optimization problem within a layer is useful?; (b) how to ensure that computation within a layer remains efficient? To study question (a), in this work, we propose total variation (TV) minimization as a layer for computer vision. Motivated by the success of total variation in image processing, we hypothesize that TV as a layer provides useful inductive bias for deep-nets too. We study this hypothesis on five computer vision tasks: image classification, weakly supervised object localization, edge-preserving smoothing, edge detection, and image denoising, improving over existing baselines. To achieve these results we had to address question (b): we developed a GPU-based projected-Newton method which is $37\times$ faster than existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 深层网络层内的优化已成为深层网络层设计的新方向。然而，将这些层应用于计算机视觉任务时存在两个主要挑战：（a）层内的哪些优化问题有用？ (b) 如何确保层内的计算保持高效？为了研究问题（a），在这项工作中，我们提出全变差（TV）最小化作为计算机视觉的一层。受图像处理中全变分成功的推动，我们假设电视作为一层也为深度网络提供了有用的归纳偏差。我们在五个计算机视觉任务上研究了这一假设：图像分类、弱监督对象定位、边缘保留平滑、边缘检测和图像去噪，在现有基线上进行了改进。为了实现这些结果，我们必须解决问题 (b)：我们开发了一种基于 GPU 的投影牛顿方法，该方法比现有解决方案快 37 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将总变差（TV）最小化作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的层，用于解决计算机视觉任务，并开发了高效的计算方法。
AI.motivation: 受总变差在图像处理中的成功启发，假设将其作为网络层可为深度学习提供有用的归纳偏置，以提升计算机视觉任务的性能。
AI.method: 设计基于GPU的投影牛顿法，解决TV优化问题，确保计算效率，并在五个视觉任务中验证有效性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、边缘检测等五项任务中超越现有基线，提出的算法比现有方案快37倍。
AI.conclusion: TV优化层能有效提升深度网络在计算机视觉任务中的表现，且计算效率显著提高。

search_text: Total Variation Optimization Layers for Computer Vision 计算机视觉的总变异优化层 Optimization within a layer of a deep-net has emerged as a new direction for deep-net layer design. However, there are two main challenges when applying these layers to computer vision tasks: (a) which optimization problem within a layer is useful?; (b) how to ensure that computation within a layer remains efficient? To study question (a), in this work, we propose total variation (TV) minimization as a layer for computer vision. Motivated by the success of total variation in image processing, we hypothesize that TV as a layer provides useful inductive bias for deep-nets too. We study this hypothesis on five computer vision tasks: image classification, weakly supervised object localization, edge-preserving smoothing, edge detection, and image denoising, improving over existing baselines. To achieve these results we had to address question (b): we developed a GPU-based projected-Newton method which is $37\times$ faster than existing solutions. 深层网络层内的优化已成为深层网络层设计的新方向。然而，将这些层应用于计算机视觉任务时存在两个主要挑战：（a）层内的哪些优化问题有用？ (b) 如何确保层内的计算保持高效？为了研究问题（a），在这项工作中，我们提出全变差（TV）最小化作为计算机视觉的一层。受图像处理中全变分成功的推动，我们假设电视作为一层也为深度网络提供了有用的归纳偏差。我们在五个计算机视觉任务上研究了这一假设：图像分类、弱监督对象定位、边缘保留平滑、边缘检测和图像去噪，在现有基线上进行了改进。为了实现这些结果，我们必须解决问题 (b)：我们开发了一种基于 GPU 的投影牛顿方法，该方法比现有解决方案快 37 倍。 本文提出将总变差（TV）最小化作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的层，用于解决计算机视觉任务，并开发了高效的计算方法。 Raymond A. Yeh,Yuan-Ting Hu,Zhongzheng Ren,Alexander G. Schwing cs.CV

authors_text: Kalyan Vasudev Alwala,Abhinav Gupta,Shubham Tulsiani
title: Pre-train, Self-train, Distill: A simple recipe for Supersizing 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: 预训练、自训练、提炼：超大 3D 重建的简单方法
comment: To appear in CVPR 22. Project page: https://shubhtuls.github.io/ss3d/
comments: To appear in CVPR 22. Project page: https://shubhtuls.github.io/ss3d/
abstract: Our work learns a unified model for single-view 3D reconstruction of objects from hundreds of semantic categories. As a scalable alternative to direct 3D supervision, our work relies on segmented image collections for learning 3D of generic categories. Unlike prior works that use similar supervision but learn independent category-specific models from scratch, our approach of learning a unified model simplifies the training process while also allowing the model to benefit from the common structure across categories. Using image collections from standard recognition datasets, we show that our approach allows learning 3D inference for over 150 object categories. We evaluate using two datasets and qualitatively and quantitatively show that our unified reconstruction approach improves over prior category-specific reconstruction baselines. Our final 3D reconstruction model is also capable of zero-shot inference on images from unseen object categories and we empirically show that increasing the number of training categories improves the reconstruction quality.
summary: Our work learns a unified model for single-view 3D reconstruction of objects from hundreds of semantic categories. As a scalable alternative to direct 3D supervision, our work relies on segmented image collections for learning 3D of generic categories. Unlike prior works that use similar supervision but learn independent category-specific models from scratch, our approach of learning a unified model simplifies the training process while also allowing the model to benefit from the common structure across categories. Using image collections from standard recognition datasets, we show that our approach allows learning 3D inference for over 150 object categories. We evaluate using two datasets and qualitatively and quantitatively show that our unified reconstruction approach improves over prior category-specific reconstruction baselines. Our final 3D reconstruction model is also capable of zero-shot inference on images from unseen object categories and we empirically show that increasing the number of training categories improves the reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作学习了一个统一的模型，用于从数百个语义类别中对对象进行单视图 3D 重建。作为直接 3D 监督的可扩展替代方案，我们的工作依赖于分段图像集合来学习通用类别的 3D。与使用类似监督但从头开始学习独立的特定类别模型的先前作品不同，我们学习统一模型的方法简化了训练过程，同时也允许模型从跨类别的通用结构中受益。使用标准识别数据集中的图像集合，我们表明我们的方法允许学习 150 多个对象类别的 3D 推理。我们使用两个数据集进行评估，并定性和定量地表明，我们的统一重建方法比先前的特定类别重建基线有所改进。我们最终的 3D 重建模型还能够对来自看不见的对象类别的图像进行零样本推理，并且我们凭经验表明，增加训练类别的数量可以提高重建质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的单视角3D重建模型，能够处理数百种语义类别，无需直接3D监督。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需为每个类别单独训练3D模型，难以扩展至大规模类别。本文旨在通过统一模型简化训练并利用跨类别的共性结构。
AI.method: 利用标准数据集的分割图像进行预训练、自训练和知识蒸馏，学习跨类别的统一3D重建模型。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上优于类别特定基线，支持对未见类别的零样本推理，且训练类别数量增加提升重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 统一模型方法有效扩展了3D重建的规模，实现了更高效的跨类别泛化能力。

authors_text: Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation with Generative Prior
title_zh: 具有生成先验的无监督图像到图像转换
abstract: Unsupervised image-to-image translation aims to learn the translation between two visual domains without paired data. Despite the recent progress in image translation models, it remains challenging to build mappings between complex domains with drastic visual discrepancies. In this work, we present a novel framework, Generative Prior-guided UNsupervised Image-to-image Translation (GP-UNIT), to improve the overall quality and applicability of the translation algorithm. Our key insight is to leverage the generative prior from pre-trained class-conditional GANs (e.g., BigGAN) to learn rich content correspondences across various domains. We propose a novel coarse-to-fine scheme: we first distill the generative prior to capture a robust coarse-level content representation that can link objects at an abstract semantic level, based on which fine-level content features are adaptively learned for more accurate multi-level content correspondences. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our versatile framework over state-of-the-art methods in robust, high-quality and diversified translations, even for challenging and distant domains.
summary: Unsupervised image-to-image translation aims to learn the translation between two visual domains without paired data. Despite the recent progress in image translation models, it remains challenging to build mappings between complex domains with drastic visual discrepancies. In this work, we present a novel framework, Generative Prior-guided UNsupervised Image-to-image Translation (GP-UNIT), to improve the overall quality and applicability of the translation algorithm. Our key insight is to leverage the generative prior from pre-trained class-conditional GANs (e.g., BigGAN) to learn rich content correspondences across various domains. We propose a novel coarse-to-fine scheme: we first distill the generative prior to capture a robust coarse-level content representation that can link objects at an abstract semantic level, based on which fine-level content features are adaptively learned for more accurate multi-level content correspondences. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our versatile framework over state-of-the-art methods in robust, high-quality and diversified translations, even for challenging and distant domains.
abstract_zh: 无监督图像到图像翻译旨在学习两个视觉域之间的翻译，无需配对数据。尽管图像翻译模型最近取得了进展，但在具有巨大视觉差异的复杂域之间建立映射仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即生成先验引导的无监督图像到图像翻译（GP-UNIT），以提高翻译算法的整体质量和适用性。我们的主要见解是利用预训练的类条件 GAN（例如 BigGAN）的生成先验来学习跨各个领域的丰富内容对应关系。我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的方案：我们首先提取生成之前的内容，以捕获鲁棒的粗级内容表示，该内容表示可以在抽象语义级别链接对象，在此基础上自适应地学习精细级内容特征以实现更准确的多级内容对应。大量的实验证明，我们的多功能框架在稳健、高质量和多样化的翻译方面优于最先进的方法，即使对于具有挑战性和遥远的领域也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成先验的无监督图像到图像翻译框架GP-UNIT，通过预训练GAN的先验知识提升复杂视觉域间的翻译质量。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督图像翻译方法在处理视觉差异显著的复杂域时存在映射不准确、细节丢失等问题，亟需更有效的跨域内容对应学习机制。
AI.method: 提出粗到细的生成先验引导框架：首先通过知识蒸馏获取预训练GAN的粗粒度语义表示，再基于此学习细粒度内容特征实现多级对应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，尤其在视觉差异显著的跨域任务中展现出更鲁棒的高质量、多样化翻译效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合生成先验与分层特征学习，GP-UNIT框架为复杂域间无监督翻译提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our versatile framework over state-of-the-art methods in robust, high-quality and diversified translations, even for challenging and distant domains. 无监督图像到图像翻译旨在学习两个视觉域之间的翻译，无需配对数据。尽管图像翻译模型最近取得了进展，但在具有巨大视觉差异的复杂域之间建立映射仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即生成先验引导的无监督图像到图像翻译（GP-UNIT），以提高翻译算法的整体质量和适用性。我们的主要见解是利用预训练的类条件 GAN（例如 BigGAN）的生成先验来学习跨各个领域的丰富内容对应关系。我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的方案：我们首先提取生成之前的内容，以捕获鲁棒的粗级内容表示，该内容表示可以在抽象语义级别链接对象，在此基础上自适应地学习精细级内容特征以实现更准确的多级内容对应。大量的实验证明，我们的多功能框架在稳健、高质量和多样化的翻译方面优于最先进的方法，即使对于具有挑战性和遥远的领域也是如此。 本文提出一种基于生成先验的无监督图像到图像翻译框架GP-UNIT，通过预训练GAN的先验知识提升复杂视觉域间的翻译质量。 Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Raymond A. Yeh,Yuan-Ting Hu,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Alexander G. Schwing
title: Equivariance Discovery by Learned Parameter-Sharing
title_zh: 通过学习参数共享发现等方差
abstract: Designing equivariance as an inductive bias into deep-nets has been a prominent approach to build effective models, e.g., a convolutional neural network incorporates translation equivariance. However, incorporating these inductive biases requires knowledge about the equivariance properties of the data, which may not be available, e.g., when encountering a new domain. To address this, we study how to discover interpretable equivariances from data. Specifically, we formulate this discovery process as an optimization problem over a model's parameter-sharing schemes. We propose to use the partition distance to empirically quantify the accuracy of the recovered equivariance. Also, we theoretically analyze the method for Gaussian data and provide a bound on the mean squared gap between the studied discovery scheme and the oracle scheme. Empirically, we show that the approach recovers known equivariances, such as permutations and shifts, on sum of numbers and spatially-invariant data.
summary: Designing equivariance as an inductive bias into deep-nets has been a prominent approach to build effective models, e.g., a convolutional neural network incorporates translation equivariance. However, incorporating these inductive biases requires knowledge about the equivariance properties of the data, which may not be available, e.g., when encountering a new domain. To address this, we study how to discover interpretable equivariances from data. Specifically, we formulate this discovery process as an optimization problem over a model's parameter-sharing schemes. We propose to use the partition distance to empirically quantify the accuracy of the recovered equivariance. Also, we theoretically analyze the method for Gaussian data and provide a bound on the mean squared gap between the studied discovery scheme and the oracle scheme. Empirically, we show that the approach recovers known equivariances, such as permutations and shifts, on sum of numbers and spatially-invariant data.
abstract_zh: 将等方差设计为深度网络的归纳偏差一直是构建有效模型的一种重要方法，例如，卷积神经网络结合了平移等方差。然而，合并这些归纳偏差需要了解数据的等方差属性，而这些属性可能不可用，例如，当遇到新域时。为了解决这个问题，我们研究如何从数据中发现可解释的等方差。具体来说，我们将这个发现过程表述为模型参数共享方案的优化问题。我们建议使用分区距离来凭经验量化恢复的等方差的准确性。此外，我们从理论上分析了高斯数据的方法，并提供了所研究的发现方案和预言方案之间均方差距的界限。根据经验，我们表明该方法可以恢复数字和和空间不变数据的已知等方差，例如排列和移位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从数据中自动发现可解释等变性的方法，无需预先知道数据的等变属性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度网络通过人工设计等变性（如卷积的平移等变性）提升性能，但新领域数据可能缺乏先验等变性知识，需自动发现机制。
AI.method: 将等变性发现建模为参数共享方案的优化问题，通过分区距离量化恢复效果，并对高斯数据进行理论分析。
AI.result: 实验验证方法能成功恢复数字求和与空间不变数据中的排列、位移等已知等变性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动发现数据内在等变性提供了理论保证与有效工具，扩展了深度网络的归纳偏置应用范围。

authors_text: Songwei Ge,Thomas Hayes,Harry Yang,Xi Yin,Guan Pang,David Jacobs,Jia-Bin Huang,Devi Parikh
title: Long Video Generation with Time-Agnostic VQGAN and Time-Sensitive Transformer
title_zh: 使用与时间无关的 VQGAN 和时间敏感变压器生成长视频
abstract: Videos are created to express emotion, exchange information, and share experiences. Video synthesis has intrigued researchers for a long time. Despite the rapid progress driven by advances in visual synthesis, most existing studies focus on improving the frames' quality and the transitions between them, while little progress has been made in generating longer videos. In this paper, we present a method that builds on 3D-VQGAN and transformers to generate videos with thousands of frames. Our evaluation shows that our model trained on 16-frame video clips from standard benchmarks such as UCF-101, Sky Time-lapse, and Taichi-HD datasets can generate diverse, coherent, and high-quality long videos. We also showcase conditional extensions of our approach for generating meaningful long videos by incorporating temporal information with text and audio. Videos and code can be found at https://songweige.github.io/projects/tats/index.html.
summary: Videos are created to express emotion, exchange information, and share experiences. Video synthesis has intrigued researchers for a long time. Despite the rapid progress driven by advances in visual synthesis, most existing studies focus on improving the frames' quality and the transitions between them, while little progress has been made in generating longer videos. In this paper, we present a method that builds on 3D-VQGAN and transformers to generate videos with thousands of frames. Our evaluation shows that our model trained on 16-frame video clips from standard benchmarks such as UCF-101, Sky Time-lapse, and Taichi-HD datasets can generate diverse, coherent, and high-quality long videos. We also showcase conditional extensions of our approach for generating meaningful long videos by incorporating temporal information with text and audio. Videos and code can be found at https://songweige.github.io/projects/tats/index.html.
abstract_zh: 创建视频是为了表达情感、交流信息和分享经验。视频合成长期以来一直引起研究人员的兴趣。尽管视觉合成的进步推动了快速进步，但大多数现有研究都集中在提高帧的质量和帧之间的过渡，而在生成更长的视频方面进展甚微。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 3D-VQGAN 和转换器来生成数千帧视频的方法。我们的评估表明，我们的模型在 UCF-101、Sky Time-lapse 和 Taichi-HD 数据集等标准基准的 16 帧视频剪辑上进行训练，可以生成多样化、连贯且高质量的长视频。我们还展示了通过将时间信息与文本和音频相结合来生成有意义的长视频的方法的条件扩展。视频和代码可以在 https://songweige.github.io/projects/tats/index.html 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合3D-VQGAN和时间敏感Transformer的长视频生成方法，能够生成数千帧的高质量、连贯视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成研究主要关注帧质量和过渡效果，但在生成长视频方面进展有限，因此需要新的方法突破这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 基于3D-VQGAN生成视频帧，并引入时间敏感Transformer建模时序关系，同时通过文本和音频条件扩展实现可控生成。
AI.result: 模型在UCF-101等数据集上训练后，可生成多样且高质量的长视频，并成功集成文本/音频条件生成有意义的视频内容。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了长视频生成难题，为结合时序信息的可控视频生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yi Wei,Linqing Zhao,Wenzhao Zheng,Zheng Zhu,Yongming Rao,Guan Huang,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou
title: SurroundDepth: Entangling Surrounding Views for Self-Supervised Multi-Camera Depth Estimation
title_zh: SurroundDepth：纠缠周围视图以进行自监督多摄像机深度估计
comment: Accepted to CoRL 2022. Project page: https://surrounddepth.ivg-research.xyz Code: https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundDepth
comments: Accepted to CoRL 2022. Project page: https://surrounddepth.ivg-research.xyz Code: https://github.com/weiyithu/SurroundDepth
abstract: Depth estimation from images serves as the fundamental step of 3D perception for autonomous driving and is an economical alternative to expensive depth sensors like LiDAR. The temporal photometric constraints enables self-supervised depth estimation without labels, further facilitating its application. However, most existing methods predict the depth solely based on each monocular image and ignore the correlations among multiple surrounding cameras, which are typically available for modern self-driving vehicles. In this paper, we propose a SurroundDepth method to incorporate the information from multiple surrounding views to predict depth maps across cameras. Specifically, we employ a joint network to process all the surrounding views and propose a cross-view transformer to effectively fuse the information from multiple views. We apply cross-view self-attention to efficiently enable the global interactions between multi-camera feature maps. Different from self-supervised monocular depth estimation, we are able to predict real-world scales given multi-camera extrinsic matrices. To achieve this goal, we adopt the two-frame structure-from-motion to extract scale-aware pseudo depths to pretrain the models. Further, instead of predicting the ego-motion of each individual camera, we estimate a universal ego-motion of the vehicle and transfer it to each view to achieve multi-view ego-motion consistency. In experiments, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the challenging multi-camera depth estimation datasets DDAD and nuScenes.
summary: Depth estimation from images serves as the fundamental step of 3D perception for autonomous driving and is an economical alternative to expensive depth sensors like LiDAR. The temporal photometric constraints enables self-supervised depth estimation without labels, further facilitating its application. However, most existing methods predict the depth solely based on each monocular image and ignore the correlations among multiple surrounding cameras, which are typically available for modern self-driving vehicles. In this paper, we propose a SurroundDepth method to incorporate the information from multiple surrounding views to predict depth maps across cameras. Specifically, we employ a joint network to process all the surrounding views and propose a cross-view transformer to effectively fuse the information from multiple views. We apply cross-view self-attention to efficiently enable the global interactions between multi-camera feature maps. Different from self-supervised monocular depth estimation, we are able to predict real-world scales given multi-camera extrinsic matrices. To achieve this goal, we adopt the two-frame structure-from-motion to extract scale-aware pseudo depths to pretrain the models. Further, instead of predicting the ego-motion of each individual camera, we estimate a universal ego-motion of the vehicle and transfer it to each view to achieve multi-view ego-motion consistency. In experiments, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the challenging multi-camera depth estimation datasets DDAD and nuScenes.
abstract_zh: 图像深度估计是自动驾驶 3D 感知的基本步骤，是 LiDAR 等昂贵深度传感器的经济替代方案。时间光度约束可以实现无需标签的自监督深度估计，进一步促进其应用。然而，大多数现有方法仅根据每个单目图像来预测深度​​，而忽略了多个周围摄像头之间的相关性，而这通常适用于现代自动驾驶车辆。在本文中，我们提出了一种 SurroundDepth 方法来合并来自多个周围视图的信息来预测跨摄像机的深度图。具体来说，我们采用联合网络来处理所有周围视图，并提出跨视图转换器来有效融合来自多个视图的信息。我们应用跨视图自注意力来有效地实现多相机特征图之间的全局交互。与自监督单目深度估计不同，我们能够在给定多相机外在矩阵的情况下预测现实世界的尺度。为了实现这一目标，我们采用两帧运动结构来提取尺度感知伪深度来预训练模型。此外，我们不是预测每个单独摄像机的自我运动，而是估计车辆的通用自我运动并将其转移到每个视图以实现多视图自我运动一致性。在实验中，我们的方法在具有挑战性的多相机深度估计数据集 DDAD 和 nuScenes 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SurroundDepth方法，通过融合多摄像头视角信息实现自监督的多摄像头深度估计，提升自动驾驶中的三维感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法忽略多摄像头间的关联性，而现代自动驾驶车辆通常配备多个摄像头，利用多视角信息可提升深度估计精度。
AI.method: 设计联合网络处理多视角图像，引入跨视角Transformer进行特征融合，采用跨视角自注意力机制实现全局交互，并通过两帧结构运动恢复（SfM）生成尺度感知伪深度，结合车辆统一运动估计提升多视角一致性。
AI.result: 在DDAD和nuScenes数据集上达到当时最先进的多摄像头深度估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效整合多摄像头信息和自监督学习，SurroundDepth显著提升了多视角深度估计的精度与鲁棒性。
