search_text: SurroundDepth: Entangling Surrounding Views for Self-Supervised Multi-Camera Depth Estimation SurroundDepth：纠缠周围视图以进行自监督多摄像机深度估计 Depth estimation from images serves as the fundamental step of 3D perception for autonomous driving and is an economical alternative to expensive depth sensors like LiDAR. The temporal photometric constraints enables self-supervised depth estimation without labels, further facilitating its application. However, most existing methods predict the depth solely based on each monocular image and ignore the correlations among multiple surrounding cameras, which are typically available for modern self-driving vehicles. In this paper, we propose a SurroundDepth method to incorporate the information from multiple surrounding views to predict depth maps across cameras. Specifically, we employ a joint network to process all the surrounding views and propose a cross-view transformer to effectively fuse the information from multiple views. We apply cross-view self-attention to efficiently enable the global interactions between multi-camera feature maps. Different from self-supervised monocular depth estimation, we are able to predict real-world scales given multi-camera extrinsic matrices. To achieve this goal, we adopt the two-frame structure-from-motion to extract scale-aware pseudo depths to pretrain the models. Further, instead of predicting the ego-motion of each individual camera, we estimate a universal ego-motion of the vehicle and transfer it to each view to achieve multi-view ego-motion consistency. In experiments, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the challenging multi-camera depth estimation datasets DDAD and nuScenes. 图像深度估计是自动驾驶 3D 感知的基本步骤，是 LiDAR 等昂贵深度传感器的经济替代方案。时间光度约束可以实现无需标签的自监督深度估计，进一步促进其应用。然而，大多数现有方法仅根据每个单目图像来预测深度​​，而忽略了多个周围摄像头之间的相关性，而这通常适用于现代自动驾驶车辆。在本文中，我们提出了一种 SurroundDepth 方法来合并来自多个周围视图的信息来预测跨摄像机的深度图。具体来说，我们采用联合网络来处理所有周围视图，并提出跨视图转换器来有效融合来自多个视图的信息。我们应用跨视图自注意力来有效地实现多相机特征图之间的全局交互。与自监督单目深度估计不同，我们能够在给定多相机外在矩阵的情况下预测现实世界的尺度。为了实现这一目标，我们采用两帧运动结构来提取尺度感知伪深度来预训练模型。此外，我们不是预测每个单独摄像机的自我运动，而是估计车辆的通用自我运动并将其转移到每个视图以实现多视图自我运动一致性。在实验中，我们的方法在具有挑战性的多相机深度估计数据集 DDAD 和 nuScenes 上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出SurroundDepth方法，通过融合多摄像头视角信息实现自监督的多摄像头深度估计，提升自动驾驶中的三维感知能力。 Yi Wei,Linqing Zhao,Wenzhao Zheng,Zheng Zhu,Yongming Rao,Guan Huang,Jiwen Lu,Jie Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Walter Goodwin,Sagar Vaze,Ioannis Havoutis,Ingmar Posner
title: Zero-Shot Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 零样本类别级物体姿态估计
abstract: Object pose estimation is an important component of most vision pipelines for embodied agents, as well as in 3D vision more generally. In this paper we tackle the problem of estimating the pose of novel object categories in a zero-shot manner. This extends much of the existing literature by removing the need for pose-labelled datasets or category-specific CAD models for training or inference. Specifically, we make the following contributions. First, we formalise the zero-shot, category-level pose estimation problem and frame it in a way that is most applicable to real-world embodied agents. Secondly, we propose a novel method based on semantic correspondences from a self-supervised vision transformer to solve the pose estimation problem. We further re-purpose the recent CO3D dataset to present a controlled and realistic test setting. Finally, we demonstrate that all baselines for our proposed task perform poorly, and show that our method provides a six-fold improvement in average rotation accuracy at 30 degrees. Our code is available at https://github.com/applied-ai-lab/zero-shot-pose.
summary: Object pose estimation is an important component of most vision pipelines for embodied agents, as well as in 3D vision more generally. In this paper we tackle the problem of estimating the pose of novel object categories in a zero-shot manner. This extends much of the existing literature by removing the need for pose-labelled datasets or category-specific CAD models for training or inference. Specifically, we make the following contributions. First, we formalise the zero-shot, category-level pose estimation problem and frame it in a way that is most applicable to real-world embodied agents. Secondly, we propose a novel method based on semantic correspondences from a self-supervised vision transformer to solve the pose estimation problem. We further re-purpose the recent CO3D dataset to present a controlled and realistic test setting. Finally, we demonstrate that all baselines for our proposed task perform poorly, and show that our method provides a six-fold improvement in average rotation accuracy at 30 degrees. Our code is available at https://github.com/applied-ai-lab/zero-shot-pose.
abstract_zh: 物体姿态估计是大多数实体智能体视觉管道的重要组成部分，更广泛地说，是 3D 视觉管道的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们解决了以零样本方式估计新对象类别的姿态的问题。这消除了对用于训练或推理的姿势标记数据集或特定类别 CAD 模型的需求，从而扩展了许多现有文献。具体来说，我们做出以下贡献。首先，我们形式化零样本、类别级姿态估计问题，并以最适用于现实世界的具体代理的方式构建它。其次，我们提出了一种基于自监督视觉变换器的语义对应的新方法来解决姿态估计问题。我们进一步重新利用最近的 CO3D 数据集来呈现受控且真实的测试设置。最后，我们证明了我们提出的任务的所有基线都表现不佳，并表明我们的方法在 30 度时的平均旋转精度提高了六倍。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/applied-ai-lab/zero-shot-pose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需姿态标注数据或CAD模型的零样本类别级物体姿态估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖姿态标注数据集或类别特定CAD模型，限制了实际应用中的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于自监督视觉Transformer的语义对应关系，结合改进的CO3D数据集构建测试场景。
AI.result: 在30度旋转精度指标上实现6倍于基线方法的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了零样本姿态估计问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Tz-Ying Wu,Gurumurthy Swaminathan,Zhizhong Li,Avinash Ravichandran,Nuno Vasconcelos,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto
title: Class-Incremental Learning with Strong Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 具有强大预训练模型的课堂增量学习
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2022, code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil
abstract: Class-incremental learning (CIL) has been widely studied under the setting of starting from a small number of classes (base classes). Instead, we explore an understudied real-world setting of CIL that starts with a strong model pre-trained on a large number of base classes. We hypothesize that a strong base model can provide a good representation for novel classes and incremental learning can be done with small adaptations. We propose a 2-stage training scheme, i) feature augmentation -- cloning part of the backbone and fine-tuning it on the novel data, and ii) fusion -- combining the base and novel classifiers into a unified classifier. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art CIL methods on the large-scale ImageNet dataset (e.g. +10% overall accuracy than the best). We also propose and analyze understudied practical CIL scenarios, such as base-novel overlap with distribution shift. Our proposed method is robust and generalizes to all analyzed CIL settings. Code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil.
summary: Class-incremental learning (CIL) has been widely studied under the setting of starting from a small number of classes (base classes). Instead, we explore an understudied real-world setting of CIL that starts with a strong model pre-trained on a large number of base classes. We hypothesize that a strong base model can provide a good representation for novel classes and incremental learning can be done with small adaptations. We propose a 2-stage training scheme, i) feature augmentation -- cloning part of the backbone and fine-tuning it on the novel data, and ii) fusion -- combining the base and novel classifiers into a unified classifier. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art CIL methods on the large-scale ImageNet dataset (e.g. +10% overall accuracy than the best). We also propose and analyze understudied practical CIL scenarios, such as base-novel overlap with distribution shift. Our proposed method is robust and generalizes to all analyzed CIL settings. Code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil.
abstract_zh: 班级增量学习（CIL）在从少量班级（基班）开始的背景下得到了广泛的研究。相反，我们探索了一个未经充分研究的 CIL 现实世界环境，该环境从在大量基类上预先训练的强大模型开始。我们假设一个强大的基础模型可以为新类别提供良好的表示，并且可以通过小的调整来完成增量学习。我们提出了一个两阶段的训练方案，i）特征增强——克隆部分主干网并在新数据上对其进行微调，ii）融合——将基础分类器和新分类器组合成一个统一的分类器。实验表明，所提出的方法在大规模 ImageNet 数据集上显着优于最先进的 CIL 方法（例如，总体精度比最佳方法高出 10%）。我们还提出并分析了未充分研究的实际 CIL 场景，例如基础小说与分布转移的重叠。我们提出的方法非常稳健，并且可以推广到所有分析的 CIL 设置。代码可在 https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从大量预训练基础类模型出发的类增量学习方法，提出了一种两阶段训练方案以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有类增量学习研究多基于少量基础类，而实际场景中常需从大规模预训练模型出发进行增量学习，现有方法未能充分挖掘强预训练模型的表示能力。
AI.method: 提出两阶段训练方案：1) 特征增强阶段通过克隆主干网络部分并微调处理新类数据；2) 分类器融合阶段将基础类与新类分类器整合为统一分类器。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上相较最先进方法提升10%整体准确率，且在分布偏移等实际场景中表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用强预训练模型表示能力，通过模块化设计实现对各类增量学习场景的泛化，代码已开源。

Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art CIL methods on the large-scale ImageNet dataset (e.g. +10% overall accuracy than the best). We also propose and analyze understudied practical CIL scenarios, such as base-novel overlap with distribution shift. Our proposed method is robust and generalizes to all analyzed CIL settings. Code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil. 班级增量学习（CIL）在从少量班级（基班）开始的背景下得到了广泛的研究。相反，我们探索了一个未经充分研究的 CIL 现实世界环境，该环境从在大量基类上预先训练的强大模型开始。我们假设一个强大的基础模型可以为新类别提供良好的表示，并且可以通过小的调整来完成增量学习。我们提出了一个两阶段的训练方案，i）特征增强——克隆部分主干网并在新数据上对其进行微调，ii）融合——将基础分类器和新分类器组合成一个统一的分类器。实验表明，所提出的方法在大规模 ImageNet 数据集上显着优于最先进的 CIL 方法（例如，总体精度比最佳方法高出 10%）。我们还提出并分析了未充分研究的实际 CIL 场景，例如基础小说与分布转移的重叠。我们提出的方法非常稳健，并且可以推广到所有分析的 CIL 设置。代码可在 https://github.com/amazon-research/sp-cil 获取。 本文研究了从大量预训练基础类模型出发的类增量学习方法，提出了一种两阶段训练方案以提升模型性能。 Tz-Ying Wu,Gurumurthy Swaminathan,Zhizhong Li,Avinash Ravichandran,Nuno Vasconcelos,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Randall Balestriero,Leon Bottou,Yann LeCun
title: The Effects of Regularization and Data Augmentation are Class Dependent
title_zh: 正则化和数据增强的效果取决于类别
abstract: Regularization is a fundamental technique to prevent over-fitting and to improve generalization performances by constraining a model's complexity. Current Deep Networks heavily rely on regularizers such as Data-Augmentation (DA) or weight-decay, and employ structural risk minimization, i.e. cross-validation, to select the optimal regularization hyper-parameters. In this study, we demonstrate that techniques such as DA or weight decay produce a model with a reduced complexity that is unfair across classes. The optimal amount of DA or weight decay found from cross-validation leads to disastrous model performances on some classes e.g. on Imagenet with a resnet50, the "barn spider" classification test accuracy falls from $68\%$ to $46\%$ only by introducing random crop DA during training. Even more surprising, such performance drop also appears when introducing uninformative regularization techniques such as weight decay. Those results demonstrate that our search for ever increasing generalization performance -- averaged over all classes and samples -- has left us with models and regularizers that silently sacrifice performances on some classes. This scenario can become dangerous when deploying a model on downstream tasks e.g. an Imagenet pre-trained resnet50 deployed on INaturalist sees its performances fall from $70\%$ to $30\%$ on class \#8889 when introducing random crop DA during the Imagenet pre-training phase. Those results demonstrate that designing novel regularizers without class-dependent bias remains an open research question.
summary: Regularization is a fundamental technique to prevent over-fitting and to improve generalization performances by constraining a model's complexity. Current Deep Networks heavily rely on regularizers such as Data-Augmentation (DA) or weight-decay, and employ structural risk minimization, i.e. cross-validation, to select the optimal regularization hyper-parameters. In this study, we demonstrate that techniques such as DA or weight decay produce a model with a reduced complexity that is unfair across classes. The optimal amount of DA or weight decay found from cross-validation leads to disastrous model performances on some classes e.g. on Imagenet with a resnet50, the "barn spider" classification test accuracy falls from $68\%$ to $46\%$ only by introducing random crop DA during training. Even more surprising, such performance drop also appears when introducing uninformative regularization techniques such as weight decay. Those results demonstrate that our search for ever increasing generalization performance -- averaged over all classes and samples -- has left us with models and regularizers that silently sacrifice performances on some classes. This scenario can become dangerous when deploying a model on downstream tasks e.g. an Imagenet pre-trained resnet50 deployed on INaturalist sees its performances fall from $70\%$ to $30\%$ on class \#8889 when introducing random crop DA during the Imagenet pre-training phase. Those results demonstrate that designing novel regularizers without class-dependent bias remains an open research question.
abstract_zh: 正则化是防止过度拟合并通过限制模型复杂性来提高泛化性能的基本技术。当前的深度网络严重依赖数据增强（DA）或权重衰减等正则化器，并采用结构风险最小化（即交叉验证）来选择最佳正则化超参数。在这项研究中，我们证明了 DA 或权重衰减等技术可以产生一个降低复杂性的模型，这在不同类别之间是不公平的。从交叉验证中发现的最佳 DA 量或权重衰减会导致某些类别上的灾难性模型性能，例如在具有 resnet50 的 Imagenet 上，仅通过在训练期间引入随机裁剪 DA，“谷仓蜘蛛”分类测试精度从 $68\%$ 下降到 $46\%$。更令人惊讶的是，当引入无信息的正则化技术（例如权重衰减）时，也会出现这种性能下降。这些结果表明，我们对不断提高的泛化性能（对所有类和样本进行平均）的追求给我们留下了默默牺牲某些类性能的模型和正则化器。当在下游任务上部署模型时，这种情况可能会变得危险，例如在 Imagenet 预训练阶段引入随机裁剪 DA 时，部署在 INaturalist 上的 Imagenet 预训练 resnet50 的性能在 #8889 类上从 $70\%$ 下降到 $30\%$。这些结果表明，设计没有类别依赖偏差的新型正则化器仍然是一个悬而未决的研究问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了正则化和数据增强技术对不同类别性能的影响，发现这些技术可能导致某些类别的性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习模型依赖正则化技术（如数据增强和权重衰减）来防止过拟合，但未充分考虑其对不同类别的公平性影响，可能导致某些类别性能受损。
AI.method: 通过在ImageNet和INaturalist数据集上训练ResNet50模型，实验分析数据增强和权重衰减对不同类别的影响，并评估跨任务部署时的性能变化。
AI.result: 实验发现，使用随机裁剪数据增强会使ImageNet中'barn spider'类准确率从68%降至46%，权重衰减同样导致性能下降；预训练模型在下游任务中特定类别的准确率从70%骤降至30%。
AI.conclusion: 现有正则化技术存在类别依赖性偏差，设计无类别偏见的新型正则化方法仍是开放性研究问题。

authors_text: Narayana Darapaneni,Ashish Ranjan,Dany Bright,Devendra Trivedi,Ketul Kumar,Vivek Kumar,Anwesh Reddy Paduri
title: Pneumonia Detection in Chest X-Rays using Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用神经网络进行胸部 X 光肺炎检测
abstract: With the advancement in AI, deep learning techniques are widely used to design robust classification models in several areas such as medical diagnosis tasks in which it achieves good performance. In this paper, we have proposed the CNN model (Convolutional Neural Network) for the classification of Chest X-ray images for Radiological Society of North America Pneumonia (RSNA) datasets. The study also tries to achieve the same RSNA benchmark results using the limited computational resources by trying out various approaches to the methodologies that have been implemented in recent years. The proposed method is based on a non-complex CNN and the use of transfer learning algorithms like Xception, InceptionV3/V4, EfficientNetB7. Along with this, the study also tries to achieve the same RSNA benchmark results using the limited computational resources by trying out various approaches to the methodologies that have been implemented in recent years. The RSNA benchmark MAP score is 0.25, but using the Mask RCNN model on a stratified sample of 3017 along with image augmentation gave a MAP score of 0.15. Meanwhile, the YoloV3 without any hyperparameter tuning gave the MAP score of 0.32 but still, the loss keeps decreasing. Running the model for a greater number of iterations can give better results.
summary: With the advancement in AI, deep learning techniques are widely used to design robust classification models in several areas such as medical diagnosis tasks in which it achieves good performance. In this paper, we have proposed the CNN model (Convolutional Neural Network) for the classification of Chest X-ray images for Radiological Society of North America Pneumonia (RSNA) datasets. The study also tries to achieve the same RSNA benchmark results using the limited computational resources by trying out various approaches to the methodologies that have been implemented in recent years. The proposed method is based on a non-complex CNN and the use of transfer learning algorithms like Xception, InceptionV3/V4, EfficientNetB7. Along with this, the study also tries to achieve the same RSNA benchmark results using the limited computational resources by trying out various approaches to the methodologies that have been implemented in recent years. The RSNA benchmark MAP score is 0.25, but using the Mask RCNN model on a stratified sample of 3017 along with image augmentation gave a MAP score of 0.15. Meanwhile, the YoloV3 without any hyperparameter tuning gave the MAP score of 0.32 but still, the loss keeps decreasing. Running the model for a greater number of iterations can give better results.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能的进步，深度学习技术被广泛用于设计鲁棒的分类模型，在医疗诊断任务等多个领域取得了良好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 CNN 模型（卷积神经网络），用于对北美放射学会肺炎 (RSNA) 数据集的胸部 X 射线图像进行分类。该研究还尝试通过尝试近年来实施的各种方法，使用有限的计算资源获得相同的 RSNA 基准结果。所提出的方法基于非复杂的 CNN 并使用 Xception、InceptionV3/V4、EfficientNetB7 等迁移学习算法。除此之外，该研究还尝试通过尝试近年来实施的各种方法，使用有限的计算资源获得相同的 RSNA 基准结果。 RSNA 基准 MAP 得分为 0.25，但在 3017 个分层样本上使用 Mask RCNN 模型以及图像增强后，MAP 得分为 0.15。与此同时，没有任何超参数调整的 YoloV3 的 MAP 得分为 0.32，但损失仍在不断下降。运行模型进行更多次迭代可以得到更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）和迁移学习算法（如Xception、InceptionV3/V4、EfficientNetB7）对北美放射学会（RSNA）肺炎数据集中的胸部X光图像进行分类，以检测肺炎。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能的发展，深度学习在医疗诊断中表现出色。本文旨在利用有限计算资源，通过多种方法实现RSNA肺炎检测基准结果，提升肺炎分类的准确性。
AI.method: 采用非复杂CNN模型及迁移学习算法（Xception、InceptionV3/V4、EfficientNetB7），结合Mask RCNN和YoloV3模型，并通过图像增强和分层抽样优化性能。
AI.result: RSNA基准MAP得分为0.25，Mask RCNN在3017张分层样本上得分为0.15，YoloV3未调参下得分为0.32但损失持续下降，表明进一步训练可能提升效果。
AI.conclusion: YoloV3在未调参情况下表现优于基准，但需更多迭代优化。研究强调了在有限资源下通过模型调整和数据增强提升肺炎检测性能的潜力。

Running the model for a greater number of iterations can give better results. 随着人工智能的进步，深度学习技术被广泛用于设计鲁棒的分类模型，在医疗诊断任务等多个领域取得了良好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 CNN 模型（卷积神经网络），用于对北美放射学会肺炎 (RSNA) 数据集的胸部 X 射线图像进行分类。该研究还尝试通过尝试近年来实施的各种方法，使用有限的计算资源获得相同的 RSNA 基准结果。所提出的方法基于非复杂的 CNN 并使用 Xception、InceptionV3/V4、EfficientNetB7 等迁移学习算法。除此之外，该研究还尝试通过尝试近年来实施的各种方法，使用有限的计算资源获得相同的 RSNA 基准结果。 RSNA 基准 MAP 得分为 0.25，但在 3017 个分层样本上使用 Mask RCNN 模型以及图像增强后，MAP 得分为 0.15。与此同时，没有任何超参数调整的 YoloV3 的 MAP 得分为 0.32，但损失仍在不断下降。运行模型进行更多次迭代可以得到更好的结果。 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）和迁移学习算法（如Xception、InceptionV3/V4、EfficientNetB7）对北美放射学会（RSNA）肺炎数据集中的胸部X光图像进行分类，以检测肺炎。 Narayana Darapaneni,Ashish Ranjan,Dany Bright,Devendra Trivedi,Ketul Kumar,Vivek Kumar,Anwesh Reddy Paduri eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jianwei Yang,Chunyuan Li,Pengchuan Zhang,Bin Xiao,Ce Liu,Lu Yuan,Jianfeng Gao
title: Unified Contrastive Learning in Image-Text-Label Space
title_zh: 图像-文本-标签空间中的统一对比学习
abstract: Visual recognition is recently learned via either supervised learning on human-annotated image-label data or language-image contrastive learning with webly-crawled image-text pairs. While supervised learning may result in a more discriminative representation, language-image pretraining shows unprecedented zero-shot recognition capability, largely due to the different properties of data sources and learning objectives. In this work, we introduce a new formulation by combining the two data sources into a common image-text-label space. In this space, we propose a new learning paradigm, called Unified Contrastive Learning (UniCL) with a single learning objective to seamlessly prompt the synergy of two data types. Extensive experiments show that our UniCL is an effective way of learning semantically rich yet discriminative representations, universally for image recognition in zero-shot, linear-probe, fully finetuning and transfer learning scenarios. Particularly, it attains gains up to 9.2% and 14.5% in average on zero-shot recognition benchmarks over the language-image contrastive learning and supervised learning methods, respectively. In linear probe setting, it also boosts the performance over the two methods by 7.3% and 3.4%, respectively. Our study also indicates that UniCL stand-alone is a good learner on pure image-label data, rivaling the supervised learning methods across three image classification datasets and two types of vision backbones, ResNet and Swin Transformer. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/UniCL.
summary: Visual recognition is recently learned via either supervised learning on human-annotated image-label data or language-image contrastive learning with webly-crawled image-text pairs. While supervised learning may result in a more discriminative representation, language-image pretraining shows unprecedented zero-shot recognition capability, largely due to the different properties of data sources and learning objectives. In this work, we introduce a new formulation by combining the two data sources into a common image-text-label space. In this space, we propose a new learning paradigm, called Unified Contrastive Learning (UniCL) with a single learning objective to seamlessly prompt the synergy of two data types. Extensive experiments show that our UniCL is an effective way of learning semantically rich yet discriminative representations, universally for image recognition in zero-shot, linear-probe, fully finetuning and transfer learning scenarios. Particularly, it attains gains up to 9.2% and 14.5% in average on zero-shot recognition benchmarks over the language-image contrastive learning and supervised learning methods, respectively. In linear probe setting, it also boosts the performance over the two methods by 7.3% and 3.4%, respectively. Our study also indicates that UniCL stand-alone is a good learner on pure image-label data, rivaling the supervised learning methods across three image classification datasets and two types of vision backbones, ResNet and Swin Transformer. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/UniCL.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉识别是通过对人类注释的图像标签数据进行监督学习或通过网络爬行的图像文本对进行语言图像对比学习来学习的。虽然监督学习可能会产生更具辨别力的表示，但语言图像预训练显示出前所未有的零样本识别能力，这很大程度上是由于数据源和学习目标的不同属性。在这项工作中，我们通过将两个数据源组合到一个公共的图像-文本-标签空间中，引入了一种新的公式。在这个领域，我们提出了一种新的学习范式，称为统一对比学习（UniCL），其单一学习目标可以无缝促进两种数据类型的协同作用。大量实验表明，我们的 UniCL 是学习语义丰富但具有辨别力的表示的有效方法，普遍适用于零样本、线性探测、完全微调和迁移学习场景中的图像识别。特别是，与语言图像对比学习和监督学习方法相比，它在零样本识别基准上的平均增益分别高达 9.2% 和 14.5%。在线性探针设置中，它还比两种方法分别提高了 7.3% 和 3.4% 的性能。我们的研究还表明，UniCL 独立在纯图像标签数据上是一个很好的学习器，可以与三个图像分类数据集和两种视觉主干（ResNet 和 Swin Transformer）上的监督学习方法相媲美。代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/UniCL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的对比学习方法（UniCL），通过将图像-标签数据和图像-文本对整合到共同的图像-文本-标签空间中，提升视觉识别任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习在图像-标签数据上表现优异但缺乏零样本能力，而语言-图像对比学习虽具零样本优势但依赖大规模文本数据。本文旨在结合两者优势，构建更通用的表示学习框架。
AI.method: 提出UniCL框架，在统一的图像-文本-标签空间中设计单目标对比学习策略，通过联合优化图像-标签对和图像-文本对的表示，实现跨模态信息的协同学习。
AI.result: 在零样本识别任务中，UniCL相较语言-图像对比学习和监督学习分别提升9.2%和14.5%；线性探针设置下提升7.3%和3.4%。且UniCL在纯图像-标签数据上可媲美监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: UniCL通过统一多源数据学习，实现了更丰富且判别性强的表示，在多种视觉任务中表现优异，为跨模态预训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jin Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Jungin Park,Dongbo Min,Kwanghoon Sohn
title: Pin the Memory: Learning to Generalize Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 固定记忆：学习概括语义分割
abstract: The rise of deep neural networks has led to several breakthroughs for semantic segmentation. In spite of this, a model trained on source domain often fails to work properly in new challenging domains, that is directly concerned with the generalization capability of the model. In this paper, we present a novel memory-guided domain generalization method for semantic segmentation based on meta-learning framework. Especially, our method abstracts the conceptual knowledge of semantic classes into categorical memory which is constant beyond the domains. Upon the meta-learning concept, we repeatedly train memory-guided networks and simulate virtual test to 1) learn how to memorize a domain-agnostic and distinct information of classes and 2) offer an externally settled memory as a class-guidance to reduce the ambiguity of representation in the test data of arbitrary unseen domain. To this end, we also propose memory divergence and feature cohesion losses, which encourage to learn memory reading and update processes for category-aware domain generalization. Extensive experiments for semantic segmentation demonstrate the superior generalization capability of our method over state-of-the-art works on various benchmarks.
summary: The rise of deep neural networks has led to several breakthroughs for semantic segmentation. In spite of this, a model trained on source domain often fails to work properly in new challenging domains, that is directly concerned with the generalization capability of the model. In this paper, we present a novel memory-guided domain generalization method for semantic segmentation based on meta-learning framework. Especially, our method abstracts the conceptual knowledge of semantic classes into categorical memory which is constant beyond the domains. Upon the meta-learning concept, we repeatedly train memory-guided networks and simulate virtual test to 1) learn how to memorize a domain-agnostic and distinct information of classes and 2) offer an externally settled memory as a class-guidance to reduce the ambiguity of representation in the test data of arbitrary unseen domain. To this end, we also propose memory divergence and feature cohesion losses, which encourage to learn memory reading and update processes for category-aware domain generalization. Extensive experiments for semantic segmentation demonstrate the superior generalization capability of our method over state-of-the-art works on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的兴起为语义分割带来了多项突破。尽管如此，在源域上训练的模型通常无法在新的具有挑战性的领域中正常工作，这直接关系到模型的泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于元学习框架的新型记忆引导域泛化方法，用于语义分割。特别是，我们的方法将语义类的概念知识抽象为类别记忆，该记忆在领域之外是恒定的。根据元学习的概念，我们反复训练记忆引导网络并模拟虚拟测试，以 1）学习如何记忆与领域无关且不同的类信息；2）提供外部固定的记忆作为类指导，以减少任意未见领域的测试数据中表示的模糊性。为此，我们还提出了记忆发散和特征内聚损失，这鼓励学习记忆读取和更新过程以进行类别感知领域泛化。语义分割的大量实验证明了我们的方法比各种基准上最先进的方法具有优越的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习框架的内存引导领域泛化方法，用于改进语义分割模型在新领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在语义分割领域取得进展，但模型在源域训练后难以适应新领域，亟需提升模型的领域泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过元学习框架抽象语义类别的概念性知识为跨领域的分类内存，结合记忆分歧损失和特征凝聚损失，指导模型学习领域无关的类别信息并减少测试数据表示的模糊性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在语义分割任务的领域泛化能力优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 内存引导的领域泛化方法能有效提升语义分割模型在未知领域的适应性，为跨领域学习提供新思路。

To this end, we also propose memory divergence and feature cohesion losses, which encourage to learn memory reading and update processes for category-aware domain generalization. Extensive experiments for semantic segmentation demonstrate the superior generalization capability of our method over state-of-the-art works on various benchmarks. 深度神经网络的兴起为语义分割带来了多项突破。尽管如此，在源域上训练的模型通常无法在新的具有挑战性的领域中正常工作，这直接关系到模型的泛化能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于元学习框架的新型记忆引导域泛化方法，用于语义分割。特别是，我们的方法将语义类的概念知识抽象为类别记忆，该记忆在领域之外是恒定的。根据元学习的概念，我们反复训练记忆引导网络并模拟虚拟测试，以 1）学习如何记忆与领域无关且不同的类信息；2）提供外部固定的记忆作为类指导，以减少任意未见领域的测试数据中表示的模糊性。为此，我们还提出了记忆发散和特征内聚损失，这鼓励学习记忆读取和更新过程以进行类别感知领域泛化。语义分割的大量实验证明了我们的方法比各种基准上最先进的方法具有优越的泛化能力。 本文提出一种基于元学习框架的内存引导领域泛化方法，用于改进语义分割模型在新领域的泛化能力。 Jin Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Jungin Park,Dongbo Min,Kwanghoon Sohn cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Carl Qi,Pieter Abbeel,Aditya Grover
title: Imitating, Fast and Slow: Robust learning from demonstrations via decision-time planning
title_zh: 模仿，快与慢：通过决策时规划从演示中进行稳健学习
abstract: The goal of imitation learning is to mimic expert behavior from demonstrations, without access to an explicit reward signal. A popular class of approach infers the (unknown) reward function via inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) followed by maximizing this reward function via reinforcement learning (RL). The policies learned via these approaches are however very brittle in practice and deteriorate quickly even with small test-time perturbations due to compounding errors. We propose Imitation with Planning at Test-time (IMPLANT), a new meta-algorithm for imitation learning that utilizes decision-time planning to correct for compounding errors of any base imitation policy. In contrast to existing approaches, we retain both the imitation policy and the rewards model at decision-time, thereby benefiting from the learning signal of the two components. Empirically, we demonstrate that IMPLANT significantly outperforms benchmark imitation learning approaches on standard control environments and excels at zero-shot generalization when subject to challenging perturbations in test-time dynamics.
summary: The goal of imitation learning is to mimic expert behavior from demonstrations, without access to an explicit reward signal. A popular class of approach infers the (unknown) reward function via inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) followed by maximizing this reward function via reinforcement learning (RL). The policies learned via these approaches are however very brittle in practice and deteriorate quickly even with small test-time perturbations due to compounding errors. We propose Imitation with Planning at Test-time (IMPLANT), a new meta-algorithm for imitation learning that utilizes decision-time planning to correct for compounding errors of any base imitation policy. In contrast to existing approaches, we retain both the imitation policy and the rewards model at decision-time, thereby benefiting from the learning signal of the two components. Empirically, we demonstrate that IMPLANT significantly outperforms benchmark imitation learning approaches on standard control environments and excels at zero-shot generalization when subject to challenging perturbations in test-time dynamics.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习的目标是模仿专家在演示中的行为，而无需获得明确的奖励信号。一类流行的方法是通过逆强化学习 (IRL) 推断（未知）奖励函数，然后通过强化学习 (RL) 最大化该奖励函数。然而，通过这些方法学到的策略在实践中非常脆弱，即使由于复合错误而导致测试时的小扰动，也会很快恶化。我们提出了测试时规划模仿（IMPLANT），这是一种用于模仿学习的新元算法，它利用决策时规划来纠正任何基本模仿策略的复合错误。与现有方法相比，我们在决策时保留了模仿策略和奖励模型，从而受益于这两个组件的学习信号。根据经验，我们证明 IMPLANT 在标准控制环境中显着优于基准模仿学习方法，并且在测试时动态中受到挑战性扰动时，在零样本泛化方面表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的模仿学习方法IMPLANT，通过决策时规划提高鲁棒性，解决现有方法在测试时微小扰动下性能快速下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法（如逆强化学习+强化学习）在测试时对微小扰动敏感，因累积误差导致性能急剧下降，缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出IMPLANT元算法，在决策时结合模仿策略与奖励模型进行规划，利用两者的学习信号修正基础策略的累积误差。
AI.result: 在标准控制环境中显著优于基准模仿学习方法，并在测试时动态扰动下表现出优秀的零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: IMPLANT通过决策时规划有效提升了模仿学习的鲁棒性，为复杂环境下的策略优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Till Hofmann,Stefan Schupp
title: Controlling Golog Programs against MTL Constraints
title_zh: 根据 MTL 约束控制 Golog 程序
abstract: While Golog is an expressive programming language to control the high-level behavior of a robot, it is often tedious to use on a real robotic system. On an actual robot, the user needs to consider low-level details, such as enabling and disabling hardware components, e.g., a camera to detect objects for grasping. In other words, high-level actions usually pose implicit temporal constraints on the low-level platform, which are typically independent of the concrete program to be executed. In this paper, we propose to make these constraints explicit by modeling them as MTL formulas, which enforce the execution of certain low-level platform operations in addition to the main program. Based on results from timed automata controller synthesis, we describe a method to synthesize a controller that executes both the high-level program and the low-level platform operations concurrently in order to satisfy the MTL specification. This allows the user to focus on the high-level behavior without the need to consider low-level operations. We present an extension to Golog by clocks together with the required theoretical foundations as well as decidability results.
summary: While Golog is an expressive programming language to control the high-level behavior of a robot, it is often tedious to use on a real robotic system. On an actual robot, the user needs to consider low-level details, such as enabling and disabling hardware components, e.g., a camera to detect objects for grasping. In other words, high-level actions usually pose implicit temporal constraints on the low-level platform, which are typically independent of the concrete program to be executed. In this paper, we propose to make these constraints explicit by modeling them as MTL formulas, which enforce the execution of certain low-level platform operations in addition to the main program. Based on results from timed automata controller synthesis, we describe a method to synthesize a controller that executes both the high-level program and the low-level platform operations concurrently in order to satisfy the MTL specification. This allows the user to focus on the high-level behavior without the need to consider low-level operations. We present an extension to Golog by clocks together with the required theoretical foundations as well as decidability results.
abstract_zh: 虽然 Golog 是一种用于控制机器人高级行为的富有表现力的编程语言，但在真实的机器人系统上使用它通常很乏味。在实际的机器人上，用户需要考虑低级细节，例如启用和禁用硬件组件，例如用于检测抓取对象的相机。换句话说，高级操作通常对低级平台造成隐式时间约束，这些约束通常独立于要执行的具体程序。在本文中，我们建议通过将这些约束建模为 MTL 公式来明确这些约束，除了主程序之外，还强制执行某些低级平台操作。基于定时自动机控制器综合的结果，我们描述了一种综合控制器的方法，该控制器同时执行高级程序和低级平台操作以满足 MTL 规范。这使得用户可以专注于高级行为，而无需考虑低级操作。我们通过时钟提出了 Golog 的扩展以及所需的理论基础以及可判定性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Golog程序的低层硬件操作约束显式化为MTL公式，并通过控制器合成方法实现高低层任务的并发执行。
AI.motivation: Golog语言在实际机器人系统中需处理大量低层硬件细节（如相机控制），导致高层程序开发复杂且易出错，需将隐式时序约束显式化以提升开发效率。
AI.method: 基于时间自动机控制器合成理论，将低层操作约束建模为MTL公式，设计并发执行控制器，并扩展Golog语言支持时钟机制与相关理论证明。
AI.result: 实现了满足MTL约束的控制器合成方法，使用户可专注于高层逻辑设计，同时确保低层硬件操作的时序正确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形式化约束显式化和控制器合成，有效解耦了Golog高层程序与低层硬件操作，为机器人控制提供了理论支持与工程实现方案。

authors_text: Efthymios Tzinis,Gordon Wichern,Aswin Subramanian,Paris Smaragdis,Jonathan Le Roux
title: Heterogeneous Target Speech Separation
title_zh: 异构目标语音分离
abstract: We introduce a new paradigm for single-channel target source separation where the sources of interest can be distinguished using non-mutually exclusive concepts (e.g., loudness, gender, language, spatial location, etc). Our proposed heterogeneous separation framework can seamlessly leverage datasets with large distribution shifts and learn cross-domain representations under a variety of concepts used as conditioning. Our experiments show that training separation models with heterogeneous conditions facilitates the generalization to new concepts with unseen out-of-domain data while also performing substantially higher than single-domain specialist models. Notably, such training leads to more robust learning of new harder source separation discriminative concepts and can yield improvements over permutation invariant training with oracle source selection. We analyze the intrinsic behavior of source separation training with heterogeneous metadata and propose ways to alleviate emerging problems with challenging separation conditions. We release the collection of preparation recipes for all datasets used to further promote research towards this challenging task.
summary: We introduce a new paradigm for single-channel target source separation where the sources of interest can be distinguished using non-mutually exclusive concepts (e.g., loudness, gender, language, spatial location, etc). Our proposed heterogeneous separation framework can seamlessly leverage datasets with large distribution shifts and learn cross-domain representations under a variety of concepts used as conditioning. Our experiments show that training separation models with heterogeneous conditions facilitates the generalization to new concepts with unseen out-of-domain data while also performing substantially higher than single-domain specialist models. Notably, such training leads to more robust learning of new harder source separation discriminative concepts and can yield improvements over permutation invariant training with oracle source selection. We analyze the intrinsic behavior of source separation training with heterogeneous metadata and propose ways to alleviate emerging problems with challenging separation conditions. We release the collection of preparation recipes for all datasets used to further promote research towards this challenging task.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的单通道目标源分离范例，其中可以使用非互斥的概念（例如响度、性别、语言、空间位置等）来区分感兴趣的源。我们提出的异构分离框架可以无缝地利用具有大分布变化的数据集，并在用作条件的各种概念下学习跨域表示。我们的实验表明，在异构条件下训练分离模型有助于利用未见过的域外数据泛化新概念，同时性能也远高于单域专业模型。值得注意的是，这种训练可以更稳健地学习新的更难的源分离判别概念，并且可以比使用预言机源选择的排列不变训练产生改进。我们分析了使用异构元数据进行源分离训练的内在行为，并提出了缓解具有挑战性的分离条件下出现的问题的方法。我们发布了所有数据集的准备方法集合，用于进一步促进对这一具有挑战性的任务的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的单通道目标源分离范式，利用非互斥概念（如响度、性别、语言等）区分声源，并通过异构条件学习跨领域表示以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖互斥概念或单一领域数据，难以处理分布偏移和新概念的泛化问题，需开发更鲁棒的异构条件学习框架。
AI.method: 设计异构分离框架，整合多分布数据集与多样化条件概念，通过异构条件训练学习跨域表示，并分析训练行为以解决分离难题。
AI.result: 实验表明，异构条件训练显著优于单领域模型和置换不变训练，在新概念和困难分离任务上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 异构框架提升了模型对新概念的泛化能力和鲁棒性，释放数据集预处理方案以推动相关研究。

search_text: Heterogeneous Target Speech Separation 异构目标语音分离 We introduce a new paradigm for single-channel target source separation where the sources of interest can be distinguished using non-mutually exclusive concepts (e.g., loudness, gender, language, spatial location, etc). Our proposed heterogeneous separation framework can seamlessly leverage datasets with large distribution shifts and learn cross-domain representations under a variety of concepts used as conditioning. Our experiments show that training separation models with heterogeneous conditions facilitates the generalization to new concepts with unseen out-of-domain data while also performing substantially higher than single-domain specialist models. Notably, such training leads to more robust learning of new harder source separation discriminative concepts and can yield improvements over permutation invariant training with oracle source selection. We analyze the intrinsic behavior of source separation training with heterogeneous metadata and propose ways to alleviate emerging problems with challenging separation conditions. We release the collection of preparation recipes for all datasets used to further promote research towards this challenging task. 我们引入了一种新的单通道目标源分离范例，其中可以使用非互斥的概念（例如响度、性别、语言、空间位置等）来区分感兴趣的源。我们提出的异构分离框架可以无缝地利用具有大分布变化的数据集，并在用作条件的各种概念下学习跨域表示。我们的实验表明，在异构条件下训练分离模型有助于利用未见过的域外数据泛化新概念，同时性能也远高于单域专业模型。值得注意的是，这种训练可以更稳健地学习新的更难的源分离判别概念，并且可以比使用预言机源选择的排列不变训练产生改进。我们分析了使用异构元数据进行源分离训练的内在行为，并提出了缓解具有挑战性的分离条件下出现的问题的方法。我们发布了所有数据集的准备方法集合，用于进一步促进对这一具有挑战性的任务的研究。 本文提出了一种新的单通道目标源分离范式，利用非互斥概念（如响度、性别、语言等）区分声源，并通过异构条件学习跨领域表示以提升模型泛化能力。 Efthymios Tzinis,Gordon Wichern,Aswin Subramanian,Paris Smaragdis,Jonathan Le Roux cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Norman Müller,Andrea Simonelli,Lorenzo Porzi,Samuel Rota Bulò,Matthias Nießner,Peter Kontschieder
title: AutoRF: Learning 3D Object Radiance Fields from Single View Observations
title_zh: AutoRF：从单视图观察中学习 3D 物体辐射场
abstract: We introduce AutoRF - a new approach for learning neural 3D object representations where each object in the training set is observed by only a single view. This setting is in stark contrast to the majority of existing works that leverage multiple views of the same object, employ explicit priors during training, or require pixel-perfect annotations. To address this challenging setting, we propose to learn a normalized, object-centric representation whose embedding describes and disentangles shape, appearance, and pose. Each encoding provides well-generalizable, compact information about the object of interest, which is decoded in a single-shot into a new target view, thus enabling novel view synthesis. We further improve the reconstruction quality by optimizing shape and appearance codes at test time by fitting the representation tightly to the input image. In a series of experiments, we show that our method generalizes well to unseen objects, even across different datasets of challenging real-world street scenes such as nuScenes, KITTI, and Mapillary Metropolis.
summary: We introduce AutoRF - a new approach for learning neural 3D object representations where each object in the training set is observed by only a single view. This setting is in stark contrast to the majority of existing works that leverage multiple views of the same object, employ explicit priors during training, or require pixel-perfect annotations. To address this challenging setting, we propose to learn a normalized, object-centric representation whose embedding describes and disentangles shape, appearance, and pose. Each encoding provides well-generalizable, compact information about the object of interest, which is decoded in a single-shot into a new target view, thus enabling novel view synthesis. We further improve the reconstruction quality by optimizing shape and appearance codes at test time by fitting the representation tightly to the input image. In a series of experiments, we show that our method generalizes well to unseen objects, even across different datasets of challenging real-world street scenes such as nuScenes, KITTI, and Mapillary Metropolis.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 AutoRF - 一种学习神经 3D 对象表示的新方法，其中训练集中的每个对象仅通过单个视图进行观察。这种设置与大多数现有作品形成鲜明对比，这些作品利用同一对象的多个视图，在训练期间采用明确的先验，或需要像素完美的注释。为了解决这个具有挑战性的设置，我们建议学习一种标准化的、以对象为中心的表示，其嵌入描述和解开形状、外观和姿势。每种编码都提供有关感兴趣对象的通用且紧凑的信息，这些信息在单次解码中被解码为新的目标视图，从而实现新颖的视图合成。我们通过在测试时将表示紧密地拟合到输入图像来优化形状和外观代码，进一步提高重建质量。在一系列实验中，我们表明我们的方法可以很好地推广到看不见的物体，甚至可以跨越具有挑战性的现实世界街道场景的不同数据集，例如 nuScenes、KITTI 和 Mapillary Metropolis。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoRF方法，从单视角观察中学习3D物体辐射场，实现新视角合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多视角数据或复杂先验，而实际场景中单视角数据更常见，需解决单视角下3D重建与泛化问题。
AI.method: 学习归一化的物体中心表示，解耦形状、外观和姿态，并通过测试时优化形状/外观代码提升重建质量。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、KITTI等真实场景数据集上验证了方法对未见物体的良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AutoRF在单视角条件下实现了高质量3D重建与新视角合成，适用于复杂现实场景。

authors_text: Tal Golan,Matthew Siegelman,Nikolaus Kriegeskorte,Christopher Baldassano
title: Testing the limits of natural language models for predicting human language judgments
title_zh: 测试自然语言模型预测人类语言判断的极限
abstract: Neural network language models can serve as computational hypotheses about how humans process language. We compared the model-human consistency of diverse language models using a novel experimental approach: controversial sentence pairs. For each controversial sentence pair, two language models disagree about which sentence is more likely to occur in natural text. Considering nine language models (including n-gram, recurrent neural networks, and transformer models), we created hundreds of such controversial sentence pairs by either selecting sentences from a corpus or synthetically optimizing sentence pairs to be highly controversial. Human subjects then provided judgments indicating for each pair which of the two sentences is more likely. Controversial sentence pairs proved highly effective at revealing model failures and identifying models that aligned most closely with human judgments. The most human-consistent model tested was GPT-2, although experiments also revealed significant shortcomings of its alignment with human perception.
summary: Neural network language models can serve as computational hypotheses about how humans process language. We compared the model-human consistency of diverse language models using a novel experimental approach: controversial sentence pairs. For each controversial sentence pair, two language models disagree about which sentence is more likely to occur in natural text. Considering nine language models (including n-gram, recurrent neural networks, and transformer models), we created hundreds of such controversial sentence pairs by either selecting sentences from a corpus or synthetically optimizing sentence pairs to be highly controversial. Human subjects then provided judgments indicating for each pair which of the two sentences is more likely. Controversial sentence pairs proved highly effective at revealing model failures and identifying models that aligned most closely with human judgments. The most human-consistent model tested was GPT-2, although experiments also revealed significant shortcomings of its alignment with human perception.
abstract_zh: 神经网络语言模型可以作为关于人类如何处理语言的计算假设。我们使用一种新颖的实验方法来比较不同语言模型的模型与人类的一致性：有争议的句子对。对于每个有争议的句子对，两种语言模型对于哪个句子更有可能出现在自然文本中存在分歧。考虑到九种语言模型（包括 n-gram、循环神经网络和 Transformer 模型），我们通过从语料库中选择句子或综合优化具有高度争议性的句子对，创建了数百个此类有争议的句子对。然后，人类受试者提供判断，表明每对句子中哪一个更有可能。事实证明，有争议的句子对在揭示模型失败和识别与人类判断最一致的模型方面非常有效。测试的与人类最一致的模型是 GPT-2，尽管实验也揭示了其与人类感知一致的重大缺陷。

AI.tldr: 通过争议性句子对评估不同语言模型与人类语言判断的一致性，识别模型缺陷及与人类认知的对齐程度。
AI.motivation: 验证语言模型是否能有效模拟人类语言处理机制，发现模型预测与人类判断的潜在差异及局限性。
AI.method: 构建争议性句子对（模型间预测冲突的句子），结合语料库筛选与合成优化，邀请人类被试判断句子自然性，并对比模型预测与人类判断的一致性。
AI.result: GPT-2在模型-人类一致性上表现最佳，但存在显著与人类感知不符的预测缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 争议性句子对是评估模型缺陷的有效工具，当前模型在预测人类语言判断时仍存在系统性偏差，需进一步优化对齐策略。

Human subjects then provided judgments indicating for each pair which of the two sentences is more likely. Controversial sentence pairs proved highly effective at revealing model failures and identifying models that aligned most closely with human judgments. The most human-consistent model tested was GPT-2, although experiments also revealed significant shortcomings of its alignment with human perception. 神经网络语言模型可以作为关于人类如何处理语言的计算假设。我们使用一种新颖的实验方法来比较不同语言模型的模型与人类的一致性：有争议的句子对。对于每个有争议的句子对，两种语言模型对于哪个句子更有可能出现在自然文本中存在分歧。考虑到九种语言模型（包括 n-gram、循环神经网络和 Transformer 模型），我们通过从语料库中选择句子或综合优化具有高度争议性的句子对，创建了数百个此类有争议的句子对。然后，人类受试者提供判断，表明每对句子中哪一个更有可能。事实证明，有争议的句子对在揭示模型失败和识别与人类判断最一致的模型方面非常有效。测试的与人类最一致的模型是 GPT-2，尽管实验也揭示了其与人类感知一致的重大缺陷。 通过争议性句子对评估不同语言模型与人类语言判断的一致性，识别模型缺陷及与人类认知的对齐程度。 Tal Golan,Matthew Siegelman,Nikolaus Kriegeskorte,Christopher Baldassano cs.CL,cs.AI,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Nihal V. Nayak,Peilin Yu,Stephen H. Bach
title: Learning to Compose Soft Prompts for Compositional Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 学习为组合零样本学习编写软提示
abstract: We introduce compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP. We develop CSP for compositional zero-shot learning, the task of predicting unseen attribute-object compositions (e.g., old cat and young tiger). VLMs have a flexible text encoder that can represent arbitrary classes as natural language prompts but they often underperform task-specific architectures on the compositional zero-shot benchmark datasets. CSP treats the attributes and objects that define classes as learnable tokens of vocabulary. During training, the vocabulary is tuned to recognize classes that compose tokens in multiple ways (e.g., old cat and white cat). At test time, we recompose the learned attribute-object vocabulary in new combinations to recognize novel classes. We show that CSP outperforms the CLIP on benchmark datasets by an average of 10.9 percentage points on AUC. CSP also outperforms CoOp, a soft prompting method that fine-tunes the prefix context tokens, by an average of 5.8 percentage points on AUC. We perform additional experiments to show that CSP improves generalization to higher-order attribute-attribute-object compositions (e.g., old white cat) and combinations of pretrained attributes and fine-tuned objects. The code is available at https://github.com/BatsResearch/csp.
summary: We introduce compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP. We develop CSP for compositional zero-shot learning, the task of predicting unseen attribute-object compositions (e.g., old cat and young tiger). VLMs have a flexible text encoder that can represent arbitrary classes as natural language prompts but they often underperform task-specific architectures on the compositional zero-shot benchmark datasets. CSP treats the attributes and objects that define classes as learnable tokens of vocabulary. During training, the vocabulary is tuned to recognize classes that compose tokens in multiple ways (e.g., old cat and white cat). At test time, we recompose the learned attribute-object vocabulary in new combinations to recognize novel classes. We show that CSP outperforms the CLIP on benchmark datasets by an average of 10.9 percentage points on AUC. CSP also outperforms CoOp, a soft prompting method that fine-tunes the prefix context tokens, by an average of 5.8 percentage points on AUC. We perform additional experiments to show that CSP improves generalization to higher-order attribute-attribute-object compositions (e.g., old white cat) and combinations of pretrained attributes and fine-tuned objects. The code is available at https://github.com/BatsResearch/csp.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了组合软提示（CSP），这是一种参数高效的学习技术，可提高 CLIP 等大规模预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）的零样本组合性。我们开发了用于组合零样本学习的 CSP，即预测未见过的属性-对象组合（例如，老猫和年轻老虎）的任务。 VLM 具有灵活的文本编码器，可以将任意类表示为自然语言提示，但它们在组合零样本基准数据集上通常表现不佳特定于任务的架构。 CSP 将定义类的属性和对象视为可学习的词汇标记。在训练过程中，词汇表被调整为识别以多种方式组成标记的类（例如，老猫和白猫）。在测试时，我们将学习到的属性-对象词汇重新组合成新的组合，以识别新的类。我们表明，CSP 在基准数据集上的 AUC 平均优于 CLIP 10.9 个百分点。 CSP 的 AUC 性能也优于 CoOp（一种微调前缀上下文标记的软提示方法），平均高出 5.8 个百分点。我们进行了额外的实验，以表明 CSP 提高了对高阶属性-属性-对象组合（例如，老白猫）以及预训练属性和微调对象组合的泛化。该代码可在 https://github.com/BatsResearch/csp 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CSP的参数高效学习技术，用于提升大规模预训练视觉-语言模型在组合零样本学习任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）具有灵活的文本编码器，但其在组合零样本基准数据集上的表现通常弱于任务特定架构，因此需要改进其组合性学习能力。
AI.method: CSP将属性与对象视为可学习的词汇表标记，在训练时调整词汇表以识别多方式组合的类别（如old cat和white cat），测试时通过重组学习到的标记识别新类别。
AI.result: CSP在基准数据集上平均超越CLIP 10.9% AUC，优于软提示方法CoOp 5.8% AUC，并能泛化到更高阶组合（如old white cat）。
AI.conclusion: CSP通过可学习标记的组合有效提升了视觉-语言模型在组合零样本学习中的性能与泛化能力。

authors_text: Karoline da Rocha,José C. M. Bermudez,Elena R. C. Rivero,Márcio H. Costa
title: A Pathology-Based Machine Learning Method to Assist in Epithelial Dysplasia Diagnosis
title_zh: 基于病理学的机器学习方法辅助上皮发育不良诊断
abstract: The Epithelial Dysplasia (ED) is a tissue alteration commonly present in lesions preceding oral cancer, being its presence one of the most important factors in the progression toward carcinoma. This study proposes a method to design a low computational cost classification system to support the detection of dysplastic epithelia, contributing to reduce the variability of pathologist assessments. We employ a multilayer artificial neural network (MLP-ANN) and defining the regions of the epithelium to be assessed based on the knowledge of the pathologist. The performance of the proposed solution was statistically evaluated. The implemented MLP-ANN presented an average accuracy of 87%, with a variability much inferior to that obtained from three trained evaluators. Moreover, the proposed solution led to results which are very close to those obtained using a convolutional neural network (CNN) implemented by transfer learning, with 100 times less computational complexity. In conclusion, our results show that a simple neural network structure can lead to a performance equivalent to that of much more complex structures, which are routinely used in the literature.
summary: The Epithelial Dysplasia (ED) is a tissue alteration commonly present in lesions preceding oral cancer, being its presence one of the most important factors in the progression toward carcinoma. This study proposes a method to design a low computational cost classification system to support the detection of dysplastic epithelia, contributing to reduce the variability of pathologist assessments. We employ a multilayer artificial neural network (MLP-ANN) and defining the regions of the epithelium to be assessed based on the knowledge of the pathologist. The performance of the proposed solution was statistically evaluated. The implemented MLP-ANN presented an average accuracy of 87%, with a variability much inferior to that obtained from three trained evaluators. Moreover, the proposed solution led to results which are very close to those obtained using a convolutional neural network (CNN) implemented by transfer learning, with 100 times less computational complexity. In conclusion, our results show that a simple neural network structure can lead to a performance equivalent to that of much more complex structures, which are routinely used in the literature.
abstract_zh: 上皮发育不良 (ED) 是口腔癌前病变中常见的一种组织改变，它的存在是癌症进展中最重要的因素之一。本研究提出了一种设计低计算成本分类系统的方法，以支持发育不良上皮的检测，有助于减少病理学家评估的变异性。我们采用多层人工神经网络 (MLP-ANN) 并根据病理学家的知识定义要评估的上皮区域。对所提出的解决方案的性能进行了统计评估。实施的 MLP-ANN 的平均准确度为 87%，其变异性远低于三名训练有素的评估者获得的结果。此外，所提出的解决方案产生的结果与使用通过迁移学习实现的卷积神经网络（CNN）获得的结果非常接近，计算复杂度降低了 100 倍。总之，我们的结果表明，简单的神经网络结构可以产生与文献中常规使用的更复杂的结构相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于病理学的机器学习方法，用于辅助诊断上皮异型增生，旨在降低病理学家评估的变异性并提高检测效率。
AI.motivation: 上皮异型增生是口腔癌前病变的重要指标，但病理学家的评估存在较大变异性。传统复杂模型计算成本高，需开发高效且准确的分类系统。
AI.method: 采用多层感知神经网络（MLP-ANN），结合病理学家定义的上皮评估区域，通过统计方法验证性能，并与迁移学习实现的卷积神经网络（CNN）进行对比。
AI.result: MLP-ANN模型平均准确率为87%，评估变异性显著低于三位病理学家，且计算复杂度仅为CNN的1/100，性能接近后者。
AI.conclusion: 简单神经网络结构在计算成本和性能上可替代复杂模型，为临床提供高效可靠的辅助诊断工具。

authors_text: Wei Wang,Longbing Cao
title: Explicit and Implicit Pattern Relation Analysis for Discovering Actionable Negative Sequences
title_zh: 用于发现可操作负序列的显式和隐式模式关系分析
abstract: Real-life events, behaviors and interactions produce sequential data. An important but rarely explored problem is to analyze those nonoccurring (also called negative) yet important sequences, forming negative sequence analysis (NSA). A typical NSA area is to discover negative sequential patterns (NSPs) consisting of important non-occurring and occurring elements and patterns. The limited existing work on NSP mining relies on frequentist and downward closure property-based pattern selection, producing large and highly redundant NSPs, nonactionable for business decision-making. This work makes the first attempt for actionable NSP discovery. It builds an NSP graph representation, quantify both explicit occurrence and implicit non-occurrence-based element and pattern relations, and then discover significant, diverse and informative NSPs in the NSP graph to represent the entire NSP set for discovering actionable NSPs. A DPP-based NSP representation and actionable NSP discovery method EINSP introduces novel and significant contributions for NSA and sequence analysis: (1) it represents NSPs by a determinantal point process (DPP) based graph; (2) it quantifies actionable NSPs in terms of their statistical significance, diversity, and strength of explicit/implicit element/pattern relations; and (3) it models and measures both explicit and implicit element/pattern relations in the DPP-based NSP graph to represent direct and indirect couplings between NSP items, elements and patterns. We substantially analyze the effectiveness of EINSP in terms of various theoretical and empirical aspects including complexity, item/pattern coverage, pattern size and diversity, implicit pattern relation strength, and data factors.
summary: Real-life events, behaviors and interactions produce sequential data. An important but rarely explored problem is to analyze those nonoccurring (also called negative) yet important sequences, forming negative sequence analysis (NSA). A typical NSA area is to discover negative sequential patterns (NSPs) consisting of important non-occurring and occurring elements and patterns. The limited existing work on NSP mining relies on frequentist and downward closure property-based pattern selection, producing large and highly redundant NSPs, nonactionable for business decision-making. This work makes the first attempt for actionable NSP discovery. It builds an NSP graph representation, quantify both explicit occurrence and implicit non-occurrence-based element and pattern relations, and then discover significant, diverse and informative NSPs in the NSP graph to represent the entire NSP set for discovering actionable NSPs. A DPP-based NSP representation and actionable NSP discovery method EINSP introduces novel and significant contributions for NSA and sequence analysis: (1) it represents NSPs by a determinantal point process (DPP) based graph; (2) it quantifies actionable NSPs in terms of their statistical significance, diversity, and strength of explicit/implicit element/pattern relations; and (3) it models and measures both explicit and implicit element/pattern relations in the DPP-based NSP graph to represent direct and indirect couplings between NSP items, elements and patterns. We substantially analyze the effectiveness of EINSP in terms of various theoretical and empirical aspects including complexity, item/pattern coverage, pattern size and diversity, implicit pattern relation strength, and data factors.
abstract_zh: 现实生活中的事件、行为和交互会产生连续的数据。一个重要但很少被探讨的问题是分析那些不出现（也称为负）但重要的序列，形成负序列分析（NSA）。典型的 NSA 领域是发现由重要的未发生和发生的元素和模式组成的负序模式 (NSP)。现有的 NSP 挖掘工作有限，依赖于频率主义和向下封闭的基于属性的模式选择，产生大量且高度冗余的 NSP，对于业务决策来说是不可操作的。这项工作首次尝试了可操作的 NSP 发现。它构建 NSP 图表示，量化显式发生和隐式非发生的元素和模式关系，然后在 NSP 图中发现重要的、多样化的和信息丰富的 NSP，以表示整个 NSP 集，从而发现可操作的 NSP。基于 DPP 的 NSP 表示和可操作的 NSP 发现方法 EINSP 为 NSA 和序列分析带来了新颖且重要的贡献：（1）它通过基于行列式点过程（DPP）的图来表示 NSP； (2) 它根据统计显着性、多样性和显式/隐式元素/模式关系的强度来量化可操作的 NSP； (3)它对基于DPP的NSP图中的显式和隐式元素/模式关系进行建模和测量，以表示NSP项目、元素和模式之间的直接和间接耦合。我们从各种理论和实证方面对 EINSP 的有效性进行了实质性分析，包括复杂性、项目/模式覆盖范围、模式大小和多样性、隐式模式关系强度和数据因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于显式和隐式模式关系分析的方法，用于发现具有商业价值的负序列模式（NSPs）。
AI.motivation: 现有负序列分析方法依赖频繁模式挖掘，导致结果冗余且缺乏可操作性，难以支持实际业务决策。
AI.method: 构建NSP图表示，结合行列式点过程（DPP）量化显式出现与隐式未出现的元素/模式关系，提出EINSP方法实现可操作NSP发现。
AI.result: EINSP在复杂度、模式覆盖度、多样性及隐式关系强度等多维度验证有效，显著提升NSP分析的实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式与隐式关系建模，EINSP为负序列分析提供了新颖框架，推动序列数据挖掘向可操作化方向发展。

authors_text: Daniel Jarne Ornia,Manuel Mazo Jr
title: Robust Event-Driven Interactions in Cooperative Multi-Agent Learning
title_zh: 协作多智能体学习中的鲁棒事件驱动交互
comment: ef:Formal Modeling and Analysis of Timed Systems. FORMATS 2022. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 13465. Springer, Cham
comments: ef:Formal Modeling and Analysis of Timed Systems. FORMATS 2022. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 13465. Springer, Cham
abstract: We present an approach to reduce the communication required between agents in a Multi-Agent learning system by exploiting the inherent robustness of the underlying Markov Decision Process. We compute so-called robustness surrogate functions (off-line), that give agents a conservative indication of how far their state measurements can deviate before they need to update other agents in the system. This results in fully distributed decision functions, enabling agents to decide when it is necessary to update others. We derive bounds on the optimality of the resulting systems in terms of the discounted sum of rewards obtained, and show these bounds are a function of the design parameters. Additionally, we extend the results for the case where the robustness surrogate functions are learned from data, and present experimental results demonstrating a significant reduction in communication events between agents.
summary: We present an approach to reduce the communication required between agents in a Multi-Agent learning system by exploiting the inherent robustness of the underlying Markov Decision Process. We compute so-called robustness surrogate functions (off-line), that give agents a conservative indication of how far their state measurements can deviate before they need to update other agents in the system. This results in fully distributed decision functions, enabling agents to decide when it is necessary to update others. We derive bounds on the optimality of the resulting systems in terms of the discounted sum of rewards obtained, and show these bounds are a function of the design parameters. Additionally, we extend the results for the case where the robustness surrogate functions are learned from data, and present experimental results demonstrating a significant reduction in communication events between agents.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过利用底层马尔可夫决策过程的固有鲁棒性来减少多智能体学习系统中智能体之间所需通信的方法。我们计算所谓的鲁棒性代理函数（离线），该函数为代理提供保守的指示，表明在需要更新系统中的其他代理之前，其状态测量可以偏离多远。这导致了完全分布式的决策功能，使代理能够决定何时需要更新其他代理。我们根据所获得的奖励的贴现总和推导出所得系统的最优性的界限，并表明这些界限是设计参数的函数。此外，我们扩展了从数据中学习鲁棒性代理函数的情况的结果，并提供了实验结果，证明代理之间的通信事件显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过计算鲁棒性替代函数来减少多智能体协作学习中通信需求的方法，实现事件驱动的分布式决策。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中频繁通信会导致高开销和低效率，传统方法难以平衡通信频率与系统性能。
AI.method: 离线计算鲁棒性替代函数，为智能体提供状态偏差阈值，仅在必要时触发通信；扩展至数据驱动的替代函数学习，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明通信事件显著减少，同时理论推导了系统最优性界限与设计参数的关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析和实验验证，在保证性能的前提下有效降低了多智能体系统的通信开销。

authors_text: Sanghyuk Chun,Wonjae Kim,Song Park,Minsuk Chang,Seong Joon Oh
title: ECCV Caption: Correcting False Negatives by Collecting Machine-and-Human-verified Image-Caption Associations for MS-COCO
title_zh: ECCV 说明：通过收集 MS-COCO 的机器和人工验证的图像说明关联来纠正误报
comment: Published in ECCV 2022; 32 pages (2.3MB); Code and dataset: https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption; v5 fixes errors in Table 4: the COCO 1K R@1 numbers were incorrect. All other tables and figures are correct. v5 also adds RSUM scores in Tab 4 and 5: RSUM has a high correlation with COCO 1K recalls; v4 fixes errors in v3 -- see the v4 comment for details
comments: Published in ECCV 2022; 32 pages (2.3MB); Code and dataset: https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption; v5 fixes errors in Table 4: the COCO 1K R@1 numbers were incorrect. All other tables and figures are correct. v5 also adds RSUM scores in Tab 4 and 5: RSUM has a high correlation with COCO 1K recalls; v4 fixes errors in v3 -- see the v4 comment for details
abstract: Image-Text matching (ITM) is a common task for evaluating the quality of Vision and Language (VL) models. However, existing ITM benchmarks have a significant limitation. They have many missing correspondences, originating from the data construction process itself. For example, a caption is only matched with one image although the caption can be matched with other similar images and vice versa. To correct the massive false negatives, we construct the Extended COCO Validation (ECCV) Caption dataset by supplying the missing associations with machine and human annotators. We employ five state-of-the-art ITM models with diverse properties for our annotation process. Our dataset provides x3.6 positive image-to-caption associations and x8.5 caption-to-image associations compared to the original MS-COCO. We also propose to use an informative ranking-based metric mAP@R, rather than the popular Recall@K (R@K). We re-evaluate the existing 25 VL models on existing and proposed benchmarks. Our findings are that the existing benchmarks, such as COCO 1K R@K, COCO 5K R@K, CxC R@1 are highly correlated with each other, while the rankings change when we shift to the ECCV mAP@R. Lastly, we delve into the effect of the bias introduced by the choice of machine annotator. Source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption
summary: Image-Text matching (ITM) is a common task for evaluating the quality of Vision and Language (VL) models. However, existing ITM benchmarks have a significant limitation. They have many missing correspondences, originating from the data construction process itself. For example, a caption is only matched with one image although the caption can be matched with other similar images and vice versa. To correct the massive false negatives, we construct the Extended COCO Validation (ECCV) Caption dataset by supplying the missing associations with machine and human annotators. We employ five state-of-the-art ITM models with diverse properties for our annotation process. Our dataset provides x3.6 positive image-to-caption associations and x8.5 caption-to-image associations compared to the original MS-COCO. We also propose to use an informative ranking-based metric mAP@R, rather than the popular Recall@K (R@K). We re-evaluate the existing 25 VL models on existing and proposed benchmarks. Our findings are that the existing benchmarks, such as COCO 1K R@K, COCO 5K R@K, CxC R@1 are highly correlated with each other, while the rankings change when we shift to the ECCV mAP@R. Lastly, we delve into the effect of the bias introduced by the choice of machine annotator. Source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption
abstract_zh: 图像文本匹配（ITM）是评估视觉和语言（VL）模型质量的常见任务。然而，现有的 ITM 基准有很大的局限性。它们有许多缺失的对应关系，这些对应关系源于数据构建过程本身。例如，尽管标题可以与其他类似图像匹配，但标题仅与一张图像匹配，反之亦然。为了纠正大量的漏报，我们通过提供与机器和人类注释者缺失的关联来构建扩展 COCO 验证（ECCV）标题数据集。我们在注释过程中采用了五种具有不同属性的最先进的 ITM 模型。与原始 MS-COCO 相比，我们的数据集提供 x3.6 正图像到标题关联和 x8.5 标题到图像关联。我们还建议使用基于信息排名的指标 mAP@R，而不是流行的 Recall@K (R@K)。我们根据现有和提议的基准重新评估现有的 25 个 VL 模型。我们的发现是，现有的基准，例如 COCO 1K R@K、COCO 5K R@K、CxC R@1 彼此高度相关，而当我们转向 ECCV mAP@R 时排名会发生变化。最后，我们深入研究了机器注释器的选择所引入的偏差的影响。源代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文通过收集机器和人工验证的图像-文本关联，构建扩展数据集以修正MS-COCO基准中的假阴性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本匹配（ITM）基准存在大量缺失关联，导致模型评估不准确，需通过补充关联数据修正假阴性。
AI.method: 利用五种先进ITM模型进行机器标注，结合人工验证生成扩展数据集，并提出基于排序的mAP@R指标替代传统Recall@K指标。
AI.result: 新数据集相比原MS-COCO增加3.6倍图像-文本正向关联和8.5倍文本-图像关联，发现传统基准间高度相关但排名在mAP@R下发生显著变化。
AI.conclusion: 扩展数据集和新指标揭示了现有评估体系的局限性，强调了修正假阴性及注释者偏差对模型评估的重要性。

search_text: ECCV Caption: Correcting False Negatives by Collecting Machine-and-Human-verified Image-Caption Associations for MS-COCO ECCV 说明：通过收集 MS-COCO 的机器和人工验证的图像说明关联来纠正误报 Image-Text matching (ITM) is a common task for evaluating the quality of Vision and Language (VL) models. However, existing ITM benchmarks have a significant limitation. They have many missing correspondences, originating from the data construction process itself. For example, a caption is only matched with one image although the caption can be matched with other similar images and vice versa. To correct the massive false negatives, we construct the Extended COCO Validation (ECCV) Caption dataset by supplying the missing associations with machine and human annotators. We employ five state-of-the-art ITM models with diverse properties for our annotation process. Our dataset provides x3.6 positive image-to-caption associations and x8.5 caption-to-image associations compared to the original MS-COCO. We also propose to use an informative ranking-based metric mAP@R, rather than the popular Recall@K (R@K). We re-evaluate the existing 25 VL models on existing and proposed benchmarks. Our findings are that the existing benchmarks, such as COCO 1K R@K, COCO 5K R@K, CxC R@1 are highly correlated with each other, while the rankings change when we shift to the ECCV mAP@R. Lastly, we delve into the effect of the bias introduced by the choice of machine annotator. Source code and dataset are available at https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption 图像文本匹配（ITM）是评估视觉和语言（VL）模型质量的常见任务。然而，现有的 ITM 基准有很大的局限性。它们有许多缺失的对应关系，这些对应关系源于数据构建过程本身。例如，尽管标题可以与其他类似图像匹配，但标题仅与一张图像匹配，反之亦然。为了纠正大量的漏报，我们通过提供与机器和人类注释者缺失的关联来构建扩展 COCO 验证（ECCV）标题数据集。我们在注释过程中采用了五种具有不同属性的最先进的 ITM 模型。与原始 MS-COCO 相比，我们的数据集提供 x3.6 正图像到标题关联和 x8.5 标题到图像关联。我们还建议使用基于信息排名的指标 mAP@R，而不是流行的 Recall@K (R@K)。我们根据现有和提议的基准重新评估现有的 25 个 VL 模型。我们的发现是，现有的基准，例如 COCO 1K R@K、COCO 5K R@K、CxC R@1 彼此高度相关，而当我们转向 ECCV mAP@R 时排名会发生变化。最后，我们深入研究了机器注释器的选择所引入的偏差的影响。源代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/naver-ai/eccv-caption 获取 该论文通过收集机器和人工验证的图像-文本关联，构建扩展数据集以修正MS-COCO基准中的假阴性问题。 Sanghyuk Chun,Wonjae Kim,Song Park,Minsuk Chang,Seong Joon Oh cs.CV

authors_text: Vaishali Pal,Evangelos Kanoulas,Maarten de Rijke
title: Parameter-Efficient Abstractive Question Answering over Tables or Text
title_zh: 通过表格或文本进行参数高效的抽象问答
comment: Published in Dialdoc Workshop at ACL 2022
comments: Published in Dialdoc Workshop at ACL 2022
abstract: A long-term ambition of information seeking QA systems is to reason over multi-modal contexts and generate natural answers to user queries. Today, memory intensive pre-trained language models are adapted to downstream tasks such as QA by fine-tuning the model on QA data in a specific modality like unstructured text or structured tables. To avoid training such memory-hungry models while utilizing a uniform architecture for each modality, parameter-efficient adapters add and train small task-specific bottle-neck layers between transformer layers. In this work, we study parameter-efficient abstractive QA in encoder-decoder models over structured tabular data and unstructured textual data using only 1.5% additional parameters for each modality. We also ablate over adapter layers in both encoder and decoder modules to study the efficiency-performance trade-off and demonstrate that reducing additional trainable parameters down to 0.7%-1.0% leads to comparable results. Our models out-perform current state-of-the-art models on tabular QA datasets such as Tablesum and FeTaQA, and achieve comparable performance on a textual QA dataset such as NarrativeQA using significantly less trainable parameters than fine-tuning.
summary: A long-term ambition of information seeking QA systems is to reason over multi-modal contexts and generate natural answers to user queries. Today, memory intensive pre-trained language models are adapted to downstream tasks such as QA by fine-tuning the model on QA data in a specific modality like unstructured text or structured tables. To avoid training such memory-hungry models while utilizing a uniform architecture for each modality, parameter-efficient adapters add and train small task-specific bottle-neck layers between transformer layers. In this work, we study parameter-efficient abstractive QA in encoder-decoder models over structured tabular data and unstructured textual data using only 1.5% additional parameters for each modality. We also ablate over adapter layers in both encoder and decoder modules to study the efficiency-performance trade-off and demonstrate that reducing additional trainable parameters down to 0.7%-1.0% leads to comparable results. Our models out-perform current state-of-the-art models on tabular QA datasets such as Tablesum and FeTaQA, and achieve comparable performance on a textual QA dataset such as NarrativeQA using significantly less trainable parameters than fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 信息搜索 QA 系统的长期目标是对多模式上下文进行推理并为用户查询生成自然答案。如今，内存密集型预训练语言模型通过以非结构化文本或结构化表格等特定模式对 QA 数据上的模型进行微调，适应了 QA 等下游任务。为了避免在为每种模态使用统一架构的同时训练此类消耗内存的模型，参数高效的适配器在转换器层之间添加并训练小型特定于任务的瓶颈层。在这项工作中，我们研究了结构化表格数据和非结构化文本数据的编码器-解码器模型中参数高效的抽象 QA，每种模态仅使用 1.5% 的附加参数。我们还消除了编码器和解码器模块中的适配器层，以研究效率与性能的权衡，并证明将额外的可训练参数减少到 0.7%-1.0% 会产生可比较的结果。我们的模型在表格 QA 数据集（例如 Tablesum 和 FeTaQA）上的性能优于当前最先进的模型，并且在文本 QA 数据集（例如 NarrativeQA）上使用比微调少得多的可训练参数来实现可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种参数高效的抽象问答方法，能够在表格和文本数据上生成自然答案，仅需增加1.5%的参数。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型在问答任务中需要大量参数进行微调，导致内存消耗大且难以统一处理多模态数据，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 在编码器-解码器模型中引入参数高效的适配器层，通过在Transformer层间添加小型瓶颈层，仅用1.5%额外参数实现多模态问答，并通过消融实验优化参数效率。
AI.result: 在表格问答数据集（Tablesum、FeTaQA）上优于现有最佳模型，在文本数据集（NarrativeQA）上表现相当，且参数量显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效适配器方法能在保持性能的同时大幅降低训练参数量，为多模态问答任务提供轻量化解决方案。

authors_text: Alberto Sabater,Luis Montesano,Ana C. Murillo
title: Event Transformer. A sparse-aware solution for efficient event data processing
title_zh: 事件转换器。用于高效事件数据处理的稀疏感知解决方案
abstract: Event cameras are sensors of great interest for many applications that run in low-resource and challenging environments. They log sparse illumination changes with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range, while they present minimal power consumption. However, top-performing methods often ignore specific event-data properties, leading to the development of generic but computationally expensive algorithms. Efforts toward efficient solutions usually do not achieve top-accuracy results for complex tasks. This work proposes a novel framework, Event Transformer (EvT), that effectively takes advantage of event-data properties to be highly efficient and accurate. We introduce a new patch-based event representation and a compact transformer-like architecture to process it. EvT is evaluated on different event-based benchmarks for action and gesture recognition. Evaluation results show better or comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art while requiring significantly less computation resources, which makes EvT able to work with minimal latency both on GPU and CPU.
summary: Event cameras are sensors of great interest for many applications that run in low-resource and challenging environments. They log sparse illumination changes with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range, while they present minimal power consumption. However, top-performing methods often ignore specific event-data properties, leading to the development of generic but computationally expensive algorithms. Efforts toward efficient solutions usually do not achieve top-accuracy results for complex tasks. This work proposes a novel framework, Event Transformer (EvT), that effectively takes advantage of event-data properties to be highly efficient and accurate. We introduce a new patch-based event representation and a compact transformer-like architecture to process it. EvT is evaluated on different event-based benchmarks for action and gesture recognition. Evaluation results show better or comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art while requiring significantly less computation resources, which makes EvT able to work with minimal latency both on GPU and CPU.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机是许多在资源匮乏和具有挑战性的环境中运行的应用程序非常感兴趣的传感器。它们以高时间分辨率和高动态范围记录稀疏照明变化，同时功耗极低。然而，性能最佳的方法通常会忽略特定的事件数据属性，从而导致通用但计算成本昂贵的算法的开发。对于复杂的任务，寻求高效解决方案的努力通常无法获得高精度的结果。这项工作提出了一种新颖的框架，即事件转换器（EvT），它有效地利用事件数据属性来实现高效和准确。我们引入了一种新的基于补丁的事件表示和一个紧凑的类似变压器的架构来处理它。 EvT 根据不同的基于事件的动作和手势识别基准进行评估。评估结果显示出与最先进技术相比更好或相当的精度，同时需要的计算资源显着减少，这使得 EvT 能够在 GPU 和 CPU 上以最小的延迟工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效处理事件相机数据的框架Event Transformer（EvT），通过利用事件数据的稀疏性特性，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低计算资源需求。
AI.motivation: 现有事件数据处理方法要么忽略事件数据的稀疏性导致计算昂贵，要么效率高但无法胜任复杂任务，亟需兼顾准确率与计算效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入基于分块的事件数据表示方法，并设计紧凑型Transformer架构，通过稀疏感知机制处理事件数据的时空特征。
AI.result: 在多个事件基准数据集上，EvT在保持与现有方法相当或更优准确率的同时，计算资源消耗显著减少，可实现GPU和CPU端的低延迟处理。
AI.conclusion: EvT通过有效利用事件数据的稀疏性特性，为低资源环境下的事件数据处理提供了高效且准确的解决方案，推动了事件相机在边缘计算场景的应用。

method: 引入基于分块的事件数据表示方法，并设计紧凑型Transformer架构，通过稀疏感知机制处理事件数据的时空特征。
result: 在多个事件基准数据集上，EvT在保持与现有方法相当或更优准确率的同时，计算资源消耗显著减少，可实现GPU和CPU端的低延迟处理。
conclusion: EvT通过有效利用事件数据的稀疏性特性，为低资源环境下的事件数据处理提供了高效且准确的解决方案，推动了事件相机在边缘计算场景的应用。
search_text: Event Transformer. A sparse-aware solution for efficient event data processing 事件转换器。用于高效事件数据处理的稀疏感知解决方案 Event cameras are sensors of great interest for many applications that run in low-resource and challenging environments. They log sparse illumination changes with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range, while they present minimal power consumption. However, top-performing methods often ignore specific event-data properties, leading to the development of generic but computationally expensive algorithms. Efforts toward efficient solutions usually do not achieve top-accuracy results for complex tasks. This work proposes a novel framework, Event Transformer (EvT), that effectively takes advantage of event-data properties to be highly efficient and accurate. We introduce a new patch-based event representation and a compact transformer-like architecture to process it. EvT is evaluated on different event-based benchmarks for action and gesture recognition. Evaluation results show better or comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art while requiring significantly less computation resources, which makes EvT able to work with minimal latency both on GPU and CPU. 事件摄像机是许多在资源匮乏和具有挑战性的环境中运行的应用程序非常感兴趣的传感器。它们以高时间分辨率和高动态范围记录稀疏照明变化，同时功耗极低。然而，性能最佳的方法通常会忽略特定的事件数据属性，从而导致通用但计算成本昂贵的算法的开发。对于复杂的任务，寻求高效解决方案的努力通常无法获得高精度的结果。这项工作提出了一种新颖的框架，即事件转换器（EvT），它有效地利用事件数据属性来实现高效和准确。我们引入了一种新的基于补丁的事件表示和一个紧凑的类似变压器的架构来处理它。 EvT 根据不同的基于事件的动作和手势识别基准进行评估。评估结果显示出与最先进技术相比更好或相当的精度，同时需要的计算资源显着减少，这使得 EvT 能够在 GPU 和 CPU 上以最小的延迟工作。 本文提出一种高效处理事件相机数据的框架Event Transformer（EvT），通过利用事件数据的稀疏性特性，在保持高准确率的同时显著降低计算资源需求。 Alberto Sabater,Luis Montesano,Ana C. Murillo cs.CV

authors_text: Achim Schilling,William Sedley,Richard Gerum,Claus Metzner,Konstantin Tziridis,Andreas Maier,Holger Schulze,Fan-Gang Zeng,Karl J. Friston,Patrick Krauss
title: Predictive coding and stochastic resonance as fundamental principles of auditory perception
title_zh: 预测编码和随机共振作为听觉感知的基本原理
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.01914
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.01914
abstract: How is information processed in the brain during perception? Mechanistic insight is achieved only when experiments are employed to test formal or computational models. In analogy to lesion studies, phantom perception may serve as a vehicle to understand the fundamental processing principles underlying auditory perception. With a special focus on tinnitus -- as the prime example of auditory phantom perception -- we review recent work at the intersection of artificial intelligence, psychology, and neuroscience. In particular, we discuss why everyone with tinnitus suffers from hearing loss, but not everyone with hearing loss suffers from tinnitus. We argue that the increase of sensory precision due to Bayesian inference could be caused by intrinsic neural noise and lead to a prediction error in the cerebral cortex. Hence, two fundamental processing principles - being ubiquitous in the brain - provide the most explanatory power for the emergence of tinnitus: predictive coding as a top-down, and stochastic resonance as a complementary bottom-up mechanism. We conclude that both principles play a crucial role in healthy auditory perception.
summary: How is information processed in the brain during perception? Mechanistic insight is achieved only when experiments are employed to test formal or computational models. In analogy to lesion studies, phantom perception may serve as a vehicle to understand the fundamental processing principles underlying auditory perception. With a special focus on tinnitus -- as the prime example of auditory phantom perception -- we review recent work at the intersection of artificial intelligence, psychology, and neuroscience. In particular, we discuss why everyone with tinnitus suffers from hearing loss, but not everyone with hearing loss suffers from tinnitus. We argue that the increase of sensory precision due to Bayesian inference could be caused by intrinsic neural noise and lead to a prediction error in the cerebral cortex. Hence, two fundamental processing principles - being ubiquitous in the brain - provide the most explanatory power for the emergence of tinnitus: predictive coding as a top-down, and stochastic resonance as a complementary bottom-up mechanism. We conclude that both principles play a crucial role in healthy auditory perception.
abstract_zh: 感知过程中大脑如何处理信息？只有当采用实验来测试形式或计算模型时，才能获得机制洞察力。与病变研究类似，幻觉可以作为理解听觉感知基本处理原理的工具。我们特别关注耳鸣——作为听觉幻觉的主要例子——回顾人工智能、心理学和神经科学交叉领域的最新研究。我们特别讨论为什么每个有耳鸣的人都会患有听力损失，但并不是每个有听力损失的人都会患有耳鸣。我们认为，贝叶斯推理带来的感觉精度的提高可能是由内在神经噪声引起的，并导致大脑皮层的预测误差。因此，大脑中普遍存在的两个基本处理原理为耳鸣的出现提供了最具解释力：作为自上而下的预测编码，以及作为补充的自下而上机制的随机共振。我们得出的结论是，这两个原则在健康的听觉感知中都发挥着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨预测编码和随机共振作为听觉感知的基本原理，重点分析耳鸣（tinnitus）的产生机制。
AI.motivation: 通过研究耳鸣这一听觉幻觉现象，揭示听觉感知的核心处理原则，解释为何听力损失者未必都出现耳鸣。
AI.method: 结合人工智能、心理学和神经科学领域的研究，分析贝叶斯推理框架下感觉精度变化与皮层预测误差的关系，整合预测编码与随机共振机制。
AI.result: 发现预测编码（自上而下）与随机共振（自下而上）共同作用，能有效解释耳鸣的产生及健康听觉感知的形成。
AI.conclusion: 预测编码与随机共振是大脑听觉处理中普遍存在的核心机制，对理解正常与异常听觉感知具有关键意义。
