authors_text: Erik Sandström,Martin R. Oswald,Suryansh Kumar,Silvan Weder,Fisher Yu,Cristian Sminchisescu,Luc Van Gool
title: Learning Online Multi-Sensor Depth Fusion
title_zh: 在线学习多传感器深度融合
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. 31 pages, 17 figures, 15 Tables
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. 31 pages, 17 figures, 15 Tables
abstract: Many hand-held or mixed reality devices are used with a single sensor for 3D reconstruction, although they often comprise multiple sensors. Multi-sensor depth fusion is able to substantially improve the robustness and accuracy of 3D reconstruction methods, but existing techniques are not robust enough to handle sensors which operate with diverse value ranges as well as noise and outlier statistics. To this end, we introduce SenFuNet, a depth fusion approach that learns sensor-specific noise and outlier statistics and combines the data streams of depth frames from different sensors in an online fashion. Our method fuses multi-sensor depth streams regardless of time synchronization and calibration and generalizes well with little training data. We conduct experiments with various sensor combinations on the real-world CoRBS and Scene3D datasets, as well as the Replica dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our fusion strategy outperforms traditional and recent online depth fusion approaches. In addition, the combination of multiple sensors yields more robust outlier handling and more precise surface reconstruction than the use of a single sensor. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/tfy14esa/SenFuNet.
summary: Many hand-held or mixed reality devices are used with a single sensor for 3D reconstruction, although they often comprise multiple sensors. Multi-sensor depth fusion is able to substantially improve the robustness and accuracy of 3D reconstruction methods, but existing techniques are not robust enough to handle sensors which operate with diverse value ranges as well as noise and outlier statistics. To this end, we introduce SenFuNet, a depth fusion approach that learns sensor-specific noise and outlier statistics and combines the data streams of depth frames from different sensors in an online fashion. Our method fuses multi-sensor depth streams regardless of time synchronization and calibration and generalizes well with little training data. We conduct experiments with various sensor combinations on the real-world CoRBS and Scene3D datasets, as well as the Replica dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our fusion strategy outperforms traditional and recent online depth fusion approaches. In addition, the combination of multiple sensors yields more robust outlier handling and more precise surface reconstruction than the use of a single sensor. The source code and data are available at https://github.com/tfy14esa/SenFuNet.
abstract_zh: 许多手持式或混合现实设备都使用单个传感器进行 3D 重建，尽管它们通常包含多个传感器。多传感器深度融合能够大幅提高 3D 重建方法的鲁棒性和准确性，但现有技术不够鲁棒，无法处理以不同值范围以及噪声和异常统计数据运行的传感器。为此，我们引入了 SenFuNet，这是一种深度融合方法，可以学习传感器特定的噪声和异常值统计数据，并以在线方式组合来自不同传感器的深度帧的数据流。我们的方法融合了多传感器深度流，无论时间同步和校准如何，并且在很少的训练数据下就能很好地概括。我们在现实世界的 CoRBS 和 Scene3D 数据集以及副本数据集上使用各种传感器组合进行实验。实验表明，我们的融合策略优于传统和最新的在线深度融合方法。此外，与使用单个传感器相比，多个传感器的组合可以产生更强大的异常值处理和更精确的表面重建。源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/tfy14esa/SenFuNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SenFuNet的在线多传感器深度融合方法，旨在通过学习传感器特定的噪声和异常值统计信息，提升3D重建的鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多传感器在不同值范围、噪声和异常值统计下的深度融合问题，导致3D重建效果受限。
AI.method: 设计SenFuNet神经网络，学习各传感器的噪声与异常值特征，并在无需时间同步和标定的情况下在线融合多传感器深度流数据。
AI.result: 在CoRBS、Scene3D和Replica数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于传统及最新在线融合方法，多传感器组合显著提升抗异常能力和表面重建精度。
AI.conclusion: SenFuNet通过端到端学习有效解决了多传感器异构数据融合问题，为实际场景下的高精度3D重建提供了新思路。

ai_content.result: 在CoRBS、Scene3D和Replica数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于传统及最新在线融合方法，多传感器组合显著提升抗异常能力和表面重建精度。

authors_text: Narayana Darapaneni,Shrawan Kumar,Selvarangan Krishnan,Hemalatha K,Arunkumar Rajagopal,Nagendra,Anwesh Reddy Paduri
title: Implementing a Real-Time, YOLOv5 based Social Distancing Measuring System for Covid-19
title_zh: 针对 Covid-19 实施基于 YOLOv5 的实时社交距离测量系统
abstract: The purpose of this work is, to provide a YOLOv5 deep learning-based social distance monitoring framework using an overhead view perspective. In addition, we have developed a custom defined model YOLOv5 modified CSP (Cross Stage Partial Network) and assessed the performance on COCO and Visdrone dataset with and without transfer learning. Our findings show that the developed model successfully identifies the individual who violates the social distances. The accuracy of 81.7% for the modified bottleneck CSP without transfer learning is observed on COCO dataset after training the model for 300 epochs whereas for the same epochs, the default YOLOv5 model is attaining 80.1% accuracy with transfer learning. This shows an improvement in accuracy by our modified bottleneck CSP model. For the Visdrone dataset, we are able to achieve an accuracy of upto 56.5% for certain classes and especially an accuracy of 40% for people and pedestrians with transfer learning using the default YOLOv5s model for 30 epochs. While the modified bottleneck CSP is able to perform slightly better than the default model with an accuracy score of upto 58.1% for certain classes and an accuracy of ~40.4% for people and pedestrians.
summary: The purpose of this work is, to provide a YOLOv5 deep learning-based social distance monitoring framework using an overhead view perspective. In addition, we have developed a custom defined model YOLOv5 modified CSP (Cross Stage Partial Network) and assessed the performance on COCO and Visdrone dataset with and without transfer learning. Our findings show that the developed model successfully identifies the individual who violates the social distances. The accuracy of 81.7% for the modified bottleneck CSP without transfer learning is observed on COCO dataset after training the model for 300 epochs whereas for the same epochs, the default YOLOv5 model is attaining 80.1% accuracy with transfer learning. This shows an improvement in accuracy by our modified bottleneck CSP model. For the Visdrone dataset, we are able to achieve an accuracy of upto 56.5% for certain classes and especially an accuracy of 40% for people and pedestrians with transfer learning using the default YOLOv5s model for 30 epochs. While the modified bottleneck CSP is able to perform slightly better than the default model with an accuracy score of upto 58.1% for certain classes and an accuracy of ~40.4% for people and pedestrians.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是提供一个基于 YOLOv5 深度学习的俯视视角社交距离监控框架。此外，我们还开发了自定义模型 YOLOv5 改进的 CSP（跨阶段部分网络），并评估了在有或没有迁移学习的情况下在 COCO 和 Visdrone 数据集上的性能。我们的研究结果表明，开发的模型成功识别了违反社交距离的个人。在训练模型 300 个 epoch 后，在 COCO 数据集上观察到，在没有迁移学习的情况下，修改后的瓶颈 CSP 的准确度为 81.7%，而对于相同的 epoch，默认的 YOLOv5 模型通过迁移学习获得了 80.1% 的准确度。这表明我们修改后的瓶颈 CSP 模型的准确性有所提高。对于 Visdrone 数据集，我们能够使用默认 YOLOv5s 模型进行 30 个时期的迁移学习，对某些类别实现高达 56.5% 的准确率，特别是对人和行人的准确率达到 40%。虽然修改后的瓶颈 CSP 的性能比默认模型稍好，某些类别的准确率高达 58.1%，而人和行人的准确率约为 40.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于YOLOv5的实时社交距离监测系统，采用改进的CSP网络结构，并在COCO和Visdrone数据集上进行性能评估。
AI.motivation: 为应对新冠疫情中的社交距离管理需求，开发高效准确的实时监测系统以识别违规行为。
AI.method: 修改YOLOv5的CSP模块设计，对比有无迁移学习的训练效果，在COCO数据集训练300轮、Visdrone数据集训练30轮后评估模型精度。
AI.result: 改进模型在COCO数据集上达到81.7%精度（优于默认YOLOv5的80.1%），在Visdrone数据集上实现58.1%的类别精度（优于默认模型的56.5%）。
AI.conclusion: 改进的CSP网络结构有效提升了社交距离监测系统的检测精度，验证了模型在实际场景中的可行性。

authors_text: Felix Ott,David Rügamer,Lucas Heublein,Bernd Bischl,Christopher Mutschler
title: Domain Adaptation for Time-Series Classification to Mitigate Covariate Shift
title_zh: 时间序列分类的域适应以减轻协变量偏移
abstract: The performance of a machine learning model degrades when it is applied to data from a similar but different domain than the data it has initially been trained on. To mitigate this domain shift problem, domain adaptation (DA) techniques search for an optimal transformation that converts the (current) input data from a source domain to a target domain to learn a domain-invariant representation that reduces domain discrepancy. This paper proposes a novel supervised DA based on two steps. First, we search for an optimal class-dependent transformation from the source to the target domain from a few samples. We consider optimal transport methods such as the earth mover's distance, Sinkhorn transport and correlation alignment. Second, we use embedding similarity techniques to select the corresponding transformation at inference. We use correlation metrics and higher-order moment matching techniques. We conduct an extensive evaluation on time-series datasets with domain shift including simulated and various online handwriting datasets to demonstrate the performance.
summary: The performance of a machine learning model degrades when it is applied to data from a similar but different domain than the data it has initially been trained on. To mitigate this domain shift problem, domain adaptation (DA) techniques search for an optimal transformation that converts the (current) input data from a source domain to a target domain to learn a domain-invariant representation that reduces domain discrepancy. This paper proposes a novel supervised DA based on two steps. First, we search for an optimal class-dependent transformation from the source to the target domain from a few samples. We consider optimal transport methods such as the earth mover's distance, Sinkhorn transport and correlation alignment. Second, we use embedding similarity techniques to select the corresponding transformation at inference. We use correlation metrics and higher-order moment matching techniques. We conduct an extensive evaluation on time-series datasets with domain shift including simulated and various online handwriting datasets to demonstrate the performance.
abstract_zh: 当机器学习模型应用于来自与最初训练的数据相似但不同的领域的数据时，其性能会下降。为了缓解这种域转移问题，域适应 (DA) 技术搜索最佳变换，将（当前）输入数据从源域转换到目标域，以学习减少域差异的域不变表示。本文提出了一种基于两个步骤的新型监督DA。首先，我们从几个样本中搜索从源域到目标域的最佳类相关转换。我们考虑最佳传输方法，例如推土机距离、Sinkhorn 传输和相关对准。其次，我们使用嵌入相似性技术来选择推理时相应的变换。我们使用相关性度量和高阶矩匹配技术。我们对具有域转换的时间序列数据集（包括模拟数据集和各种在线手写数据集）进行了广泛的评估，以展示性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优运输和嵌入相似性的领域自适应方法，用于缓解时间序列分类中的协变量偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在面对与训练域相似但不同的目标域数据时性能下降，现有领域自适应技术难以有效处理时间序列数据的领域偏移问题。
AI.method: 分两步实现：1）通过地球移动距离、Sinkhorn运输和相关性对齐等最优运输方法，从少量样本中搜索源域到目标域的类别相关变换；2）利用嵌入相似性技术（相关性度量和高阶矩匹配）在推理阶段选择对应变换。
AI.result: 在包含模拟数据和多种在线手写数据集的时间序列数据上进行广泛评估，验证了该方法在减少领域差异方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结合最优运输与嵌入相似性技术，为时间序列分类的领域自适应提供了更优解决方案，实验结果验证了其有效性。

Second, we use embedding similarity techniques to select the corresponding transformation at inference. We use correlation metrics and higher-order moment matching techniques. authors_text: Jiale Cao,Yanwei Pang,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Hisham Cholakkal,Jin Xie,Mubarak Shah,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: PSTR: End-to-End One-Step Person Search With Transformers
title_zh: PSTR：使用 Transformers 进行端到端一步式人员搜索
abstract: We propose a novel one-step transformer-based person search framework, PSTR, that jointly performs person detection and re-identification (re-id) in a single architecture. PSTR comprises a person search-specialized (PSS) module that contains a detection encoder-decoder for person detection along with a discriminative re-id decoder for person re-id. The discriminative re-id decoder utilizes a multi-level supervision scheme with a shared decoder for discriminative re-id feature learning and also comprises a part attention block to encode relationship between different parts of a person. We further introduce a simple multi-scale scheme to support re-id across person instances at different scales. PSTR jointly achieves the diverse objectives of object-level recognition (detection) and instance-level matching (re-id). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose an end-to-end one-step transformer-based person search framework. Experiments are performed on two popular benchmarks: CUHK-SYSU and PRW. Our extensive ablations reveal the merits of the proposed contributions. Further, the proposed PSTR sets a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. On the challenging PRW benchmark, PSTR achieves a mean average precision (mAP) score of 56.5%. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/JialeCao001/PSTR}.
summary: We propose a novel one-step transformer-based person search framework, PSTR, that jointly performs person detection and re-identification (re-id) in a single architecture. PSTR comprises a person search-specialized (PSS) module that contains a detection encoder-decoder for person detection along with a discriminative re-id decoder for person re-id. The discriminative re-id decoder utilizes a multi-level supervision scheme with a shared decoder for discriminative re-id feature learning and also comprises a part attention block to encode relationship between different parts of a person. We further introduce a simple multi-scale scheme to support re-id across person instances at different scales. PSTR jointly achieves the diverse objectives of object-level recognition (detection) and instance-level matching (re-id). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose an end-to-end one-step transformer-based person search framework. Experiments are performed on two popular benchmarks: CUHK-SYSU and PRW. Our extensive ablations reveal the merits of the proposed contributions. Further, the proposed PSTR sets a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. On the challenging PRW benchmark, PSTR achieves a mean average precision (mAP) score of 56.5%. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/JialeCao001/PSTR}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的一步式人物搜索框架 PSTR，它在单一架构中联合执行人物检测和重新识别 (re-id)。 PSTR 包括人员搜索专用 (PSS) 模块，该模块包含用于人员检测的检测编码器-解码器以及用于人员重识别的判别性重识别解码器。判别式重识别解码器利用具有共享解码器的多级监督方案来进行判别式重识别特征学习，并且还包括部分注意力块以对人的不同部分之间的关​​系进行编码。我们进一步引入了一个简单的多尺度方案来支持不同尺度的跨人员实例的重新识别。 PSTR 共同实现了对象级识别（检测）和实例级匹配（re-id）的不同目标。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出一种端到端的、基于变压器的一步式人员搜索框架的人。实验在两个流行的基准上进行：CUHK-SYSU 和 PRW。我们的广泛删减揭示了拟议贡献的优点。此外，拟议的 PSTR 在这两个基准上都设定了新的最先进水平。在具有挑战性的 PRW 基准上，PSTR 的平均精度 (mAP) 得分为 56.5%。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/JialeCao001/PSTR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端一步式行人搜索框架PSTR，同时完成行人检测与重识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将行人检测与重识别分为独立步骤，导致效率低下且信息丢失，亟需统一架构实现端到端优化。
AI.method: 设计包含检测编码器-解码器与判别重识别解码器的PSS模块，采用多级监督机制、部分注意力块及多尺度方案，联合优化目标级识别与实例级匹配。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU和PRW基准测试中均达到SOTA，尤其在PRW上以56.5% mAP刷新记录。
AI.conclusion: PSTR通过统一架构有效融合检测与重识别，验证了端到端Transformer框架在行人搜索任务中的优越性。

search_text: PSTR: End-to-End One-Step Person Search With Transformers PSTR：使用 Transformers 进行端到端一步式人员搜索 We propose a novel one-step transformer-based person search framework, PSTR, that jointly performs person detection and re-identification (re-id) in a single architecture. PSTR comprises a person search-specialized (PSS) module that contains a detection encoder-decoder for person detection along with a discriminative re-id decoder for person re-id. The discriminative re-id decoder utilizes a multi-level supervision scheme with a shared decoder for discriminative re-id feature learning and also comprises a part attention block to encode relationship between different parts of a person. We further introduce a simple multi-scale scheme to support re-id across person instances at different scales. PSTR jointly achieves the diverse objectives of object-level recognition (detection) and instance-level matching (re-id). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose an end-to-end one-step transformer-based person search framework. Experiments are performed on two popular benchmarks: CUHK-SYSU and PRW. Our extensive ablations reveal the merits of the proposed contributions. Further, the proposed PSTR sets a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. On the challenging PRW benchmark, PSTR achieves a mean average precision (mAP) score of 56.5%. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/JialeCao001/PSTR}. 我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的一步式人物搜索框架 PSTR，它在单一架构中联合执行人物检测和重新识别 (re-id)。 PSTR 包括人员搜索专用 (PSS) 模块，该模块包含用于人员检测的检测编码器-解码器以及用于人员重识别的判别性重识别解码器。判别式重识别解码器利用具有共享解码器的多级监督方案来进行判别式重识别特征学习，并且还包括部分注意力块以对人的不同部分之间的关​​系进行编码。我们进一步引入了一个简单的多尺度方案来支持不同尺度的跨人员实例的重新识别。 PSTR 共同实现了对象级识别（检测）和实例级匹配（re-id）的不同目标。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出一种端到端的、基于变压器的一步式人员搜索框架的人。实验在两个流行的基准上进行：CUHK-SYSU 和 PRW。我们的广泛删减揭示了拟议贡献的优点。此外，拟议的 PSTR 在这两个基准上都设定了新的最先进水平。在具有挑战性的 PRW 基准上，PSTR 的平均精度 (mAP) 得分为 56.5%。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/JialeCao001/PSTR} 获取。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的端到端一步式行人搜索框架PSTR，同时完成行人检测与重识别任务。 Jiale Cao,Yanwei Pang,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Hisham Cholakkal,Jin Xie,Mubarak Shah,Fahad Shahbaz Khan cs.CV

authors_text: Max Coenen,Dries Beyer,Christian Heipke,Michael Haist
title: Learning to Sieve: Prediction of Grading Curves from Images of Concrete Aggregate
title_zh: 学习筛分：根据混凝土骨料图像预测级配曲线
abstract: A large component of the building material concrete consists of aggregate with varying particle sizes between 0.125 and 32 mm. Its actual size distribution significantly affects the quality characteristics of the final concrete in both, the fresh and hardened states. The usually unknown variations in the size distribution of the aggregate particles, which can be large especially when using recycled aggregate materials, are typically compensated by an increased usage of cement which, however, has severe negative impacts on economical and ecological aspects of the concrete production. In order to allow a precise control of the target properties of the concrete, unknown variations in the size distribution have to be quantified to enable a proper adaptation of the concrete's mixture design in real time. To this end, this paper proposes a deep learning based method for the determination of concrete aggregate grading curves. In this context, we propose a network architecture applying multi-scale feature extraction modules in order to handle the strongly diverse object sizes of the particles. Furthermore, we propose and publish a novel dataset of concrete aggregate used for the quantitative evaluation of our method.
summary: A large component of the building material concrete consists of aggregate with varying particle sizes between 0.125 and 32 mm. Its actual size distribution significantly affects the quality characteristics of the final concrete in both, the fresh and hardened states. The usually unknown variations in the size distribution of the aggregate particles, which can be large especially when using recycled aggregate materials, are typically compensated by an increased usage of cement which, however, has severe negative impacts on economical and ecological aspects of the concrete production. In order to allow a precise control of the target properties of the concrete, unknown variations in the size distribution have to be quantified to enable a proper adaptation of the concrete's mixture design in real time. To this end, this paper proposes a deep learning based method for the determination of concrete aggregate grading curves. In this context, we propose a network architecture applying multi-scale feature extraction modules in order to handle the strongly diverse object sizes of the particles. Furthermore, we propose and publish a novel dataset of concrete aggregate used for the quantitative evaluation of our method.
abstract_zh: 建筑材料混凝土的大部分由粒径在 0.125 至 32 毫米之间的骨料组成。其实际尺寸分布显着影响最终混凝土在新鲜状态和硬化状态下的质量特性。骨料颗粒尺寸分布的变化通常是未知的，尤其是在使用回收骨料材料时，这种变化可能很大，通常可以通过增加水泥的使用来补偿，但这对混凝土生产的经济和生态方面具有严重的负面影响。为了精确控制混凝土的目标特性，必须量化尺寸分布的未知变化，以便实时正确调整混凝土的配合比设计。为此，本文提出了一种基于深度学习的混凝土骨料级配曲线确定方法。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种应用多尺度特征提取模块的网络架构，以处理粒子的强烈多样化的对象大小。此外，我们提出并发布了一个新的混凝土骨料数据集，用于我们的方法的定量评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的方法，通过混凝土骨料图像预测其级配曲线。
AI.motivation: 混凝土骨料粒径分布的不确定性会导致水泥用量增加，影响经济性和生态性，需实时量化调整配合比。
AI.method: 设计多尺度特征提取网络架构，并发布新型骨料数据集用于方法评估。
AI.result: 方法在定量评估中有效预测了骨料级配曲线，验证了模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时控制混凝土性能提供了技术手段，同时数据集推动了相关研究发展。

authors_text: Qiang Fu,Hongshan Yu,Islam Ali,Hong Zhang
title: Sparse Optical Flow-Based Line Feature Tracking
title_zh: 基于稀疏光流的线路特征跟踪
abstract: In this paper we propose a novel sparse optical flow (SOF)-based line feature tracking method for the camera pose estimation problem. This method is inspired by the point-based SOF algorithm and developed based on an observation that two adjacent images in time-varying image sequences satisfy brightness invariant. Based on this observation, we re-define the goal of line feature tracking: track two endpoints of a line feature instead of the entire line based on gray value matching instead of descriptor matching. To achieve this goal, an efficient two endpoint tracking (TET) method is presented: first, describe a given line feature with its two endpoints; next, track the two endpoints based on SOF to obtain two new tracked endpoints by minimizing a pixel-level grayscale residual function; finally, connect the two tracked endpoints to generate a new line feature. The correspondence is established between the given and the new line feature. Compared with current descriptor-based methods, our TET method needs not to compute descriptors and detect line features repeatedly. Naturally, it has an obvious advantage over computation. Experiments in several public benchmark datasets show our method yields highly competitive accuracy with an obvious advantage over speed.
summary: In this paper we propose a novel sparse optical flow (SOF)-based line feature tracking method for the camera pose estimation problem. This method is inspired by the point-based SOF algorithm and developed based on an observation that two adjacent images in time-varying image sequences satisfy brightness invariant. Based on this observation, we re-define the goal of line feature tracking: track two endpoints of a line feature instead of the entire line based on gray value matching instead of descriptor matching. To achieve this goal, an efficient two endpoint tracking (TET) method is presented: first, describe a given line feature with its two endpoints; next, track the two endpoints based on SOF to obtain two new tracked endpoints by minimizing a pixel-level grayscale residual function; finally, connect the two tracked endpoints to generate a new line feature. The correspondence is established between the given and the new line feature. Compared with current descriptor-based methods, our TET method needs not to compute descriptors and detect line features repeatedly. Naturally, it has an obvious advantage over computation. Experiments in several public benchmark datasets show our method yields highly competitive accuracy with an obvious advantage over speed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们针对相机位姿估计问题提出了一种新颖的基于稀疏光流（SOF）的线特征跟踪方法。该方法受到基于点的SOF算法的启发，并基于时变图像序列中的两个相邻图像满足亮度不变的观察而开发。基于这一观察，我们重新定义了线特征跟踪的目标：基于灰度值匹配而不是描述符匹配来跟踪线特征的两个端点而不是整条线。为了实现这一目标，提出了一种高效的两端点跟踪（TET）方法：首先，用其两个端点描述给定的线要素；接下来，基于SOF跟踪两个端点，通过最小化像素级灰度残差函数来获得两个新的跟踪端点；最后，连接两个跟踪端点以生成新的线要素。在给定的线特征和新的线特征之间建立对应关系。与当前基于描述符的方法相比，我们的 TET 方法不需要重复计算描述符和检测线特征。自然，它比计算有明显的优势。在多个公共基准数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法产生了极具竞争力的准确性，并且相对于速度具有明显的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏光流的线特征跟踪方法，用于相机姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于描述符的线特征跟踪方法计算量大，需重复检测线特征并计算描述符，影响效率。
AI.method: 提出高效双端点跟踪（TET）方法：通过光流跟踪线段两端点并最小化灰度残差，无需重复检测线特征或计算描述符。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上验证，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升计算速度。
AI.conclusion: TET方法通过端点跟踪替代传统描述符匹配，在计算效率和精度上优于现有方法。

conclusion: TET方法通过端点跟踪替代传统描述符匹配，在计算效率和精度上优于现有方法。
search_text: Sparse Optical Flow-Based Line Feature Tracking 基于稀疏光流的线路特征跟踪 In this paper we propose a novel sparse optical flow (SOF)-based line feature tracking method for the camera pose estimation problem. This method is inspired by the point-based SOF algorithm and developed based on an observation that two adjacent images in time-varying image sequences satisfy brightness invariant. Based on this observation, we re-define the goal of line feature tracking: track two endpoints of a line feature instead of the entire line based on gray value matching instead of descriptor matching. To achieve this goal, an efficient two endpoint tracking (TET) method is presented: first, describe a given line feature with its two endpoints; next, track the two endpoints based on SOF to obtain two new tracked endpoints by minimizing a pixel-level grayscale residual function; finally, connect the two tracked endpoints to generate a new line feature. The correspondence is established between the given and the new line feature. Compared with current descriptor-based methods, our TET method needs not to compute descriptors and detect line features repeatedly. Naturally, it has an obvious advantage over computation. Experiments in several public benchmark datasets show our method yields highly competitive accuracy with an obvious advantage over speed. 在本文中，我们针对相机位姿估计问题提出了一种新颖的基于稀疏光流（SOF）的线特征跟踪方法。该方法受到基于点的SOF算法的启发，并基于时变图像序列中的两个相邻图像满足亮度不变的观察而开发。基于这一观察，我们重新定义了线特征跟踪的目标：基于灰度值匹配而不是描述符匹配来跟踪线特征的两个端点而不是整条线。为了实现这一目标，提出了一种高效的两端点跟踪（TET）方法：首先，用其两个端点描述给定的线要素；接下来，基于SOF跟踪两个端点，通过最小化像素级灰度残差函数来获得两个新的跟踪端点；最后，连接两个跟踪端点以生成新的线要素。在给定的线特征和新的线特征之间建立对应关系。与当前基于描述符的方法相比，我们的 TET 方法不需要重复计算描述符和检测线特征。自然，它比计算有明显的优势。在多个公共基准数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法产生了极具竞争力的准确性，并且相对于速度具有明显的优势。 本文提出一种基于稀疏光流的线特征跟踪方法，用于相机姿态估计。 Qiang Fu,Hongshan Yu,Islam Ali,Hong Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Guolei Sun,Yun Liu,Henghui Ding,Min Wu,Luc Van Gool
title: Learning Local and Global Temporal Contexts for Video Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 学习视频语义分割的局部和全局时间上下文
comment: Accepted to TPAMI, an extended version of a paper published in CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to TPAMI, an extended version of a paper published in CVPR 2022
abstract: Contextual information plays a core role for video semantic segmentation (VSS). This paper summarizes contexts for VSS in two-fold: local temporal contexts (LTC) which define the contexts from neighboring frames, and global temporal contexts (GTC) which represent the contexts from the whole video. As for LTC, it includes static and motional contexts, corresponding to static and moving content in neighboring frames, respectively. Previously, both static and motional contexts have been studied. However, there is no research about simultaneously learning static and motional contexts (highly complementary). Hence, we propose a Coarse-to-Fine Feature Mining (CFFM) technique to learn a unified presentation of LTC. CFFM contains two parts: Coarse-to-Fine Feature Assembling (CFFA) and Cross-frame Feature Mining (CFM). CFFA abstracts static and motional contexts, and CFM mines useful information from nearby frames to enhance target features. To further exploit more temporal contexts, we propose CFFM++ by additionally learning GTC from the whole video. Specifically, we uniformly sample certain frames from the video and extract global contextual prototypes by k-means. The information within those prototypes is mined by CFM to refine target features. Experimental results on popular benchmarks demonstrate that CFFM and CFFM++ perform favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-CFFM
summary: Contextual information plays a core role for video semantic segmentation (VSS). This paper summarizes contexts for VSS in two-fold: local temporal contexts (LTC) which define the contexts from neighboring frames, and global temporal contexts (GTC) which represent the contexts from the whole video. As for LTC, it includes static and motional contexts, corresponding to static and moving content in neighboring frames, respectively. Previously, both static and motional contexts have been studied. However, there is no research about simultaneously learning static and motional contexts (highly complementary). Hence, we propose a Coarse-to-Fine Feature Mining (CFFM) technique to learn a unified presentation of LTC. CFFM contains two parts: Coarse-to-Fine Feature Assembling (CFFA) and Cross-frame Feature Mining (CFM). CFFA abstracts static and motional contexts, and CFM mines useful information from nearby frames to enhance target features. To further exploit more temporal contexts, we propose CFFM++ by additionally learning GTC from the whole video. Specifically, we uniformly sample certain frames from the video and extract global contextual prototypes by k-means. The information within those prototypes is mined by CFM to refine target features. Experimental results on popular benchmarks demonstrate that CFFM and CFFM++ perform favorably against state-of-the-art methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-CFFM
abstract_zh: 上下文信息在视频语义分割（VSS）中起着核心作用。本文从两方面总结了 VSS 的上下文：定义相邻帧上下文的局部时间上下文（LTC）和表示整个视频上下文的全局时间上下文（GTC）。对于LTC，它包括静态和运动上下文，分别对应于相邻帧中的静态和移动内容。此前，静态和动态环境都已被研究过。然而，还没有关于同时学习静态和动态上下文（高度互补）的研究。因此，我们提出了一种从粗到细的特征挖掘（CFFM）技术来学习 LTC 的统一表示。 CFFM包含两部分：粗到细特征组装（CFFA）和跨框架特征挖掘（CFM）。 CFFA 抽象静态和运动上下文，CFM 从附近帧挖掘有用信息以增强目标特征。为了进一步利用更多的时间上下文，我们通过从整个视频中额外学习 GTC 来提出 CFFM++。具体来说，我们从视频中统一采样某些帧，并通过 k 均值提取全局上下文原型。 CFM 挖掘这些原型中的信息来细化目标特征。流行基准测试的实验结果表明，CFFM 和 CFFM++ 的性能优于最先进的方法。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/GuoleiSun/VSS-CFFM

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合局部和全局时间上下文信息的方法，用于改进视频语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别探讨了静态和动态局部时间上下文，但缺乏同时学习两者（高度互补）的方法，且未充分挖掘全局视频上下文信息。
AI.method: 提出粗到细特征挖掘（CFFM）技术，包含粗到细特征组装（CFFA）和跨帧特征挖掘（CFM）两部分，分别抽象静态/动态上下文并增强目标特征；进一步通过CFFM++引入全局时间上下文（GTC），利用k-means提取全局原型并优化特征。
AI.result: 在主流基准数据集上实验表明，CFFM和CFFM++方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一建模局部静态/动态上下文与全局视频上下文，有效提升了视频语义分割的性能。

authors_text: Zheng Zeng,Chengke Xiong,Xinyi Yuan,Yulin Bai,Yufei Jin,Di Lu,Lian Lian
title: Information-driven Path Planning for Hybrid Aerial Underwater Vehicles
title_zh: 信息驱动的混合空中水下航行器路径规划
abstract: This paper presents a novel Rapidly-exploring Adaptive Sampling Tree (RAST) algorithm for the adaptive sampling mission of a hybrid aerial underwater vehicle (HAUV) in an air-sea 3D environment. This algorithm innovatively combines the tournament-based point selection sampling strategy, the information heuristic search process and the framework of Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) algorithm. Hence can guide the vehicle to the region of interest to scientists for sampling and generate a collision-free path for maximizing information collection by the HAUV under the constraints of environmental effects of currents or wind and limited budget. The simulation results show that the fast search adaptive sampling tree algorithm has higher optimization performance, faster solution speed and better stability than the Rapidly-exploring Information Gathering Tree (RIGT) algorithm and the particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm.
summary: This paper presents a novel Rapidly-exploring Adaptive Sampling Tree (RAST) algorithm for the adaptive sampling mission of a hybrid aerial underwater vehicle (HAUV) in an air-sea 3D environment. This algorithm innovatively combines the tournament-based point selection sampling strategy, the information heuristic search process and the framework of Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) algorithm. Hence can guide the vehicle to the region of interest to scientists for sampling and generate a collision-free path for maximizing information collection by the HAUV under the constraints of environmental effects of currents or wind and limited budget. The simulation results show that the fast search adaptive sampling tree algorithm has higher optimization performance, faster solution speed and better stability than the Rapidly-exploring Information Gathering Tree (RIGT) algorithm and the particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的快速探索自适应采样树（RAST）算法，用于海空 3D 环境中混合空中水下航行器（HAUV）的自适应采样任务。该算法创新性地结合了基于锦标赛的点选择采样策略、信息启发式搜索过程和快速探索随机树（RRT）算法的框架。因此可以引导车辆到科学家感兴趣的区域进行采样，并生成一条无碰撞路径，以在水流或风的环境影响和有限预算的约束下最大化HAUV的信息收集。仿真结果表明，快速搜索自适应采样树算法比快速探索信息收集树（RIGT）算法和粒子群优化（PSO）算法具有更高的优化性能、更快的求解速度和更好的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种信息驱动的路径规划算法，用于混合空水下车辆在三维空海环境中的自适应采样任务，以优化信息采集效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在动态环境下的路径规划效率不足，难以平衡信息采集与环境约束，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出快速探索自适应采样树（RAST）算法，融合锦标赛点选择策略、信息启发式搜索与RRT框架，实现环境约束下的最优路径规划。
AI.result: 仿真显示RAST在优化性能、求解速度和稳定性上优于RIGT和PSO算法，有效提升信息采集效率。
AI.conclusion: RAST算法有效解决HAUV在复杂环境中的路径规划问题，为海洋探测等应用提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: M. Madhiarasan,Partha Pratim Roy
title: A Comprehensive Review of Sign Language Recognition: Different Types, Modalities, and Datasets
title_zh: 手语识别的全面回顾：不同类型、模式和数据集
comment: communicated to the Computer Science Review (Elsevier) status With Editor
comments: communicated to the Computer Science Review (Elsevier) status With Editor
abstract: A machine can understand human activities, and the meaning of signs can help overcome the communication barriers between the inaudible and ordinary people. Sign Language Recognition (SLR) is a fascinating research area and a crucial task concerning computer vision and pattern recognition. Recently, SLR usage has increased in many applications, but the environment, background image resolution, modalities, and datasets affect the performance a lot. Many researchers have been striving to carry out generic real-time SLR models. This review paper facilitates a comprehensive overview of SLR and discusses the needs, challenges, and problems associated with SLR. We study related works about manual and non-manual, various modalities, and datasets. Research progress and existing state-of-the-art SLR models over the past decade have been reviewed. Finally, we find the research gap and limitations in this domain and suggest future directions. This review paper will be helpful for readers and researchers to get complete guidance about SLR and the progressive design of the state-of-the-art SLR model

abstract_zh: 机器可以理解人类的活动，而符号的含义可以帮助克服听不见的人和普通人之间的沟通障碍。手语识别（SLR）是一个令人着迷的研究领域，也是计算机视觉和模式识别方面的一项关键任务。最近，单反相机在许多应用中的使用有所增加，但环境、背景图像分辨率、模式和数据集对性能影响很大。许多研究人员一直在努力开展通用的实时单反模型。这篇综述文章有助于对 SLR 进行全面概述，并讨论与 SLR 相关的需求、挑战和问题。我们研究有关手动和非手动、各种模式和数据集的相关工作。回顾了过去十年的研究进展和现有最先进的单反模型。最后，我们发现该领域的研究差距和局限性，并提出未来的方向。这篇综述论文将有助于读者和研究人员获得有关 SLR 的完整指导以及最先进的 SLR 模型的渐进式设计

AI.tldr: 本文对手语识别（SLR）进行了全面综述，探讨了不同类型、模态和数据集的研究进展、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 手语识别在克服听障人士与普通人交流障碍中具有重要意义，但环境、数据集和模态差异影响模型性能，需系统总结现有研究以指导未来工作。
AI.method: 通过回顾过去十年的手语识别相关文献，分析手动和非手动特征、多模态方法及常用数据集，总结技术进展与局限性。
AI.result: 识别出手语识别领域在实时性、通用性和数据多样性方面的研究缺口，并提出未来技术改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为研究者提供了SLR领域的完整技术路线图，有助于推动更高效、通用的实时手语识别模型设计。

authors_text: Ngo Quang Huy,Tu Minh Phuong,Ngo Xuan Bach
title: Autoencoding Language Model Based Ensemble Learning for Commonsense Validation and Explanation
title_zh: 基于自动编码语言模型的集成学习用于常识验证和解释
abstract: An ultimate goal of artificial intelligence is to build computer systems that can understand human languages. Understanding commonsense knowledge about the world expressed in text is one of the foundational and challenging problems to create such intelligent systems. As a step towards this goal, we present in this paper ALMEn, an Autoencoding Language Model based Ensemble learning method for commonsense validation and explanation. By ensembling several advanced pre-trained language models including RoBERTa, DeBERTa, and ELECTRA with Siamese neural networks, our method can distinguish natural language statements that are against commonsense (validation subtask) and correctly identify the reason for making against commonsense (explanation selection subtask). Experimental results on the benchmark dataset of SemEval-2020 Task 4 show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models, reaching 97.9% and 95.4% accuracies on the validation and explanation selection subtasks, respectively.
summary: An ultimate goal of artificial intelligence is to build computer systems that can understand human languages. Understanding commonsense knowledge about the world expressed in text is one of the foundational and challenging problems to create such intelligent systems. As a step towards this goal, we present in this paper ALMEn, an Autoencoding Language Model based Ensemble learning method for commonsense validation and explanation. By ensembling several advanced pre-trained language models including RoBERTa, DeBERTa, and ELECTRA with Siamese neural networks, our method can distinguish natural language statements that are against commonsense (validation subtask) and correctly identify the reason for making against commonsense (explanation selection subtask). Experimental results on the benchmark dataset of SemEval-2020 Task 4 show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art models, reaching 97.9% and 95.4% accuracies on the validation and explanation selection subtasks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最终目标是构建能够理解人类语言的计算机系统。理解以文本表达的世界常识知识是创建此类智能系统的基础和挑战性问题之一。作为实现这一目标的一步，我们在本文中提出了 ALMEn，一种基于自动编码语言模型的集成学习方法，用于常识验证和解释。通过将 RoBERTa、DeBERTa 和 ELECTRA 等多种先进的预训练语言模型与 Siamese 神经网络集成，我们的方法可以区分违背常识的自然语言语句（验证子任务），并正确识别违背常识的原因（解释选择子任务）。 SemEval-2020 Task 4 基准数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的模型，在验证和解释选择子任务上分别达到 97.9% 和 95.4% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自动编码语言模型的集成学习方法，用于常识验证和解释。
AI.motivation: 理解常识知识是构建智能系统的基础，但现有方法在验证和解释常识方面存在挑战，需更有效的方法。
AI.method: 通过集成RoBERTa、DeBERTa、ELECTRA等预训练模型，并结合Siamese神经网络，实现常识验证和解释选择。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2020 Task 4数据集上，验证和解释选择子任务的准确率分别达到97.9%和95.4%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ALMEn方法通过集成多个先进模型和Siamese网络，在常识验证和解释任务中表现出色，展示了其有效性。

authors_text: Kumar Abhishek,Colin J. Brown,Ghassan Hamarneh
title: Multi-Sample $ζ$-mixup: Richer, More Realistic Synthetic Samples from a $p$-Series Interpolant
title_zh: 多样本 $z$ 混合：来自 $p$ 系列插值的更丰富、更真实的合成样本
abstract: Modern deep learning training procedures rely on model regularization techniques such as data augmentation methods, which generate training samples that increase the diversity of data and richness of label information. A popular recent method, mixup, uses convex combinations of pairs of original samples to generate new samples. However, as we show in our experiments, mixup can produce undesirable synthetic samples, where the data is sampled off the manifold and can contain incorrect labels. We propose $ζ$-mixup, a generalization of mixup with provably and demonstrably desirable properties that allows convex combinations of $N \geq 2$ samples, leading to more realistic and diverse outputs that incorporate information from $N$ original samples by using a $p$-series interpolant. We show that, compared to mixup, $ζ$-mixup better preserves the intrinsic dimensionality of the original datasets, which is a desirable property for training generalizable models. Furthermore, we show that our implementation of $ζ$-mixup is faster than mixup, and extensive evaluation on controlled synthetic and 24 real-world natural and medical image classification datasets shows that $ζ$-mixup outperforms mixup and traditional data augmentation techniques.
summary: Modern deep learning training procedures rely on model regularization techniques such as data augmentation methods, which generate training samples that increase the diversity of data and richness of label information. A popular recent method, mixup, uses convex combinations of pairs of original samples to generate new samples. However, as we show in our experiments, mixup can produce undesirable synthetic samples, where the data is sampled off the manifold and can contain incorrect labels. We propose $ζ$-mixup, a generalization of mixup with provably and demonstrably desirable properties that allows convex combinations of $N \geq 2$ samples, leading to more realistic and diverse outputs that incorporate information from $N$ original samples by using a $p$-series interpolant. We show that, compared to mixup, $ζ$-mixup better preserves the intrinsic dimensionality of the original datasets, which is a desirable property for training generalizable models. Furthermore, we show that our implementation of $ζ$-mixup is faster than mixup, and extensive evaluation on controlled synthetic and 24 real-world natural and medical image classification datasets shows that $ζ$-mixup outperforms mixup and traditional data augmentation techniques.
abstract_zh: 现代深度学习训练过程依赖于数据增强方法等模型正则化技术，这些技术生成的训练样本可以增加数据的多样性和标签信息的丰富性。最近流行的方法是 mixup，它使用原始样本对的凸组合来生成新样本。然而，正如我们在实验中所示，混合可能会产生不需要的合成样本，其中数据是从流形中采样的，并且可能包含不正确的标签。我们提出$ z$-mixup，这是一种具有可证明且可证明的理想属性的混合推广，允许$N \geq 2$样本的凸组合，从而通过使用$p$系列插值来合并来自$N$原始样本的信息，从而产生更真实和多样化的输出。我们表明，与 mixup 相比，$z$-mixup 更好地保留了原始数据集的内在维度，这是训练可推广模型的理想属性。此外，我们表明我们的$ z $ - mixup的实现比mixup更快，并且对受控合成和24个真实世界的自然和医学图像分类数据集的广泛评估表明$ z $ - mixup优于mixup和传统的数据增强技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ζ-mixup的数据增强方法，通过使用p级数插值技术生成更真实、多样化的合成样本，以改进传统mixup方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有mixup方法生成的合成样本可能偏离数据流形且包含错误标签，导致模型训练效果受限。需开发一种能更好保持数据内在结构并提升模型泛化能力的增强技术。
AI.method: ζ-mixup通过凸组合N≥2个样本生成合成数据，利用p级数插值技术替代传统线性插值，有效保留原始数据集的内在维度特性。
AI.result: 实验表明ζ-mixup在24个真实世界图像分类数据集和合成数据集上均优于mixup及传统数据增强方法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: ζ-mixup通过多样本插值机制显著提升了合成样本的真实性与多样性，为深度学习模型训练提供了更优的数据增强方案。

method: ζ-mixup通过凸组合N≥2个样本生成合成数据，利用p级数插值技术替代传统线性插值，有效保留原始数据集的内在维度特性。

conclusion: ζ-mixup通过多样本插值机制显著提升了合成样本的真实性与多样性，为深度学习模型训练提供了更优的数据增强方案。
search_text: Multi-Sample $ζ$-mixup: Richer, More Realistic Synthetic Samples from a $p$-Series Interpolant 多样本 $z$ 混合：来自 $p$ 系列插值的更丰富、更真实的合成样本 Modern deep learning training procedures rely on model regularization techniques such as data augmentation methods, which generate training samples that increase the diversity of data and richness of label information. A popular recent method, mixup, uses convex combinations of pairs of original samples to generate new samples. However, as we show in our experiments, mixup can produce undesirable synthetic samples, where the data is sampled off the manifold and can contain incorrect labels. We propose $ζ$-mixup, a generalization of mixup with provably and demonstrably desirable properties that allows convex combinations of $N \geq 2$ samples, leading to more realistic and diverse outputs that incorporate information from $N$ original samples by using a $p$-series interpolant. We show that, compared to mixup, $ζ$-mixup better preserves the intrinsic dimensionality of the original datasets, which is a desirable property for training generalizable models. Furthermore, we show that our implementation of $ζ$-mixup is faster than mixup, and extensive evaluation on controlled synthetic and 24 real-world natural and medical image classification datasets shows that $ζ$-mixup outperforms mixup and traditional data augmentation techniques. 现代深度学习训练过程依赖于数据增强方法等模型正则化技术，这些技术生成的训练样本可以增加数据的多样性和标签信息的丰富性。最近流行的方法是 mixup，它使用原始样本对的凸组合来生成新样本。然而，正如我们在实验中所示，混合可能会产生不需要的合成样本，其中数据是从流形中采样的，并且可能包含不正确的标签。我们提出$ z$-mixup，这是一种具有可证明且可证明的理想属性的混合推广，允许$N \geq 2$样本的凸组合，从而通过使用$p$系列插值来合并来自$N$原始样本的信息，从而产生更真实和多样化的输出。我们表明，与 mixup 相比，$z$-mixup 更好地保留了原始数据集的内在维度，这是训练可推广模型的理想属性。此外，我们表明我们的$ z $ - mixup的实现比mixup更快，并且对受控合成和24个真实世界的自然和医学图像分类数据集的广泛评估表明$ z $ - mixup优于mixup和传统的数据增强技术。 本文提出了一种名为ζ-mixup的数据增强方法，通过使用p级数插值技术生成更真实、多样化的合成样本，以改进传统mixup方法的不足。 Kumar Abhishek,Colin J. Brown,Ghassan Hamarneh cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Meihong Wu,Xiaoyan Cao,Shihui Guo
title: Swarm behavior tracking based on a deep vision algorithm
title_zh: 基于深度视觉算法的群体行为跟踪
abstract: The intelligent swarm behavior of social insects (such as ants) springs up in different environments, promising to provide insights for the study of embodied intelligence. Researching swarm behavior requires that researchers could accurately track each individual over time. Obviously, manually labeling individual insects in a video is labor-intensive. Automatic tracking methods, however, also poses serious challenges: (1) individuals are small and similar in appearance; (2) frequent interactions with each other cause severe and long-term occlusion. With the advances of artificial intelligence and computing vision technologies, we are hopeful to provide a tool to automate monitor multiple insects to address the above challenges. In this paper, we propose a detection and tracking framework for multi-ant tracking in the videos by: (1) adopting a two-stage object detection framework using ResNet-50 as backbone and coding the position of regions of interest to locate ants accurately; (2) using the ResNet model to develop the appearance descriptors of ants; (3) constructing long-term appearance sequences and combining them with motion information to achieve online tracking. To validate our method, we construct an ant database including 10 videos of ants from different indoor and outdoor scenes. We achieve a state-of-the-art performance of 95.7\% mMOTA and 81.1\% mMOTP in indoor videos, 81.8\% mMOTA and 81.9\% mMOTP in outdoor videos. Additionally, Our method runs 6-10 times faster than existing methods for insect tracking. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides a powerful tool for accelerating the unraveling of the mechanisms underlying the swarm behavior of social insects.
summary: The intelligent swarm behavior of social insects (such as ants) springs up in different environments, promising to provide insights for the study of embodied intelligence. Researching swarm behavior requires that researchers could accurately track each individual over time. Obviously, manually labeling individual insects in a video is labor-intensive. Automatic tracking methods, however, also poses serious challenges: (1) individuals are small and similar in appearance; (2) frequent interactions with each other cause severe and long-term occlusion. With the advances of artificial intelligence and computing vision technologies, we are hopeful to provide a tool to automate monitor multiple insects to address the above challenges. In this paper, we propose a detection and tracking framework for multi-ant tracking in the videos by: (1) adopting a two-stage object detection framework using ResNet-50 as backbone and coding the position of regions of interest to locate ants accurately; (2) using the ResNet model to develop the appearance descriptors of ants; (3) constructing long-term appearance sequences and combining them with motion information to achieve online tracking. To validate our method, we construct an ant database including 10 videos of ants from different indoor and outdoor scenes. We achieve a state-of-the-art performance of 95.7\% mMOTA and 81.1\% mMOTP in indoor videos, 81.8\% mMOTA and 81.9\% mMOTP in outdoor videos. Additionally, Our method runs 6-10 times faster than existing methods for insect tracking. Experimental results demonstrate that our method provides a powerful tool for accelerating the unraveling of the mechanisms underlying the swarm behavior of social insects.
abstract_zh: 社会性昆虫（如蚂蚁）的智能群体行为在不同的环境中涌现，有望为具身智能的研究提供见解。研究群体行为要求研究人员能够随着时间的推移准确跟踪每个个体。显然，手动标记视频中的单个昆虫是劳动密集型的。然而，自动跟踪方法也带来了严峻的挑战：（1）个体较小且外表相似； (2)彼此频繁的相互作用造成严重且长期的闭塞。随着人工智能和计算视觉技术的进步，我们希望提供一种自动监测多种昆虫的工具来应对上述挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于视频中多蚂蚁跟踪的检测和跟踪框架：（1）采用以ResNet-50为骨干的两阶段目标检测框架，并对感兴趣区域的位置进行编码以准确定位蚂蚁； (2)利用ResNet模型开发蚂蚁的外观描述符； (3)构建长期外观序列并将其与运动信息相结合实现在线跟踪。为了验证我们的方法，我们构建了一个蚂蚁数据库，其中包含来自不同室内和室外场景的 10 个蚂蚁视频。我们在室内视频中实现了 95.7\% mMOTA 和 81.1\% mMOTP，在室外视频中实现了 81.8\% mMOTA 和 81.9\% mMOTP 的最先进性能。此外，我们的方法的运行速度比现有的昆虫追踪方法快 6-10 倍。实验结果表明，我们的方法提供了一个强大的工具，可以加速揭示社会性昆虫群体行为的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度视觉算法的群体行为跟踪方法，用于自动追踪视频中的多只蚂蚁。
AI.motivation: 研究社会性昆虫（如蚂蚁）的群体行为需要准确追踪个体，但手动标注费时且现有自动方法面临个体相似、遮挡严重等挑战。
AI.method: 采用两阶段目标检测框架（ResNet-50为骨干网络）定位蚂蚁，结合外观描述子与运动信息构建长期序列实现在线跟踪。
AI.result: 在室内视频中达到95.7% mMOTA和81.1% mMOTP，室外视频为81.8% mMOTA和81.9% mMOTP，速度比现有方法快6-10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解析社会性昆虫群体行为机制提供了高效工具，验证了深度视觉算法在群体行为研究中的有效性。

authors_text: Nick J. C. Wang,Lu Wang,Yandan Sun,Haimei Kang,Dejun Zhang
title: Three-Module Modeling For End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding Using Pre-trained DNN-HMM-Based Acoustic-Phonetic Model
title_zh: 使用预训练的基于 DNN-HMM 的声学语音模型进行端到端口语理解的三模块建模
abstract: In spoken language understanding (SLU), what the user says is converted to his/her intent. Recent work on end-to-end SLU has shown that accuracy can be improved via pre-training approaches. We revisit ideas presented by Lugosch et al. using speech pre-training and three-module modeling; however, to ease construction of the end-to-end SLU model, we use as our phoneme module an open-source acoustic-phonetic model from a DNN-HMM hybrid automatic speech recognition (ASR) system instead of training one from scratch. Hence we fine-tune on speech only for the word module, and we apply multi-target learning (MTL) on the word and intent modules to jointly optimize SLU performance. MTL yields a relative reduction of 40% in intent-classification error rates (from 1.0% to 0.6%). Note that our three-module model is a streaming method. The final outcome of the proposed three-module modeling approach yields an intent accuracy of 99.4% on FluentSpeech, an intent error rate reduction of 50% compared to that of Lugosch et al. Although we focus on real-time streaming methods, we also list non-streaming methods for comparison.
summary: In spoken language understanding (SLU), what the user says is converted to his/her intent. Recent work on end-to-end SLU has shown that accuracy can be improved via pre-training approaches. We revisit ideas presented by Lugosch et al. using speech pre-training and three-module modeling; however, to ease construction of the end-to-end SLU model, we use as our phoneme module an open-source acoustic-phonetic model from a DNN-HMM hybrid automatic speech recognition (ASR) system instead of training one from scratch. Hence we fine-tune on speech only for the word module, and we apply multi-target learning (MTL) on the word and intent modules to jointly optimize SLU performance. MTL yields a relative reduction of 40% in intent-classification error rates (from 1.0% to 0.6%). Note that our three-module model is a streaming method. The final outcome of the proposed three-module modeling approach yields an intent accuracy of 99.4% on FluentSpeech, an intent error rate reduction of 50% compared to that of Lugosch et al. Although we focus on real-time streaming methods, we also list non-streaming methods for comparison.
abstract_zh: 在口语理解（SLU）中，用户所说的内容被转换为他/她的意图。最近关于端到端 SLU 的工作表明，可以通过预训练方法提高准确性。我们重新审视 Lugosch 等人提出的想法。使用语音预训练和三模块建模；然而，为了简化端到端 SLU 模型的构建，我们使用来自 DNN-HMM 混合自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的开源声学语音模型作为音素模块，而不是从头开始训练。因此，我们仅对单词模块的语音进行微调，并对单词和意图模块应用多目标学习 (MTL)，以共同优化 SLU 性能。 MTL 使意图分类错误率相对降低了 40%（从 1.0% 降至 0.6%）。请注意，我们的三模块模型是流式方法。所提出的三模块建模方法的最终结果在 FluentSpeech 上产生了 99.4% 的意图准确性，与 Lugosch 等人的结果相比，意图错误率降低了 50%。虽然我们专注于实时流方法，但我们也列出了非流方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练DNN-HMM声学-音素模型的三模块端到端语音意图理解方法。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端语音意图理解（SLU）方法需从头训练音素模块，耗时耗资源，且未充分利用预训练模型优势。
AI.method: 采用开源DNN-HMM声学模型作为音素模块，仅对词模块进行语音微调，并通过多目标学习（MTL）联合优化词和意图模块，实现流式实时处理。
AI.result: 在FluentSpeech数据集上达到99.4%意图准确率，相较Lugosch等人的方法意图错误率降低50%（从1.0%降至0.6%）。
AI.conclusion: 三模块建模结合MTL显著提升SLU性能，预训练声学模型与流式设计兼顾效率与效果，为实时语音理解提供有效方案。

Although we focus on real-time streaming methods, we also list non-streaming methods for comparison. 在口语理解（SLU）中，用户所说的内容被转换为他/她的意图。最近关于端到端 SLU 的工作表明，可以通过预训练方法提高准确性。我们重新审视 Lugosch 等人提出的想法。使用语音预训练和三模块建模；然而，为了简化端到端 SLU 模型的构建，我们使用来自 DNN-HMM 混合自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的开源声学语音模型作为音素模块，而不是从头开始训练。因此，我们仅对单词模块的语音进行微调，并对单词和意图模块应用多目标学习 (MTL)，以共同优化 SLU 性能。 MTL 使意图分类错误率相对降低了 40%（从 1.0% 降至 0.6%）。请注意，我们的三模块模型是流式方法。所提出的三模块建模方法的最终结果在 FluentSpeech 上产生了 99.4% 的意图准确性，与 Lugosch 等人的结果相比，意图错误率降低了 50%。虽然我们专注于实时流方法，但我们也列出了非流方法进行比较。 本文提出一种基于预训练DNN-HMM声学-音素模型的三模块端到端语音意图理解方法。 Nick J. C. Wang,Lu Wang,Yandan Sun,Haimei Kang,Dejun Zhang cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ryandhimas E. Zezario,Szu-wei Fu,Fei Chen,Chiou-Shann Fuh,Hsin-Min Wang,Yu Tsao
title: MTI-Net: A Multi-Target Speech Intelligibility Prediction Model
title_zh: MTI-Net：多目标语音清晰度预测模型
abstract: Recently, deep learning (DL)-based non-intrusive speech assessment models have attracted great attention. Many studies report that these DL-based models yield satisfactory assessment performance and good flexibility, but their performance in unseen environments remains a challenge. Furthermore, compared to quality scores, fewer studies elaborate deep learning models to estimate intelligibility scores. This study proposes a multi-task speech intelligibility prediction model, called MTI-Net, for simultaneously predicting human and machine intelligibility measures. Specifically, given a speech utterance, MTI-Net is designed to predict human subjective listening test results and word error rate (WER) scores. We also investigate several methods that can improve the prediction performance of MTI-Net. First, we compare different features (including low-level features and embeddings from self-supervised learning (SSL) models) and prediction targets of MTI-Net. Second, we explore the effect of transfer learning and multi-tasking learning on training MTI-Net. Finally, we examine the potential advantages of fine-tuning SSL embeddings. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of using cross-domain features, multi-task learning, and fine-tuning SSL embeddings. Furthermore, it is confirmed that the intelligibility and WER scores predicted by MTI-Net are highly correlated with the ground-truth scores.
summary: Recently, deep learning (DL)-based non-intrusive speech assessment models have attracted great attention. Many studies report that these DL-based models yield satisfactory assessment performance and good flexibility, but their performance in unseen environments remains a challenge. Furthermore, compared to quality scores, fewer studies elaborate deep learning models to estimate intelligibility scores. This study proposes a multi-task speech intelligibility prediction model, called MTI-Net, for simultaneously predicting human and machine intelligibility measures. Specifically, given a speech utterance, MTI-Net is designed to predict human subjective listening test results and word error rate (WER) scores. We also investigate several methods that can improve the prediction performance of MTI-Net. First, we compare different features (including low-level features and embeddings from self-supervised learning (SSL) models) and prediction targets of MTI-Net. Second, we explore the effect of transfer learning and multi-tasking learning on training MTI-Net. Finally, we examine the potential advantages of fine-tuning SSL embeddings. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of using cross-domain features, multi-task learning, and fine-tuning SSL embeddings. Furthermore, it is confirmed that the intelligibility and WER scores predicted by MTI-Net are highly correlated with the ground-truth scores.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习（DL）的非侵入式语音评估模型引起了极大的关注。许多研究报告称，这些基于深度学习的模型产生了令人满意的评估性能和良好的灵活性，但它们在看不见的环境中的性能仍然是一个挑战。此外，与质量分数相比，很少有研究详细阐述深度学习模型来估计可懂度分数。本研究提出了一种多任务语音清晰度预测模型，称为 MTI-Net，用于同时预测人类和机器清晰度测量。具体来说，给定语音话语，MTI-Net 旨在预测人类主观听力测试结果和单词错误率 (WER) 分数。我们还研究了几种可以提高 MTI-Net 预测性能的方法。首先，我们比较 MTI-Net 的不同特征（包括低级特征和来自自监督学习（SSL）模型的嵌入）和预测目标。其次，我们探讨了迁移学习和多任务学习对训练 MTI-Net 的影响。最后，我们研究了微调 SSL 嵌入的潜在优势。实验结果证明了使用跨域特征、多任务学习和微调 SSL 嵌入的有效性。此外，还证实 MTI-Net 预测的可懂度和 WER 分数与真实分数高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多目标语音可懂度预测模型MTI-Net，用于同时预测人类主观测试结果和词错误率（WER）。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习语音评估模型在未见过的环境中表现不足，且针对可懂度评分的研究较少，需开发兼顾可懂度与质量评估的模型。
AI.method: 设计MTI-Net模型，对比低级特征与自监督学习嵌入，探索迁移学习、多任务学习及微调SSL嵌入对预测性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，跨域特征、多任务学习和微调SSL嵌入有效，预测的可懂度和WER与真实值高度相关。
AI.conclusion: MTI-Net通过多任务学习和特征优化显著提升了语音可懂度预测性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Xiaoxue Gao,Chitralekha Gupta,Haizhou Li
title: Genre-conditioned Acoustic Models for Automatic Lyrics Transcription of Polyphonic Music
title_zh: 用于复调音乐歌词自动转录的流派调节声学模型
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted by IEEE ICASSP 2022
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted by IEEE ICASSP 2022
abstract: Lyrics transcription of polyphonic music is challenging not only because the singing vocals are corrupted by the background music, but also because the background music and the singing style vary across music genres, such as pop, metal, and hip hop, which affects lyrics intelligibility of the song in different ways. In this work, we propose to transcribe the lyrics of polyphonic music using a novel genre-conditioned network. The proposed network adopts pre-trained model parameters, and incorporates the genre adapters between layers to capture different genre peculiarities for lyrics-genre pairs, thereby only requiring lightweight genre-specific parameters for training. Our experiments show that the proposed genre-conditioned network outperforms the existing lyrics transcription systems.
summary: Lyrics transcription of polyphonic music is challenging not only because the singing vocals are corrupted by the background music, but also because the background music and the singing style vary across music genres, such as pop, metal, and hip hop, which affects lyrics intelligibility of the song in different ways. In this work, we propose to transcribe the lyrics of polyphonic music using a novel genre-conditioned network. The proposed network adopts pre-trained model parameters, and incorporates the genre adapters between layers to capture different genre peculiarities for lyrics-genre pairs, thereby only requiring lightweight genre-specific parameters for training. Our experiments show that the proposed genre-conditioned network outperforms the existing lyrics transcription systems.
abstract_zh: 复调音乐的歌词转录具有挑战性，不仅因为背景音乐破坏了歌声，还因为流行、金属和嘻哈等音乐流派的背景音乐和演唱风格各不相同，这会以不同的方式影响歌曲的歌词清晰度。在这项工作中，我们建议使用一种新颖的流派条件网络来转录复调音乐的歌词。所提出的网络采用预训练的模型参数，并在层之间结合流派适配器来捕获歌词流派对的不同流派特性，从而只需要轻量级的流派特定参数进行训练。我们的实验表明，所提出的流派条件网络优于现有的歌词转录系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音乐类型的声学模型，用于解决多声部音乐中歌词转录因背景音乐和演唱风格差异导致的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有歌词转录系统难以处理不同音乐类型（如流行、金属、嘻哈）中背景音乐与演唱风格差异对歌词清晰度的影响。
AI.method: 采用预训练模型参数，并在模型层间插入类型适配器，通过轻量级参数捕捉不同音乐类型的特征差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，该类型条件网络在歌词转录任务上优于现有系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多声部音乐中类型差异对歌词转录的影响，为跨类型语音处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ryandhimas E. Zezario,Fei Chen,Chiou-Shann Fuh,Hsin-Min Wang,Yu Tsao
title: MBI-Net: A Non-Intrusive Multi-Branched Speech Intelligibility Prediction Model for Hearing Aids
title_zh: MBI-Net：一种用于助听器的非侵入式多分支语音清晰度预测模型
abstract: Improving the user's hearing ability to understand speech in noisy environments is critical to the development of hearing aid (HA) devices. For this, it is important to derive a metric that can fairly predict speech intelligibility for HA users. A straightforward approach is to conduct a subjective listening test and use the test results as an evaluation metric. However, conducting large-scale listening tests is time-consuming and expensive. Therefore, several evaluation metrics were derived as surrogates for subjective listening test results. In this study, we propose a multi-branched speech intelligibility prediction model (MBI-Net), for predicting the subjective intelligibility scores of HA users. MBI-Net consists of two branches of models, with each branch consisting of a hearing loss model, a cross-domain feature extraction module, and a speech intelligibility prediction model, to process speech signals from one channel. The outputs of the two branches are fused through a linear layer to obtain predicted speech intelligibility scores. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of MBI-Net, which produces higher prediction scores than the baseline system in Track 1 and Track 2 on the Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022 dataset.
summary: Improving the user's hearing ability to understand speech in noisy environments is critical to the development of hearing aid (HA) devices. For this, it is important to derive a metric that can fairly predict speech intelligibility for HA users. A straightforward approach is to conduct a subjective listening test and use the test results as an evaluation metric. However, conducting large-scale listening tests is time-consuming and expensive. Therefore, several evaluation metrics were derived as surrogates for subjective listening test results. In this study, we propose a multi-branched speech intelligibility prediction model (MBI-Net), for predicting the subjective intelligibility scores of HA users. MBI-Net consists of two branches of models, with each branch consisting of a hearing loss model, a cross-domain feature extraction module, and a speech intelligibility prediction model, to process speech signals from one channel. The outputs of the two branches are fused through a linear layer to obtain predicted speech intelligibility scores. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of MBI-Net, which produces higher prediction scores than the baseline system in Track 1 and Track 2 on the Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022 dataset.
abstract_zh: 提高用户在嘈杂环境中理解语音的听力能力对于助听器 (HA) 设备的开发至关重要。为此，重要的是导出一个可以公平预测 HA 用户语音清晰度的指标。一种直接的方法是进行主观听力测试，并将测试结果作为评估指标。然而，进行大规模的听力测试既耗时又昂贵。因此，得出了几个评估指标作为主观听力测试结果的替代指标。在本研究中，我们提出了一种多分支语音清晰度预测模型（MBI-Net），用于预测 HA 用户的主观清晰度得分。 MBI-Net由两个模型分支组成，每个分支由听力损失模型、跨域特征提取模块和语音清晰度预测模型组成，用于处理来自一个通道的语音信号。两个分支的输出通过线性层融合以获得预测的语音清晰度分数。实验结果证实了 MBI-Net 的有效性，它在 Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022 数据集上的 Track 1 和 Track 2 中产生了比基线系统更高的预测分数。

AI.tldr: 提出一种非侵入式多分支语音可懂度预测模型MBI-Net，用于预测助听器用户的主观可懂度分数。
AI.motivation: 传统主观听力测试成本高且耗时，需开发高效替代指标以评估助听器性能。
AI.method: 采用双分支结构，每分支含听力损失模型、跨域特征提取模块和预测模型，通过线性层融合输出。
AI.result: 在Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022数据集上，MBI-Net在Track 1和Track 2的预测得分高于基线系统。
AI.conclusion: MBI-Net有效提升预测性能，具有助听器优化的实用价值。

search_text: MBI-Net: A Non-Intrusive Multi-Branched Speech Intelligibility Prediction Model for Hearing Aids MBI-Net：一种用于助听器的非侵入式多分支语音清晰度预测模型 Improving the user's hearing ability to understand speech in noisy environments is critical to the development of hearing aid (HA) devices. For this, it is important to derive a metric that can fairly predict speech intelligibility for HA users. A straightforward approach is to conduct a subjective listening test and use the test results as an evaluation metric. However, conducting large-scale listening tests is time-consuming and expensive. Therefore, several evaluation metrics were derived as surrogates for subjective listening test results. In this study, we propose a multi-branched speech intelligibility prediction model (MBI-Net), for predicting the subjective intelligibility scores of HA users. MBI-Net consists of two branches of models, with each branch consisting of a hearing loss model, a cross-domain feature extraction module, and a speech intelligibility prediction model, to process speech signals from one channel. The outputs of the two branches are fused through a linear layer to obtain predicted speech intelligibility scores. Experimental results confirm the effectiveness of MBI-Net, which produces higher prediction scores than the baseline system in Track 1 and Track 2 on the Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022 dataset. 提高用户在嘈杂环境中理解语音的听力能力对于助听器 (HA) 设备的开发至关重要。为此，重要的是导出一个可以公平预测 HA 用户语音清晰度的指标。一种直接的方法是进行主观听力测试，并将测试结果作为评估指标。然而，进行大规模的听力测试既耗时又昂贵。因此，得出了几个评估指标作为主观听力测试结果的替代指标。在本研究中，我们提出了一种多分支语音清晰度预测模型（MBI-Net），用于预测 HA 用户的主观清晰度得分。 MBI-Net由两个模型分支组成，每个分支由听力损失模型、跨域特征提取模块和语音清晰度预测模型组成，用于处理来自一个通道的语音信号。两个分支的输出通过线性层融合以获得预测的语音清晰度分数。实验结果证实了 MBI-Net 的有效性，它在 Clarity Prediction Challenge 2022 数据集上的 Track 1 和 Track 2 中产生了比基线系统更高的预测分数。 提出一种非侵入式多分支语音可懂度预测模型MBI-Net，用于预测助听器用户的主观可懂度分数。 Ryandhimas E. authors_text: Chao Wang,Jiaxuan Zhao,Lingling Li,Licheng Jiao,Jing Liu,Kai Wu
title: A Multi-Transformation Evolutionary Framework for Influence Maximization in Social Networks
title_zh: 社交网络影响力最大化的多重转型进化框架
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Computational Intelligence Magazine for publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE Computational Intelligence Magazine for publication
abstract: Influence maximization is a crucial issue for mining the deep information of social networks, which aims to select a seed set from the network to maximize the number of influenced nodes. To evaluate the influence spread of a seed set efficiently, existing studies have proposed transformations with lower computational costs to replace the expensive Monte Carlo simulation process. These alternate transformations, based on network prior knowledge, induce different search behaviors with similar characteristics to various perspectives. Specifically, it is difficult for users to determine a suitable transformation a priori. This article proposes a multi-transformation evolutionary framework for influence maximization (MTEFIM) with convergence guarantees to exploit the potential similarities and unique advantages of alternate transformations and to avoid users manually determining the most suitable one. In MTEFIM, multiple transformations are optimized simultaneously as multiple tasks. Each transformation is assigned an evolutionary solver. Three major components of MTEFIM are conducted via: 1) estimating the potential relationship across transformations based on the degree of overlap across individuals of different populations, 2) transferring individuals across populations adaptively according to the inter-transformation relationship, and 3) selecting the final output seed set containing all the transformation's knowledge. The effectiveness of MTEFIM is validated on both benchmarks and real-world social networks. The experimental results show that MTEFIM can efficiently utilize the potentially transferable knowledge across multiple transformations to achieve highly competitive performance compared to several popular IM-specific methods. The implementation of MTEFIM can be accessed at https://github.com/xiaofangxd/MTEFIM.

To evaluate the influence spread of a seed set efficiently, existing studies have proposed transformations with lower computational costs to replace the expensive Monte Carlo simulation process. These alternate transformations, based on network prior knowledge, induce different search behaviors with similar characteristics to various perspectives. Specifically, it is difficult for users to determine a suitable transformation a priori. This article proposes a multi-transformation evolutionary framework for influence maximization (MTEFIM) with convergence guarantees to exploit the potential similarities and unique advantages of alternate transformations and to avoid users manually determining the most suitable one. In MTEFIM, multiple transformations are optimized simultaneously as multiple tasks. Each transformation is assigned an evolutionary solver. Three major components of MTEFIM are conducted via: 1) estimating the potential relationship across transformations based on the degree of overlap across individuals of different populations, 2) transferring individuals across populations adaptively according to the inter-transformation relationship, and 3) selecting the final output seed set containing all the transformation's knowledge. The effectiveness of MTEFIM is validated on both benchmarks and real-world social networks. The experimental results show that MTEFIM can efficiently utilize the potentially transferable knowledge across multiple transformations to achieve highly competitive performance compared to several popular IM-specific methods. The implementation of MTEFIM can be accessed at https://github.com/xiaofangxd/MTEFIM.
abstract_zh: 影响力最大化是挖掘社交网络深层信息的关键问题，其目的是从网络中选择种子集以最大化受影响节点的数量。为了有效评估种子集的影响力传播，现有研究提出了计算成本较低的变换来取代昂贵的蒙特卡罗模拟过程。这些基于网络先验知识的交替转换会引发不同视角的具有相似特征的不同搜索行为。具体来说，用户很难先验地确定合适的变换。本文提出了一种具有收敛保证的影响最大化的多变换进化框架（MTEFIM），以利用替代变换的潜在相似性和独特优势，并避免用户手动确定最合适的变换。在 MTEFIM 中，多个转换作为多个任务同时优化。每个变换都分配有一个进化求解器。 MTEFIM 的三个主要组成部分是通过以下方式进行的：1）根据不同种群个体之间的重叠程度来估计转换之间的潜在关系，2）根据转换间关系自适应地在种群之间转移个体，3）选择包含所有转换知识的最终输出种子集。 MTEFIM 的有效性在基准测试和现实社交网络上得到了验证。实验结果表明，与几种流行的 IM 特定方法相比，MTEFIM 可以有效地利用跨多个转换的潜在可转移知识，以实现极具竞争力的性能。 MTEFIM的实现可以访问https://github.com/xiaofangxd/MTEFIM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多转换进化框架（MTEFIM），用于在社交网络中高效解决影响力最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖单一转换替代蒙特卡洛模拟，但用户难以预先确定最优转换，导致性能受限。
AI.method: MTEFIM通过三个核心组件同时优化多个转换：1）基于种群个体重叠度估计转换间潜在关系；2）根据转换关系自适应迁移个体；3）融合多转换知识生成最终种子集。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和真实社交网络实验中，MTEFIM相比多种主流影响力最大化方法展现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MTEFIM通过跨转换知识迁移有效提升了影响力最大化效率，为无需人工干预的自动优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alessandro Lotti,Dario Modenini,Paolo Tortora,Massimiliano Saponara,Maria A. Perino
title: Deep Learning for Real Time Satellite Pose Estimation on Low Power Edge TPU
title_zh: 低功耗边缘 TPU 上的深度学习实时卫星位姿估计
comment: Improved literature review; added Figure 2; revised tables for better readibility; corrected typos
comments: Improved literature review; added Figure 2; revised tables for better readibility; corrected typos
abstract: Pose estimation of an uncooperative space resident object is a key asset towards autonomy in close proximity operations. In this context monocular cameras are a valuable solution because of their low system requirements. However, the associated image processing algorithms are either too computationally expensive for real time on-board implementation, or not enough accurate. In this paper we propose a pose estimation software exploiting neural network architectures which can be scaled to different accuracy-latency trade-offs. We designed our pipeline to be compatible with Edge Tensor Processing Units to show how low power machine learning accelerators could enable Artificial Intelligence exploitation in space. The neural networks were tested both on the benchmark Spacecraft Pose Estimation Dataset, and on the purposely developed Cosmo Photorealistic Dataset, which depicts a COSMO-SkyMed satellite in a variety of random poses and steerable solar panels orientations. The lightest version of our architecture achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on both datasets but at a fraction of networks complexity, running at 7.7 frames per second on a Coral Dev Board Mini consuming just 2.2W.
summary: Pose estimation of an uncooperative space resident object is a key asset towards autonomy in close proximity operations. In this context monocular cameras are a valuable solution because of their low system requirements. However, the associated image processing algorithms are either too computationally expensive for real time on-board implementation, or not enough accurate. In this paper we propose a pose estimation software exploiting neural network architectures which can be scaled to different accuracy-latency trade-offs. We designed our pipeline to be compatible with Edge Tensor Processing Units to show how low power machine learning accelerators could enable Artificial Intelligence exploitation in space. The neural networks were tested both on the benchmark Spacecraft Pose Estimation Dataset, and on the purposely developed Cosmo Photorealistic Dataset, which depicts a COSMO-SkyMed satellite in a variety of random poses and steerable solar panels orientations. The lightest version of our architecture achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on both datasets but at a fraction of networks complexity, running at 7.7 frames per second on a Coral Dev Board Mini consuming just 2.2W.
abstract_zh: 不合作的空间驻留物体的姿态估计是实现近距离操作自主性的关键资产。在这种情况下，单目相机因其系统要求低而成为一种有价值的解决方案。然而，相关的图像处理算法对于实时机载实现来说计算成本太高，或者不够准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用神经网络架构的姿态估计软件，该架构可以扩展到不同的精度-延迟权衡。我们设计的管道与边缘张量处理单元兼容，以展示低功耗机器学习加速器如何实现太空中的人工智能开发。神经网络在基准航天器姿态估计数据集和专门开发的 Cosmo 真实感数据集上进行了测试，该数据集描绘了处于各种随机姿态和可操纵太阳能电池板方向的 COSMO-SkyMed 卫星。我们架构的最轻版本在两个数据集上都实现了最先进的精度，但网络复杂性只有一小部分，在 Coral Dev Board Mini 上以每秒 7.7 帧的速度运行，功耗仅为 2.2W。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的低功耗边缘TPU实时卫星姿态估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星姿态估计算法存在计算复杂度高或精度不足的问题，而低功耗边缘计算硬件可为太空AI应用提供新方案。
AI.method: 设计可扩展的神经网络架构以平衡精度与延迟，适配Edge TPU硬件，并在两个数据集（Spacecraft Pose Estimation Dataset和Cosmo Photorealistic Dataset）进行验证。
AI.result: 轻量级模型在两个数据集均达到最先进水平，仅需2.2W功耗即可在Coral Dev Board Mini上实现7.7帧/秒的实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了低功耗边缘AI加速器可有效支持高精度卫星姿态估计，为太空自主操作提供可行方案。

search_text: Deep Learning for Real Time Satellite Pose Estimation on Low Power Edge TPU 低功耗边缘 TPU 上的深度学习实时卫星位姿估计 Pose estimation of an uncooperative space resident object is a key asset towards autonomy in close proximity operations. In this context monocular cameras are a valuable solution because of their low system requirements. However, the associated image processing algorithms are either too computationally expensive for real time on-board implementation, or not enough accurate. In this paper we propose a pose estimation software exploiting neural network architectures which can be scaled to different accuracy-latency trade-offs. We designed our pipeline to be compatible with Edge Tensor Processing Units to show how low power machine learning accelerators could enable Artificial Intelligence exploitation in space. The neural networks were tested both on the benchmark Spacecraft Pose Estimation Dataset, and on the purposely developed Cosmo Photorealistic Dataset, which depicts a COSMO-SkyMed satellite in a variety of random poses and steerable solar panels orientations. The lightest version of our architecture achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on both datasets but at a fraction of networks complexity, running at 7.7 frames per second on a Coral Dev Board Mini consuming just 2.2W. 不合作的空间驻留物体的姿态估计是实现近距离操作自主性的关键资产。在这种情况下，单目相机因其系统要求低而成为一种有价值的解决方案。然而，相关的图像处理算法对于实时机载实现来说计算成本太高，或者不够准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用神经网络架构的姿态估计软件，该架构可以扩展到不同的精度-延迟权衡。我们设计的管道与边缘张量处理单元兼容，以展示低功耗机器学习加速器如何实现太空中的人工智能开发。神经网络在基准航天器姿态估计数据集和专门开发的 Cosmo 真实感数据集上进行了测试，该数据集描绘了处于各种随机姿态和可操纵太阳能电池板方向的 COSMO-SkyMed 卫星。我们架构的最轻版本在两个数据集上都实现了最先进的精度，但网络复杂性只有一小部分，在 Coral Dev Board Mini 上以每秒 7.7 帧的速度运行，功耗仅为 2.2W。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的低功耗边缘TPU实时卫星姿态估计方法。 Alessandro Lotti,Dario Modenini,Paolo Tortora,Massimiliano Saponara,Maria A. Perino cs.CV

authors_text: Ensheng Shi,Yanlin Wang,Wenchao Gu,Lun Du,Hongyu Zhang,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang,Hongbin Sun
title: CoCoSoDa: Effective Contrastive Learning for Code Search
title_zh: CoCoSoDa：代码搜索的有效对比学习
comment: Accepted by ICSE 2023 (The 45th International Conference on Software Engineering)
comments: Accepted by ICSE 2023 (The 45th International Conference on Software Engineering)
abstract: Code search aims to retrieve semantically relevant code snippets for a given natural language query. Recently, many approaches employing contrastive learning have shown promising results on code representation learning and greatly improved the performance of code search. However, there is still a lot of room for improvement in using contrastive learning for code search. In this paper, we propose CoCoSoDa to effectively utilize contrastive learning for code search via two key factors in contrastive learning: data augmentation and negative samples. Specifically, soft data augmentation is to dynamically masking or replacing some tokens with their types for input sequences to generate positive samples. Momentum mechanism is used to generate large and consistent representations of negative samples in a mini-batch through maintaining a queue and a momentum encoder. In addition, multimodal contrastive learning is used to pull together representations of code-query pairs and push apart the unpaired code snippets and queries. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on a large-scale dataset with six programming languages. Experimental results show that: (1) CoCoSoDa outperforms 14 baselines and especially exceeds CodeBERT, GraphCodeBERT, and UniXcoder by 13.3%, 10.5%, and 5.9% on average MRR scores, respectively. (2) The ablation studies show the effectiveness of each component of our approach. (3) We adapt our techniques to several different pre-trained models such as RoBERTa, CodeBERT, and GraphCodeBERT and observe a significant boost in their performance in code search. (4) Our model performs robustly under different hyper-parameters. Furthermore, we perform qualitative and quantitative analyses to explore reasons behind the good performance of our model.
summary: Code search aims to retrieve semantically relevant code snippets for a given natural language query. Recently, many approaches employing contrastive learning have shown promising results on code representation learning and greatly improved the performance of code search. However, there is still a lot of room for improvement in using contrastive learning for code search. In this paper, we propose CoCoSoDa to effectively utilize contrastive learning for code search via two key factors in contrastive learning: data augmentation and negative samples. Specifically, soft data augmentation is to dynamically masking or replacing some tokens with their types for input sequences to generate positive samples. Momentum mechanism is used to generate large and consistent representations of negative samples in a mini-batch through maintaining a queue and a momentum encoder. In addition, multimodal contrastive learning is used to pull together representations of code-query pairs and push apart the unpaired code snippets and queries. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on a large-scale dataset with six programming languages. Experimental results show that: (1) CoCoSoDa outperforms 14 baselines and especially exceeds CodeBERT, GraphCodeBERT, and UniXcoder by 13.3%, 10.5%, and 5.9% on average MRR scores, respectively. (2) The ablation studies show the effectiveness of each component of our approach. (3) We adapt our techniques to several different pre-trained models such as RoBERTa, CodeBERT, and GraphCodeBERT and observe a significant boost in their performance in code search. (4) Our model performs robustly under different hyper-parameters. Furthermore, we perform qualitative and quantitative analyses to explore reasons behind the good performance of our model.
abstract_zh: 代码搜索旨在为给定的自然语言查询检索语义相关的代码片段。最近，许多采用对比学习的方法在代码表示学习方面显示出了有希望的结果，并极大地提高了代码搜索的性能。然而，使用对比学习进行代码搜索仍有很大的改进空间。在本文中，我们提出 CoCoSoDa 通过对比学习中的两个关键因素：数据增强和负样本，有效地利用对比学习进行代码搜索。具体来说，软数据增强是对输入序列动态地屏蔽或替换一些标记，以生成正样本。动量机制用于通过维护队列和动量编码器在小批量中生成大量且一致的负样本表示。此外，多模态对比学习用于将代码-查询对的表示组合在一起，并将不成对的代码片段和查询分开。我们进行了广泛的实验，以评估我们的方法在使用六种编程语言的大规模数据集上的有效性。实验结果表明：（1）CoCoSoDa 的性能优于 14 个基线，尤其是平均 MRR 分数分别超过 CodeBERT、GraphCodeBERT 和 UniXcoder 13.3%、10.5% 和 5.9%。 (2) 消融研究显示了我们方法的每个组成部分的有效性。 (3) 我们将我们的技术应用于几种不同的预训练模型，例如 RoBERTa、CodeBERT 和 GraphCodeBERT，并观察到它们在代码搜索方面的性能显着提升。 (4)我们的模型在不同的超参数下表现稳健。此外，我们还进行定性和定量分析，以探索模型良好性能背后的原因。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoCoSoDa方法，通过对比学习提升代码搜索的语义相关性检索效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管对比学习在代码表示学习中表现优异，但现有方法在数据增强和负样本生成方面仍有改进空间。
AI.method: 采用软数据增强生成正样本，结合动量机制生成一致负样本，并通过多模态对比学习拉近代码-查询对表示、推开未配对样本。
AI.result: 在六种编程语言的大规模数据集上，CoCoSoDa平均MRR较CodeBERT等基线提升5.9%-13.3%，组件消融实验验证有效性，且可适配多种预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: CoCoSoDa通过优化对比学习关键因素，在代码搜索任务中展现出显著性能提升和方法通用性。
