authors_text: Duowang Zhu,Xiaohu Huang,Xinggang Wang,Bo Yang,Botao He,Wenyu Liu,Bin Feng
title: Multi-scale Context-aware Network with Transformer for Gait Recognition
title_zh: 具有用于步态识别的 Transformer 的多尺度上下文感知网络
abstract: Although gait recognition has drawn increasing research attention recently, since the silhouette differences are quite subtle in spatial domain, temporal feature representation is crucial for gait recognition. Inspired by the observation that humans can distinguish gaits of different subjects by adaptively focusing on clips of varying time scales, we propose a multi-scale context-aware network with transformer (MCAT) for gait recognition. MCAT generates temporal features across three scales, and adaptively aggregates them using contextual information from both local and global perspectives. Specifically, MCAT contains an adaptive temporal aggregation (ATA) module that performs local relation modeling followed by global relation modeling to fuse the multi-scale features. Besides, in order to remedy the spatial feature corruption resulting from temporal operations, MCAT incorporates a salient spatial feature learning (SSFL) module to select groups of discriminative spatial features. Extensive experiments conducted on three datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance. Concretely, we achieve rank-1 accuracies of 98.7%, 96.2% and 88.7% under normal walking, bag-carrying and coat-wearing conditions on CASIA-B, 97.5% on OU-MVLP and 50.6% on GREW. The source code will be available at https://github.com/zhuduowang/MCAT.git.
summary: Although gait recognition has drawn increasing research attention recently, since the silhouette differences are quite subtle in spatial domain, temporal feature representation is crucial for gait recognition. Inspired by the observation that humans can distinguish gaits of different subjects by adaptively focusing on clips of varying time scales, we propose a multi-scale context-aware network with transformer (MCAT) for gait recognition. MCAT generates temporal features across three scales, and adaptively aggregates them using contextual information from both local and global perspectives. Specifically, MCAT contains an adaptive temporal aggregation (ATA) module that performs local relation modeling followed by global relation modeling to fuse the multi-scale features. Besides, in order to remedy the spatial feature corruption resulting from temporal operations, MCAT incorporates a salient spatial feature learning (SSFL) module to select groups of discriminative spatial features. Extensive experiments conducted on three datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance. Concretely, we achieve rank-1 accuracies of 98.7%, 96.2% and 88.7% under normal walking, bag-carrying and coat-wearing conditions on CASIA-B, 97.5% on OU-MVLP and 50.6% on GREW. The source code will be available at https://github.com/zhuduowang/MCAT.git.
abstract_zh: 尽管步态识别最近引起了越来越多的研究关注，但由于空间域中的轮廓差异相当微妙，因此时间特征表示对于步态识别至关重要。受人类可以通过自适应地关注不同时间尺度的剪辑来区分不同主体的步态的启发，我们提出了一种用于步态识别的带有变压器的多尺度上下文感知网络（MCAT）。 MCAT 生成跨三个尺度的时间特征，并使用来自本地和全局视角的上下文信息自适应地聚合它们。具体来说，MCAT 包含一个自适应时间聚合 (ATA) 模块，该模块执行局部关系建模，然后执行全局关系建模以融合多尺度特征。此外，为了弥补时间操作导致的空间特征损坏，MCAT 结合了显着空间特征学习（SSFL）模块来选择有区别的空间特征组。对三个数据集进行的广泛实验证明了最先进的性能。具体来说，在正常行走、提包和穿外套条件下，我们在 CASIA-B 上实现了 98.7%、96.2% 和 88.7% 的 1 级准确率，在 OU-MVLP 上实现了 97.5%，在 GREW 上实现了 50.6%。源代码可在 https://github.com/zhuduowang/MCAT.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多尺度上下文感知网络（MCAT），用于步态识别，旨在通过多尺度时间特征和空间特征的融合提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 由于步态识别中的轮廓差异在空间域上较为细微，时间特征表示对于步态识别至关重要。受人类能够通过适应性关注不同时间尺度的片段来区分不同主体步态的启发，本文提出了一种新的方法。
AI.method: MCAT包含自适应时间聚合（ATA）模块，用于进行局部和全局关系建模以融合多尺度特征，并引入显著空间特征学习（SSFL）模块，以选择具有判别性的空间特征。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果显示MCAT在CASIA-B数据集上分别达到98.7%、96.2%和88.7%的rank-1准确率，在OU-MVLP上达到97.5%，在GREW上达到50.6%。
AI.conclusion: MCAT通过多尺度上下文感知机制和空间特征学习，实现了当前最先进的步态识别性能，表明该方法在实际应用中具有潜力。

search_text: Multi-scale Context-aware Network with Transformer for Gait Recognition 具有用于步态识别的 Transformer 的多尺度上下文感知网络 Although gait recognition has drawn increasing research attention recently, since the silhouette differences are quite subtle in spatial domain, temporal feature representation is crucial for gait recognition. Inspired by the observation that humans can distinguish gaits of different subjects by adaptively focusing on clips of varying time scales, we propose a multi-scale context-aware network with transformer (MCAT) for gait recognition. MCAT generates temporal features across three scales, and adaptively aggregates them using contextual information from both local and global perspectives. Specifically, MCAT contains an adaptive temporal aggregation (ATA) module that performs local relation modeling followed by global relation modeling to fuse the multi-scale features. Besides, in order to remedy the spatial feature corruption resulting from temporal operations, MCAT incorporates a salient spatial feature learning (SSFL) module to select groups of discriminative spatial features. Extensive experiments conducted on three datasets demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance. Concretely, we achieve rank-1 accuracies of 98.7%, 96.2% and 88.7% under normal walking, bag-carrying and coat-wearing conditions on CASIA-B, 97.5% on OU-MVLP and 50.6% on GREW. The source code will be available at https://github.com/zhuduowang/MCAT.git. 尽管步态识别最近引起了越来越多的研究关注，但由于空间域中的轮廓差异相当微妙，因此时间特征表示对于步态识别至关重要。受人类可以通过自适应地关注不同时间尺度的剪辑来区分不同主体的步态的启发，我们提出了一种用于步态识别的带有变压器的多尺度上下文感知网络（MCAT）。 MCAT 生成跨三个尺度的时间特征，并使用来自本地和全局视角的上下文信息自适应地聚合它们。具体来说，MCAT 包含一个自适应时间聚合 (ATA) 模块，该模块执行局部关系建模，然后执行全局关系建模以融合多尺度特征。此外，为了弥补时间操作导致的空间特征损坏，MCAT 结合了显着空间特征学习（SSFL）模块来选择有区别的空间特征组。对三个数据集进行的广泛实验证明了最先进的性能。具体来说，在正常行走、提包和穿外套条件下，我们在 CASIA-B 上实现了 98.7%、96.2% 和 88.7% 的 1 级准确率，在 OU-MVLP 上实现了 97.5%，在 GREW 上实现了 50.6%。源代码可在 https://github.com/zhuduowang/MCAT.git 获取。 本文提出了一种多尺度上下文感知网络（MCAT），用于步态识别，旨在通过多尺度时间特征和空间特征的融合提升识别性能。 Duowang Zhu,Xiaohu Huang,Xinggang Wang,Bo Yang,Botao He,Wenyu Liu,Bin Feng cs.CV

authors_text: Sreshth Aggarwal,Deepanjan Kesh,Divyam Singal
title: Lower Bounds for Restricted Schemes in the Two-Adaptive Bitprobe Model
title_zh: 两种自适应位探针模型中限制方案的下界
comment: 19 pages, 1 figure, IWOCA2022, full version of paper
comments: 19 pages, 1 figure, IWOCA2022, full version of paper
abstract: In the adaptive bitprobe model answering membership queries in two bitprobes, we consider the class of restricted schemes as introduced by Kesh and Sharma (Discrete Applied Mathematics 2021). In that paper, the authors showed that such restricted schemes storing subsets of size 2 require $Ω(m^\frac{2}{3})$ space. In this paper, we generalise the result to arbitrary subsets of size $n$, and prove that the space required for such restricted schemes will be $Ω(\left(\frac{m}{n}\right)^{1 - \frac{1}{\lfloor n / 4 \rfloor + 2}})$.
summary: In the adaptive bitprobe model answering membership queries in two bitprobes, we consider the class of restricted schemes as introduced by Kesh and Sharma (Discrete Applied Mathematics 2021). In that paper, the authors showed that such restricted schemes storing subsets of size 2 require $Ω(m^\frac{2}{3})$ space. In this paper, we generalise the result to arbitrary subsets of size $n$, and prove that the space required for such restricted schemes will be $Ω(\left(\frac{m}{n}\right)^{1 - \frac{1}{\lfloor n / 4 \rfloor + 2}})$.
abstract_zh: 在回答两个位探针中的成员资格查询的自适应位探针模型中，我们考虑由 Kesh 和 Sharma（离散应用数学 2021）引入的受限方案类。在那篇论文中，作者表明，存储大小为 2 的子集的此类受限方案需要 $Ω(m^\frac{2}{3})$ 空间。在本文中，我们将结果推广到大小为$n$的任意子集，并证明这种受限方案所需的空间为$Ω(\left(\frac{m}{n}\right)^{1 - \frac{1}{\lfloor n / 4 \rfloor + 2}})$。

AI.tldr: 研究在两自适应位探测模型中受限方案的空间下界，推广到任意大小的子集。
AI.motivation: 扩展Kesh和Sharma关于子集大小为2的受限方案空间下界结果，提供更一般性的理论分析。
AI.method: 通过组合分析和数学归纳法，结合信息论方法证明空间复杂度的下界。
AI.result: 证明任意大小n的子集在受限方案中需要Ω((m/n)^{1−1/⌊n/4⌋+2})的空间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 成功推广了现有结果，为两自适应位探测模型中的存储下界研究提供了更普适的理论框架。

authors_text: Siteng Chen,Jinxi Xiang,Xiyue Wang,Jun Zhang,Sen Yang,Junzhou Huang,Wei Yang,Junhua Zheng,Xiao Han
title: Deep learning-based approach to reveal tumor mutational burden status from whole slide images across multiple cancer types
title_zh: 基于深度学习的方法从多种癌症类型的整个幻灯片图像中揭示肿瘤突变负荷状态
abstract: Tumor mutational burden (TMB) is a potential genomic biomarker of immunotherapy. However, TMB detected through whole exome sequencing lacks clinical penetration in low-resource settings. In this study, we proposed a multi-scale deep learning framework to address the detection of TMB status from routinely used whole slide images for a multiple cancer TMB prediction model (MC- TMB). The MC-TMB achieved a mean area under the curve (AUC) of 0.818 (0.804-0.831) in the cross-validation cohort, which showed superior performance to each single-scale model. The improvements of MC-TMB over the single-tumor models were also confirmed by the ablation tests on x10 magnification, and the highly concerned regions typically correspond to dense lymphocytic infiltration and heteromorphic tumor cells. MC-TMB algorithm also exhibited good generalization on the external validation cohort with an AUC of 0.732 (0.683-0.761), and better performance when compared to other methods. In conclusion, we proposed a deep learning-based approach to reveal tumor mutational burden status from routinely used pathological slides across multiple cancer types.
summary: Tumor mutational burden (TMB) is a potential genomic biomarker of immunotherapy. However, TMB detected through whole exome sequencing lacks clinical penetration in low-resource settings. In this study, we proposed a multi-scale deep learning framework to address the detection of TMB status from routinely used whole slide images for a multiple cancer TMB prediction model (MC- TMB). The MC-TMB achieved a mean area under the curve (AUC) of 0.818 (0.804-0.831) in the cross-validation cohort, which showed superior performance to each single-scale model. The improvements of MC-TMB over the single-tumor models were also confirmed by the ablation tests on x10 magnification, and the highly concerned regions typically correspond to dense lymphocytic infiltration and heteromorphic tumor cells. MC-TMB algorithm also exhibited good generalization on the external validation cohort with an AUC of 0.732 (0.683-0.761), and better performance when compared to other methods. In conclusion, we proposed a deep learning-based approach to reveal tumor mutational burden status from routinely used pathological slides across multiple cancer types.
abstract_zh: 肿瘤突变负荷（TMB）是免疫治疗的潜在基因组生物标志物。然而，通过全外显子组测序检测到的 TMB 在资源匮乏的环境中缺乏临床渗透。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个多尺度深度学习框架，用于解决从常规使用的多癌症 TMB 预测模型 (MC-TMB) 的整个幻灯片图像中检测 TMB 状态的问题。 MC-TMB 在交叉验证队列中实现了 0.818 (0.804-0.831) 的平均曲线下面积 (AUC)，这显示出优于每个单尺度模型的性能。 10 倍放大倍数的消融测试也证实了 MC-TMB 相对于单肿瘤模型的改进，高度关注的区域通常对应于密集的淋巴细胞浸润和异形肿瘤细胞。 MC-TMB 算法在外部验证队列上也表现出良好的泛化能力，AUC 为 0.732（0.683-0.761），并且与其他方法相比具有更好的性能。总之，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，从多种癌症类型的常规病理切片中揭示肿瘤突变负荷状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，通过全切片图像跨多种癌症类型揭示肿瘤突变负荷（TMB）状态。
AI.motivation: 传统全外显子组测序检测TMB在资源匮乏地区临床应用受限，需开发无需基因检测的替代方案。
AI.method: 构建多尺度深度学习框架MC-TMB，利用全切片图像特征进行多癌症TMB预测，并通过交叉验证和消融实验验证模型性能。
AI.result: MC-TMB在交叉验证队列中达到AUC 0.818，在外部验证队列中AUC为0.732，优于单尺度模型和其他方法，关键区域与淋巴细胞浸润和异形肿瘤细胞相关。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习方法可有效从病理切片中预测跨癌种TMB状态，为临床提供新型影像组学解决方案。

authors_text: Hala Al Masri,Muhy Eddin Za'ter
title: Arabic Text-To-Speech (TTS) Data Preparation
title_zh: 阿拉伯语文本转语音 (TTS) 数据准备
abstract: People may be puzzled by the fact that voice over recordings data sets exist in addition to Text-to-Speech (TTS), Synthesis system advancements, albeit this is not the case. The goal of this study is to explain the relevance of TTS as well as the data preparation procedures. TTS relies heavily on recorded data since it can have a substantial influence on the outcomes of TTS modules. Furthermore, whether the domain is specialized or general, appropriate data should be developed to address all predicted language variants and domains. Different recording methodologies, taking into account quality and behavior, may also be advantageous in the development of the module. In light of the lack of Arabic language in present synthesizing systems, numerous variables that impact the flow of recorded utterances are being considered in order to manipulate an Arabic TTS module. In this study, two viewpoints will be discussed: linguistics and the creation of high-quality recordings for TTS. The purpose of this work is to offer light on how ground-truth utterances may influence the evolution of speech systems in terms of naturalness, intelligibility, and understanding. Well provide voice actor specs as well as data specs that will assist both voice actors and voice coaches in the studio as well as the annotators who will be evaluating the audios.
summary: People may be puzzled by the fact that voice over recordings data sets exist in addition to Text-to-Speech (TTS), Synthesis system advancements, albeit this is not the case. The purpose of this work is to offer light on how ground-truth utterances may influence the evolution of speech systems in terms of naturalness, intelligibility, and understanding. Well provide voice actor specs as well as data specs that will assist both voice actors and voice coaches in the studio as well as the annotators who will be evaluating the audios.
abstract_zh: 人们可能会对除了文本转语音 (TTS)、合成系统进步之外还存在语音录音数据集这一事实感到困惑，尽管事实并非如此。本研究的目的是解释 TTS 的相关性以及数据准备程序。 TTS 严重依赖记录的数据，因为它会对 TTS 模块的结果产生重大影响。此外，无论该领域是专门的还是通用的，都应该开发适当的数据来解决所有预测的语言变体和领域。考虑到质量和行为，不同的记录方法也可能有利于模块的开发。鉴于当前合成系统中缺乏阿拉伯语，为了操纵阿拉伯语 TTS 模块，正在考虑影响记录话语流的许多变量。在本研究中，将讨论两个观点：语言学和高质量 TTS 录音的创建。这项工作的目的是阐明真实话语如何影响语音系统在自然性、清晰度和理解方面的进化。我们将提供配音演员规格和数据规格，以帮助工作室中的配音演员和配音教练以及将评估音频的注释者。

AI.tldr: 本文主要探讨阿拉伯语文本到语音（TTS）系统的数据准备过程，重点分析高质量语音数据对TTS模块性能的影响，并提供语音演员和标注人员的规范指南。
AI.motivation: 现有合成系统缺乏阿拉伯语支持，且TTS效果高度依赖录音数据质量，因此需明确数据准备的重要性并制定标准化流程以提升系统自然度与可理解性。
AI.method: 通过语言学分析与录音技术研究，结合领域特定与通用场景的数据需求，提出针对阿拉伯语TTS的录音方法及数据规范。
AI.result: 提供了语音演员选拔标准、录音技术参数及标注规范，为阿拉伯语TTS数据集构建和评估提供实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 高质量语音数据与科学准备流程对阿拉伯语TTS系统发展至关重要，需从语言学和工程实践两方面协同优化。

search_text: Arabic Text-To-Speech (TTS) Data Preparation 阿拉伯语文本转语音 (TTS) 数据准备 People may be puzzled by the fact that voice over recordings data sets exist in addition to Text-to-Speech (TTS), Synthesis system advancements, albeit this is not the case. The goal of this study is to explain the relevance of TTS as well as the data preparation procedures. TTS relies heavily on recorded data since it can have a substantial influence on the outcomes of TTS modules. Furthermore, whether the domain is specialized or general, appropriate data should be developed to address all predicted language variants and domains. Different recording methodologies, taking into account quality and behavior, may also be advantageous in the development of the module. In light of the lack of Arabic language in present synthesizing systems, numerous variables that impact the flow of recorded utterances are being considered in order to manipulate an Arabic TTS module. In this study, two viewpoints will be discussed: linguistics and the creation of high-quality recordings for TTS. The purpose of this work is to offer light on how ground-truth utterances may influence the evolution of speech systems in terms of naturalness, intelligibility, and understanding. Well provide voice actor specs as well as data specs that will assist both voice actors and voice coaches in the studio as well as the annotators who will be evaluating the audios. 人们可能会对除了文本转语音 (TTS)、合成系统进步之外还存在语音录音数据集这一事实感到困惑，尽管事实并非如此。本研究的目的是解释 TTS 的相关性以及数据准备程序。 TTS 严重依赖记录的数据，因为它会对 TTS 模块的结果产生重大影响。此外，无论该领域是专门的还是通用的，都应该开发适当的数据来解决所有预测的语言变体和领域。考虑到质量和行为，不同的记录方法也可能有利于模块的开发。鉴于当前合成系统中缺乏阿拉伯语，为了操纵阿拉伯语 TTS 模块，正在考虑影响记录话语流的许多变量。在本研究中，将讨论两个观点：语言学和高质量 TTS 录音的创建。这项工作的目的是阐明真实话语如何影响语音系统在自然性、清晰度和理解方面的进化。我们将提供配音演员规格和数据规格，以帮助工作室中的配音演员和配音教练以及将评估音频的注释者。 本文主要探讨阿拉伯语文本到语音（TTS）系统的数据准备过程，重点分析高质量语音数据对TTS模块性能的影响，并提供语音演员和标注人员的规范指南。 Hala Al Masri,Muhy Eddin Za'ter cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Juheon Lee,Hyeong-Seok Choi,Kyogu Lee
title: Expressive Singing Synthesis Using Local Style Token and Dual-path Pitch Encoder
title_zh: 使用本地风格令牌和双路音高编码器进行富有表现力的歌唱合成
abstract: This paper proposes a controllable singing voice synthesis system capable of generating expressive singing voice with two novel methodologies. First, a local style token module, which predicts frame-level style tokens from an input pitch and text sequence, is proposed to allow the singing voice system to control musical expression often unspecified in sheet music (e.g., breathing and intensity). Second, we propose a dual-path pitch encoder with a choice of two different pitch inputs: MIDI pitch sequence or f0 contour. Because the initial generation of a singing voice is usually executed by taking a MIDI pitch sequence, one can later extract an f0 contour from the generated singing voice and modify the f0 contour to a finer level as desired. Through quantitative and qualitative evaluations, we confirmed that the proposed model could control various musical expressions while not sacrificing the sound quality of the singing voice synthesis system.
summary: This paper proposes a controllable singing voice synthesis system capable of generating expressive singing voice with two novel methodologies. First, a local style token module, which predicts frame-level style tokens from an input pitch and text sequence, is proposed to allow the singing voice system to control musical expression often unspecified in sheet music (e.g., breathing and intensity). Second, we propose a dual-path pitch encoder with a choice of two different pitch inputs: MIDI pitch sequence or f0 contour. Because the initial generation of a singing voice is usually executed by taking a MIDI pitch sequence, one can later extract an f0 contour from the generated singing voice and modify the f0 contour to a finer level as desired. Through quantitative and qualitative evaluations, we confirmed that the proposed model could control various musical expressions while not sacrificing the sound quality of the singing voice synthesis system.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种可控歌声合成系统，能够通过两种新颖的方法产生富有表现力的歌声。首先，提出了一个本地风格标记模块，该模块根据输入音调和文本序列预测帧级风格标记，以允许歌声系统控制乐谱中通常未指定的音乐表达（例如呼吸和强度）。其次，我们提出了一种双路径音高编码器，可以选择两种不同的音高输入：MIDI 音高序列或 f0 轮廓。因为歌声的初始生成通常是通过采用MIDI音高序列来执行的，所以稍后可以从生成的歌声中提取f0轮廓并根据需要将f0轮廓修改为更精细的水平。通过定量和定性评估，我们证实所提出的模型可以控制各种音乐表达，同时不牺牲歌声合成系统的音质。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可控的歌唱语音合成系统，通过两种新方法生成富有表现力的歌声。
AI.motivation: 传统歌唱合成系统难以控制乐谱中未明确标注的音乐表现细节（如呼吸、强度），需新方法实现更自然的表达控制。
AI.method: 提出局部风格标记模块（预测帧级风格标记以控制音乐表现）和双路径音高编码器（支持MIDI音高序列或f0轮廓输入）。
AI.result: 定量与定性评估验证模型可有效控制音乐表现，同时保持高质量歌声合成。
AI.conclusion: 新方法实现了音乐表现控制与音质的平衡，为歌唱合成提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jiashun Suo,Tianyi Wang,Xingzhou Zhang,Haiyang Chen,Wei Zhou,Weisong Shi
title: HIT-UAV: A high-altitude infrared thermal dataset for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle-based object detection
title_zh: HIT-UAV：用于无人机目标检测的高空红外热数据集
abstract: We present the HIT-UAV dataset, a high-altitude infrared thermal dataset for object detection applications on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The dataset comprises 2,898 infrared thermal images extracted from 43,470 frames in hundreds of videos captured by UAVs in various scenarios including schools, parking lots, roads, and playgrounds. Moreover, the HIT-UAV provides essential flight data for each image, such as flight altitude, camera perspective, date, and daylight intensity. For each image, we have manually annotated object instances with bounding boxes of two types (oriented and standard) to tackle the challenge of significant overlap of object instances in aerial images. To the best of our knowledge, the HIT-UAV is the first publicly available high-altitude UAV-based infrared thermal dataset for detecting persons and vehicles. We have trained and evaluated well-established object detection algorithms on the HIT-UAV. Our results demonstrate that the detection algorithms perform exceptionally well on the HIT-UAV compared to visual light datasets since infrared thermal images do not contain significant irrelevant information about objects. We believe that the HIT-UAV will contribute to various UAV-based applications and researches. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/suojiashun/HIT-UAV-Infrared-Thermal-Dataset.
summary: We present the HIT-UAV dataset, a high-altitude infrared thermal dataset for object detection applications on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The dataset comprises 2,898 infrared thermal images extracted from 43,470 frames in hundreds of videos captured by UAVs in various scenarios including schools, parking lots, roads, and playgrounds. Moreover, the HIT-UAV provides essential flight data for each image, such as flight altitude, camera perspective, date, and daylight intensity. For each image, we have manually annotated object instances with bounding boxes of two types (oriented and standard) to tackle the challenge of significant overlap of object instances in aerial images. To the best of our knowledge, the HIT-UAV is the first publicly available high-altitude UAV-based infrared thermal dataset for detecting persons and vehicles. We have trained and evaluated well-established object detection algorithms on the HIT-UAV. Our results demonstrate that the detection algorithms perform exceptionally well on the HIT-UAV compared to visual light datasets since infrared thermal images do not contain significant irrelevant information about objects. We believe that the HIT-UAV will contribute to various UAV-based applications and researches. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/suojiashun/HIT-UAV-Infrared-Thermal-Dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 HIT-UAV 数据集，这是一个用于无人机 (UAV) 上物体检测应用的高空红外热数据集。该数据集包含从无人机在学校、停车场、道路和游乐场等各种场景中捕获的数百个视频中的 43,470 帧中提取的 2,898 张红外热图像。此外，HIT-UAV 还为每个图像提供必要的飞行数据，例如飞行高度、相机视角、日期和日光强度。对于每个图像，我们使用两种类型（定向和标准）的边界框手动注释对象实例，以解决航拍图像中对象实例显着重叠的挑战。据我们所知，HIT-UAV 是第一个公开的基于高空无人机的红外热数据集，用于检测人员和车辆。我们在 HIT-UAV 上训练并评估了成熟的目标检测算法。我们的结果表明，与可见光数据集相比，检测算法在 HIT-UAV 上表现得非常好，因为红外热图像不包含有关物体的重要不相关信息。我们相信HIT-UAV将为各种基于无人机的应用和研究做出贡献。该数据集可在 https://github.com/suojiashun/HIT-UAV-Infrared-Thermal-Dataset 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HIT-UAV数据集，用于无人机的高海拔红外热成像物体检测，包含2898张红外热图像及飞行参数标注。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机红外热数据集缺乏高海拔场景覆盖，且未解决航拍图像中物体重叠的检测难题，阻碍相关研究进展。
AI.method: 采集多场景无人机视频生成红外热图像，标注双类型边界框处理重叠物体，并提供飞行高度、光照等元数据，验证主流检测算法性能。
AI.result: 检测算法在HIT-UAV上表现优于可见光数据集，红外热成像有效减少环境干扰信息，提升检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: HIT-UAV作为首个公开高海拔红外热数据集，将推动无人机在安防、交通等领域的物体检测研究与应用。

search_text: HIT-UAV: A high-altitude infrared thermal dataset for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle-based object detection HIT-UAV：用于无人机目标检测的高空红外热数据集 We present the HIT-UAV dataset, a high-altitude infrared thermal dataset for object detection applications on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The dataset comprises 2,898 infrared thermal images extracted from 43,470 frames in hundreds of videos captured by UAVs in various scenarios including schools, parking lots, roads, and playgrounds. Moreover, the HIT-UAV provides essential flight data for each image, such as flight altitude, camera perspective, date, and daylight intensity. For each image, we have manually annotated object instances with bounding boxes of two types (oriented and standard) to tackle the challenge of significant overlap of object instances in aerial images. To the best of our knowledge, the HIT-UAV is the first publicly available high-altitude UAV-based infrared thermal dataset for detecting persons and vehicles. We have trained and evaluated well-established object detection algorithms on the HIT-UAV. Our results demonstrate that the detection algorithms perform exceptionally well on the HIT-UAV compared to visual light datasets since infrared thermal images do not contain significant irrelevant information about objects. We believe that the HIT-UAV will contribute to various UAV-based applications and researches. The dataset is freely available at https://github.com/suojiashun/HIT-UAV-Infrared-Thermal-Dataset. 我们提出了 HIT-UAV 数据集，这是一个用于无人机 (UAV) 上物体检测应用的高空红外热数据集。该数据集包含从无人机在学校、停车场、道路和游乐场等各种场景中捕获的数百个视频中的 43,470 帧中提取的 2,898 张红外热图像。此外，HIT-UAV 还为每个图像提供必要的飞行数据，例如飞行高度、相机视角、日期和日光强度。对于每个图像，我们使用两种类型（定向和标准）的边界框手动注释对象实例，以解决航拍图像中对象实例显着重叠的挑战。据我们所知，HIT-UAV 是第一个公开的基于高空无人机的红外热数据集，用于检测人员和车辆。我们在 HIT-UAV 上训练并评估了成熟的目标检测算法。我们的结果表明，与可见光数据集相比，检测算法在 HIT-UAV 上表现得非常好，因为红外热图像不包含有关物体的重要不相关信息。我们相信HIT-UAV将为各种基于无人机的应用和研究做出贡献。该数据集可在 https://github.com/suojiashun/HIT-UAV-Infrared-Thermal-Dataset 上免费获取。 本文提出HIT-UAV数据集，用于无人机的高海拔红外热成像物体检测，包含2898张红外热图像及飞行参数标注。 Jiashun Suo,Tianyi Wang,Xingzhou Zhang,Haiyang Chen,Wei Zhou,Weisong Shi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuo Ren,Shujie Liu,Yu Wu,Long Zhou,Furu Wei
title: Speech Pre-training with Acoustic Piece
title_zh: 使用原声片进行语音预训练
abstract: Previous speech pre-training methods, such as wav2vec2.0 and HuBERT, pre-train a Transformer encoder to learn deep representations from audio data, with objectives predicting either elements from latent vector quantized space or pre-generated labels (known as target codes) with offline clustering. However, those training signals (quantized elements or codes) are independent across different tokens without considering their relations. According to our observation and analysis, the target codes share obvious patterns aligned with phonemized text data. Based on that, we propose to leverage those patterns to better pre-train the model considering the relations among the codes. The patterns we extracted, called "acoustic piece"s, are from the sentence piece result of HuBERT codes. With the acoustic piece as the training signal, we can implicitly bridge the input audio and natural language, which benefits audio-to-text tasks, such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). Simple but effective, our method "HuBERT-AP" significantly outperforms strong baselines on the LibriSpeech ASR task.
summary: Previous speech pre-training methods, such as wav2vec2.0 and HuBERT, pre-train a Transformer encoder to learn deep representations from audio data, with objectives predicting either elements from latent vector quantized space or pre-generated labels (known as target codes) with offline clustering. However, those training signals (quantized elements or codes) are independent across different tokens without considering their relations. According to our observation and analysis, the target codes share obvious patterns aligned with phonemized text data. Based on that, we propose to leverage those patterns to better pre-train the model considering the relations among the codes. The patterns we extracted, called "acoustic piece"s, are from the sentence piece result of HuBERT codes. With the acoustic piece as the training signal, we can implicitly bridge the input audio and natural language, which benefits audio-to-text tasks, such as automatic speech recognition (ASR). Simple but effective, our method "HuBERT-AP" significantly outperforms strong baselines on the LibriSpeech ASR task.
abstract_zh: 以前的语音预训练方法，例如 wav2vec2.0 和 HuBERT，预训练 Transformer 编码器以从音频数据中学习深度表示，其目标是预测来自潜在矢量量化空间的元素或通过离线聚类预先生成的标签（称为目标代码）。然而，这些训练信号（量化元素或代码）在不同的标记之间是独立的，而不考虑它们之间的关系。根据我们的观察和分析，目标代码具有与音素化文本数据一致的明显模式。基于此，我们建议利用这些模式来更好地预训练模型，考虑代码之间的关系。我们提取的模式称为“声学片段”，来自 HuBERT 代码的句子片段结果。使用声学片段作为训练信号，我们可以隐式地桥接输入音频和自然语言，这有利于音频到文本的任务，例如自动语音识别（ASR）。我们的方法“HuBERT-AP”简单但有效，在 LibriSpeech ASR 任务上显着优于强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声学片段（acoustic piece）的语音预训练方法，通过利用HuBERT编码中的模式提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练方法（如wav2vec2.0和HuBERT）未考虑目标码之间的关系，而观察到目标码与音素化文本存在明显对齐模式，因此提出利用该模式改进预训练。
AI.method: 从HuBERT编码的sentence piece结果中提取声学片段作为训练信号，通过隐式连接音频与自然语言提升语音到文本任务表现，方法命名为HuBERT-AP。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech语音识别任务中，HuBERT-AP显著优于现有强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 声学片段能有效捕捉编码间关系，通过显式建模音频与文本的对齐模式可提升预训练效果，为语音识别提供简单有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yutian Wang,Yuankun Xie,Kun Zhao,Hui Wang,Qin Zhang
title: Unsupervised Quantized Prosody Representation for Controllable Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 用于可控语音合成的无监督量化韵律表示
comment: accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2022 (ICME2022)
comments: accepted by IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo 2022 (ICME2022)
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel prosody disentangle method for prosodic Text-to-Speech (TTS) model, which introduces the vector quantization (VQ) method to the auxiliary prosody encoder to obtain the decomposed prosody representations in an unsupervised manner. Rely on its advantages, the speaking styles, such as pitch, speaking velocity, local pitch variance, etc., are decomposed automatically into the latent quantize vectors. We also investigate the internal mechanism of VQ disentangle process by means of a latent variables counter and find that higher value dimensions usually represent prosody information. Experiments show that our model can control the speaking styles of synthesis results by directly manipulating the latent variables. The objective and subjective evaluations illustrated that our model outperforms the popular models.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel prosody disentangle method for prosodic Text-to-Speech (TTS) model, which introduces the vector quantization (VQ) method to the auxiliary prosody encoder to obtain the decomposed prosody representations in an unsupervised manner. Rely on its advantages, the speaking styles, such as pitch, speaking velocity, local pitch variance, etc., are decomposed automatically into the latent quantize vectors. We also investigate the internal mechanism of VQ disentangle process by means of a latent variables counter and find that higher value dimensions usually represent prosody information. Experiments show that our model can control the speaking styles of synthesis results by directly manipulating the latent variables. The objective and subjective evaluations illustrated that our model outperforms the popular models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于韵律文本转语音（TTS）模型的新型韵律解缠方法，该方法将矢量量化（VQ）方法引入辅助韵律编码器，以无监督的方式获得分解的韵律表示。凭借其优点，语音风格，如音调、语速、局部音调方差等，被自动分解为潜在的量化向量。我们还通过潜在变量计数器研究了 VQ 解缠过程的内部机制，发现较高的值维度通常代表韵律信息。实验表明，我们的模型可以通过直接操纵潜在变量来控制合成结果的说话风格。客观和主观评估表明我们的模型优于流行的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的量化韵律表示方法，用于可控语音合成。
AI.motivation: 传统韵律控制方法依赖于监督学习，难以灵活控制语音的多种韵律特征。本文旨在通过无监督学习实现对语音韵律特征的自动分解与控制。
AI.method: 本文引入向量量化（VQ）方法到辅助韵律编码器中，通过无监督方式获得分解的韵律表示，并通过潜在变量计数器研究VQ解耦过程的内部机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能够通过直接操作潜在变量控制合成语音的韵律风格，且在客观和主观评估中优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为可控语音合成提供了一种有效的无监督韵律表示方式，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Zeyang Zhang,Ziwei Zhang,Xin Wang,Wenwu Zhu
title: Learning to Solve Travelling Salesman Problem with Hardness-adaptive Curriculum
title_zh: 学习用硬度自适应课程解决旅行商问题
abstract: Various neural network models have been proposed to tackle combinatorial optimization problems such as the travelling salesman problem (TSP). Existing learning-based TSP methods adopt a simple setting that the training and testing data are independent and identically distributed. However, the existing literature fails to solve TSP instances when training and testing data have different distributions. Concretely, we find that different training and testing distribution will result in more difficult TSP instances, i.e., the solution obtained by the model has a large gap from the optimal solution. To tackle this problem, in this work, we study learning-based TSP methods when training and testing data have different distributions using adaptive-hardness, i.e., how difficult a TSP instance can be for a solver. This problem is challenging because it is non-trivial to (1) define hardness measurement quantitatively; (2) efficiently and continuously generate sufficiently hard TSP instances upon model training; (3) fully utilize instances with different levels of hardness to learn a more powerful TSP solver. To solve these challenges, we first propose a principled hardness measurement to quantify the hardness of TSP instances. Then, we propose a hardness-adaptive generator to generate instances with different hardness. We further propose a curriculum learner fully utilizing these instances to train the TSP solver. Experiments show that our hardness-adaptive generator can generate instances ten times harder than the existing methods, and our proposed method achieves significant improvement over state-of-the-art models in terms of the optimality gap.
summary: Various neural network models have been proposed to tackle combinatorial optimization problems such as the travelling salesman problem (TSP). Existing learning-based TSP methods adopt a simple setting that the training and testing data are independent and identically distributed. However, the existing literature fails to solve TSP instances when training and testing data have different distributions. Concretely, we find that different training and testing distribution will result in more difficult TSP instances, i.e., the solution obtained by the model has a large gap from the optimal solution. To tackle this problem, in this work, we study learning-based TSP methods when training and testing data have different distributions using adaptive-hardness, i.e., how difficult a TSP instance can be for a solver. This problem is challenging because it is non-trivial to (1) define hardness measurement quantitatively; (2) efficiently and continuously generate sufficiently hard TSP instances upon model training; (3) fully utilize instances with different levels of hardness to learn a more powerful TSP solver. To solve these challenges, we first propose a principled hardness measurement to quantify the hardness of TSP instances. Then, we propose a hardness-adaptive generator to generate instances with different hardness. We further propose a curriculum learner fully utilizing these instances to train the TSP solver. Experiments show that our hardness-adaptive generator can generate instances ten times harder than the existing methods, and our proposed method achieves significant improvement over state-of-the-art models in terms of the optimality gap.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种神经网络模型来解决组合优化问题，例如旅行商问题（TSP）。现有的基于学习的TSP方法采用简单的设置，即训练数据和测试数据是独立且同分布的。然而，现有文献无法解决训练数据和测试数据具有不同分布时的 TSP 实例。具体来说，我们发现不同的训练和测试分布会导致更困难的TSP实例，即模型获得的解与最优解有很大差距。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们研究了基于学习的 TSP 方法，当训练和测试数据具有不同的分布时，使用自适应硬度，即 TSP 实例对于求解器来说有多困难。这个问题具有挑战性，因为（1）定量定义硬度测量并非易事； (2)在模型训练时高效、持续地生成足够硬的TSP实例； (3)充分利用不同硬度的实例来学习更强大的TSP求解器。为了解决这些挑战，我们首先提出了一种原则性的硬度测量来量化 TSP 实例的硬度。然后，我们提出了一种硬度自适应生成器来生成具有不同硬度的实例。我们进一步提出了一个课程学习者充分利用这些实例来训练 TSP 求解器。实验表明，我们的硬度自适应生成器可以生成比现有方法硬十倍的实例，并且我们提出的方法在最优性差距方面比最先进的模型取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于难度自适应课程学习的神经网络方法，用于解决训练与测试数据分布不一致时的旅行商问题（TSP）。
AI.motivation: 现有TSP求解模型在训练与测试数据分布不同时表现不佳，导致解的质量显著下降，需解决难度量化、实例生成及多难度实例利用三大挑战。
AI.method: 提出量化TSP实例难度的指标，设计硬度自适应生成器生成多难度实例，并构建课程学习框架分阶段训练模型。
AI.result: 生成器可生成比现有方法难10倍的TSP实例，所提方法在最优解差距指标上显著优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过难度自适应课程学习，模型能有效应对分布差异带来的挑战，为复杂组合优化问题提供新思路。

search_text: Learning to Solve Travelling Salesman Problem with Hardness-adaptive Curriculum 学习用硬度自适应课程解决旅行商问题 Various neural network models have been proposed to tackle combinatorial optimization problems such as the travelling salesman problem (TSP). Existing learning-based TSP methods adopt a simple setting that the training and testing data are independent and identically distributed. However, the existing literature fails to solve TSP instances when training and testing data have different distributions. Concretely, we find that different training and testing distribution will result in more difficult TSP instances, i.e., the solution obtained by the model has a large gap from the optimal solution. To tackle this problem, in this work, we study learning-based TSP methods when training and testing data have different distributions using adaptive-hardness, i.e., how difficult a TSP instance can be for a solver. This problem is challenging because it is non-trivial to (1) define hardness measurement quantitatively; (2) efficiently and continuously generate sufficiently hard TSP instances upon model training; (3) fully utilize instances with different levels of hardness to learn a more powerful TSP solver. To solve these challenges, we first propose a principled hardness measurement to quantify the hardness of TSP instances. Then, we propose a hardness-adaptive generator to generate instances with different hardness. We further propose a curriculum learner fully utilizing these instances to train the TSP solver. Experiments show that our hardness-adaptive generator can generate instances ten times harder than the existing methods, and our proposed method achieves significant improvement over state-of-the-art models in terms of the optimality gap. 人们提出了各种神经网络模型来解决组合优化问题，例如旅行商问题（TSP）。现有的基于学习的TSP方法采用简单的设置，即训练数据和测试数据是独立且同分布的。然而，现有文献无法解决训练数据和测试数据具有不同分布时的 TSP 实例。具体来说，我们发现不同的训练和测试分布会导致更困难的TSP实例，即模型获得的解与最优解有很大差距。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们研究了基于学习的 TSP 方法，当训练和测试数据具有不同的分布时，使用自适应硬度，即 TSP 实例对于求解器来说有多困难。这个问题具有挑战性，因为（1）定量定义硬度测量并非易事； (2)在模型训练时高效、持续地生成足够硬的TSP实例； (3)充分利用不同硬度的实例来学习更强大的TSP求解器。为了解决这些挑战，我们首先提出了一种原则性的硬度测量来量化 TSP 实例的硬度。然后，我们提出了一种硬度自适应生成器来生成具有不同硬度的实例。我们进一步提出了一个课程学习者充分利用这些实例来训练 TSP 求解器。实验表明，我们的硬度自适应生成器可以生成比现有方法硬十倍的实例，并且我们提出的方法在最优性差距方面比最先进的模型取得了显着改进。 本文提出一种基于难度自适应课程学习的神经网络方法，用于解决训练与测试数据分布不一致时的旅行商问题（TSP）。 Zeyang Zhang,Ziwei Zhang,Xin Wang,Wenwu Zhu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaofei Wang,Dongmei Wang,Naoyuki Kanda,Sefik Emre Eskimez,Takuya Yoshioka
title: Leveraging Real Conversational Data for Multi-Channel Continuous Speech Separation
title_zh: 利用真实对话数据进行多通道连续语音分离
abstract: Existing multi-channel continuous speech separation (CSS) models are heavily dependent on supervised data - either simulated data which causes data mismatch between the training and real-data testing, or the real transcribed overlapping data, which is difficult to be acquired, hindering further improvements in the conversational/meeting transcription tasks. In this paper, we propose a three-stage training scheme for the CSS model that can leverage both supervised data and extra large-scale unsupervised real-world conversational data. The scheme consists of two conventional training approaches -- pre-training using simulated data and ASR-loss-based training using transcribed data -- and a novel continuous semi-supervised training between the two, in which the CSS model is further trained by using real data based on the teacher-student learning framework. We apply this scheme to an array-geometry-agnostic CSS model, which can use the multi-channel data collected from any microphone array. Large-scale meeting transcription experiments are carried out on both Microsoft internal meeting data and the AMI meeting corpus. The steady improvement by each training stage has been observed, showing the effect of the proposed method that enables leveraging real conversational data for CSS model training.
summary: Existing multi-channel continuous speech separation (CSS) models are heavily dependent on supervised data - either simulated data which causes data mismatch between the training and real-data testing, or the real transcribed overlapping data, which is difficult to be acquired, hindering further improvements in the conversational/meeting transcription tasks. In this paper, we propose a three-stage training scheme for the CSS model that can leverage both supervised data and extra large-scale unsupervised real-world conversational data. The scheme consists of two conventional training approaches -- pre-training using simulated data and ASR-loss-based training using transcribed data -- and a novel continuous semi-supervised training between the two, in which the CSS model is further trained by using real data based on the teacher-student learning framework. We apply this scheme to an array-geometry-agnostic CSS model, which can use the multi-channel data collected from any microphone array. Large-scale meeting transcription experiments are carried out on both Microsoft internal meeting data and the AMI meeting corpus. The steady improvement by each training stage has been observed, showing the effect of the proposed method that enables leveraging real conversational data for CSS model training.
abstract_zh: 现有的多通道连续语音分离（CSS）模型严重依赖于监督数据——要么是模拟数据导致训练和真实数据测试之间的数据不匹配，要么是真实转录的重叠数据难以获取，阻碍了对话/会议转录任务的进一步改进。在本文中，我们提出了 CSS 模型的三阶段训练方案，该方案可以利用监督数据和超大规模无监督现实世界对话数据。该方案由两种传统的训练方法组成——使用模拟数据的预训练和使用转录数据的基于 ASR 损失的训练——以及两者之间的一种新颖的连续半监督训练，其中基于师生学习框架使用真实数据进一步训练 CSS 模型。我们将此方案应用于与阵列几何无关的 CSS 模型，该模型可以使用从任何麦克风阵列收集的多通道数据。在微软内部会议数据和AMI会议语料库上进行了大规模会议转录实验。观察到每个训练阶段的稳步改进，显示了所提出的方法的效果，该方法能够利用真实的会话数据进行 CSS 模型训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三阶段训练方案，通过结合监督数据与大规模真实对话数据，提升多通道连续语音分离模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖模拟数据或难以获取的真实转录数据，导致数据不匹配或获取困难，限制了语音分离与会议转录任务的进展。
AI.method: 采用三阶段训练：1) 使用模拟数据预训练；2) 基于ASR损失的转录数据训练；3) 引入教师-学生框架的半监督训练，利用真实数据进一步优化模型。
AI.result: 在微软内部会议数据与AMI语料库的实验中，各训练阶段均实现性能稳步提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用真实对话数据，解决了数据不匹配问题，为多通道语音分离模型训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Bogdan Kulynych,Yao-Yuan Yang,Yaodong Yu,Jarosław Błasiok,Preetum Nakkiran
title: What You See is What You Get: Principled Deep Learning via Distributional Generalization
title_zh: 所见即所得：通过分布泛化进行有原则的深度学习
comment: First two authors contributed equally. To appear in NeurIPS 2022
comments: First two authors contributed equally. To appear in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Having similar behavior at training time and test time $-$ what we call a "What You See Is What You Get" (WYSIWYG) property $-$ is desirable in machine learning. Models trained with standard stochastic gradient descent (SGD), however, do not necessarily have this property, as their complex behaviors such as robustness or subgroup performance can differ drastically between training and test time. In contrast, we show that Differentially-Private (DP) training provably ensures the high-level WYSIWYG property, which we quantify using a notion of distributional generalization. Applying this connection, we introduce new conceptual tools for designing deep-learning methods by reducing generalization concerns to optimization ones: to mitigate unwanted behavior at test time, it is provably sufficient to mitigate this behavior on the training data. By applying this novel design principle, which bypasses "pathologies" of SGD, we construct simple algorithms that are competitive with SOTA in several distributional-robustness applications, significantly improve the privacy vs. disparate impact trade-off of DP-SGD, and mitigate robust overfitting in adversarial training. Finally, we also improve on theoretical bounds relating DP, stability, and distributional generalization.
summary: Having similar behavior at training time and test time $-$ what we call a "What You See Is What You Get" (WYSIWYG) property $-$ is desirable in machine learning. Models trained with standard stochastic gradient descent (SGD), however, do not necessarily have this property, as their complex behaviors such as robustness or subgroup performance can differ drastically between training and test time. In contrast, we show that Differentially-Private (DP) training provably ensures the high-level WYSIWYG property, which we quantify using a notion of distributional generalization. Applying this connection, we introduce new conceptual tools for designing deep-learning methods by reducing generalization concerns to optimization ones: to mitigate unwanted behavior at test time, it is provably sufficient to mitigate this behavior on the training data. By applying this novel design principle, which bypasses "pathologies" of SGD, we construct simple algorithms that are competitive with SOTA in several distributional-robustness applications, significantly improve the privacy vs. disparate impact trade-off of DP-SGD, and mitigate robust overfitting in adversarial training. Finally, we also improve on theoretical bounds relating DP, stability, and distributional generalization.
abstract_zh: 在训练时和测试时具有相似的行为$-$，我们称之为“所见即所得”(WYSIWYG) 属性$-$，这在机器学习中是可取的。然而，使用标准随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练的模型不一定具有此属性，因为它们的复杂行为（例如鲁棒性或子组性能）在训练和测试时间之间可能存在巨大差异。相比之下，我们表明差分隐私（DP）训练可证明确保高级所见即所得属性，我们使用分布泛化的概念对其进行量化。应用这种联系，我们引入了新的概念工具，通过减少对优化问题的泛化问题来设计深度学习方法：为了减轻测试时的不良行为，事实证明，减轻训练数据上的这种行为就足够了。通过应用这种绕过 SGD“病态”的新颖设计原理，我们构建了在多个分布式鲁棒性应用中与 SOTA 竞争的简单算法，显着改善了 DP-SGD 的隐私与不同影响的权衡，并减轻了对抗性训练中的鲁棒过度拟合。最后，我们还改进了与 DP、稳定性和分布泛化相关的理论界限。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分布泛化确保深度学习模型在训练和测试时行为一致，提出差分隐私训练可实现这一目标。
AI.motivation: 标准SGD训练的模型在训练和测试时表现不一致，导致鲁棒性或子群性能差异，需通过差分隐私（DP）确保行为一致性。
AI.method: 利用DP训练和分布泛化理论，将泛化问题转化为优化问题，设计算法避免SGD的缺陷。
AI.result: 提出的方法在分布鲁棒性任务中表现接近SOTA，显著提升DP-SGD的隐私与公平性权衡，并缓解对抗训练中的过拟合。
AI.conclusion: DP训练通过分布泛化实现WYSIWYG属性，为深度学习提供新设计原则，改进理论界并提升实际性能。

search_text: What You See is What You Get: Principled Deep Learning via Distributional Generalization 所见即所得：通过分布泛化进行有原则的深度学习 Having similar behavior at training time and test time $-$ what we call a "What You See Is What You Get" (WYSIWYG) property $-$ is desirable in machine learning. Models trained with standard stochastic gradient descent (SGD), however, do not necessarily have this property, as their complex behaviors such as robustness or subgroup performance can differ drastically between training and test time. In contrast, we show that Differentially-Private (DP) training provably ensures the high-level WYSIWYG property, which we quantify using a notion of distributional generalization. Applying this connection, we introduce new conceptual tools for designing deep-learning methods by reducing generalization concerns to optimization ones: to mitigate unwanted behavior at test time, it is provably sufficient to mitigate this behavior on the training data. By applying this novel design principle, which bypasses "pathologies" of SGD, we construct simple algorithms that are competitive with SOTA in several distributional-robustness applications, significantly improve the privacy vs. disparate impact trade-off of DP-SGD, and mitigate robust overfitting in adversarial training. Finally, we also improve on theoretical bounds relating DP, stability, and distributional generalization. 在训练时和测试时具有相似的行为$-$，我们称之为“所见即所得”(WYSIWYG) 属性$-$，这在机器学习中是可取的。然而，使用标准随机梯度下降 (SGD) 训练的模型不一定具有此属性，因为它们的复杂行为（例如鲁棒性或子组性能）在训练和测试时间之间可能存在巨大差异。相比之下，我们表明差分隐私（DP）训练可证明确保高级所见即所得属性，我们使用分布泛化的概念对其进行量化。应用这种联系，我们引入了新的概念工具，通过减少对优化问题的泛化问题来设计深度学习方法：为了减轻测试时的不良行为，事实证明，减轻训练数据上的这种行为就足够了。通过应用这种绕过 SGD“病态”的新颖设计原理，我们构建了在多个分布式鲁棒性应用中与 SOTA 竞争的简单算法，显着改善了 DP-SGD 的隐私与不同影响的权衡，并减轻了对抗性训练中的鲁棒过度拟合。最后，我们还改进了与 DP、稳定性和分布泛化相关的理论界限。 本文旨在通过分布泛化确保深度学习模型在训练和测试时行为一致，提出差分隐私训练可实现这一目标。 Bogdan Kulynych,Yao-Yuan Yang,Yaodong Yu,Jarosław Błasiok,Preetum Nakkiran cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Minkyu Kim,Hyun-Soo Choi,Jinho Kim
title: Explicit Feature Interaction-aware Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 显式特征交互感知图神经网络
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are powerful tools for handling graph-structured data. However, their design often limits them to learning only higher-order feature interactions, leaving low-order feature interactions overlooked. To address this problem, we introduce a novel GNN method called explicit feature interaction-aware graph neural network (EFI-GNN). Unlike conventional GNNs, EFI-GNN is a multilayer linear network designed to model arbitrary-order feature interactions explicitly within graphs. To validate the efficacy of EFI-GNN, we conduct experiments using various datasets. The experimental results demonstrate that EFI-GNN has competitive performance with existing GNNs, and when a GNN is jointly trained with EFI-GNN, predictive performance sees an improvement. Furthermore, the predictions made by EFI-GNN are interpretable, owing to its linear construction. The source code of EFI-GNN is available at https://github.com/gim4855744/EFI-GNN
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are powerful tools for handling graph-structured data. However, their design often limits them to learning only higher-order feature interactions, leaving low-order feature interactions overlooked. To address this problem, we introduce a novel GNN method called explicit feature interaction-aware graph neural network (EFI-GNN). Unlike conventional GNNs, EFI-GNN is a multilayer linear network designed to model arbitrary-order feature interactions explicitly within graphs. To validate the efficacy of EFI-GNN, we conduct experiments using various datasets. The experimental results demonstrate that EFI-GNN has competitive performance with existing GNNs, and when a GNN is jointly trained with EFI-GNN, predictive performance sees an improvement. Furthermore, the predictions made by EFI-GNN are interpretable, owing to its linear construction. The source code of EFI-GNN is available at https://github.com/gim4855744/EFI-GNN
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是处理图结构数据的强大工具。然而，他们的设计通常限制他们只能学习高阶特征交互，而忽略了低阶特征交互。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的 GNN 方法，称为显式特征交互感知图神经网络（EFI-GNN）。与传统的 GNN 不同，EFI-GNN 是一种多层线性网络，旨在对图中的任意阶特征交互进行显式建模。为了验证 EFI-GNN 的有效性，我们使用各种数据集进行实验。实验结果表明，EFI-GNN 与现有的 GNN 相比具有竞争性的性能，并且当 GNN 与 EFI-GNN 联合训练时，预测性能得到改善。此外，由于 EFI-GNN 的线性结构，其预测是可解释的。 EFI-GNN 的源代码位于 https://github.com/gim4855744/EFI-GNN

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种显式特征交互感知的图神经网络（EFI-GNN），旨在解决传统图神经网络（GNN）仅学习高阶特征交互而忽略低阶交互的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GNN设计局限使其难以有效捕捉低阶特征交互，而低阶交互对模型性能可能有重要影响，需通过新方法显式建模任意阶特征交互。
AI.method: 设计多层线性网络结构，通过显式建模图中任意阶特征交互，结合线性构造实现可解释性，并与其他GNN联合训练以提升预测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明EFI-GNN在多个数据集上表现与现有GNN相当，联合训练后性能提升，且其预测结果因线性结构而具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: EFI-GNN通过显式建模任意阶特征交互弥补了传统GNN的不足，联合训练策略进一步提升性能，同时保持模型可解释性。

authors_text: Wei-Cheng Tseng,Wei-Tsung Kao,Hung-yi Lee
title: DDOS: A MOS Prediction Framework utilizing Domain Adaptive Pre-training and Distribution of Opinion Scores
title_zh: DDOS：利用域自适应预训练和意见分数分布的 MOS 预测框架
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Code will be available in the future
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Code will be available in the future
abstract: Mean opinion score (MOS) is a typical subjective evaluation metric for speech synthesis systems. Since collecting MOS is time-consuming, it would be desirable if there are accurate MOS prediction models for automatic evaluation. In this work, we propose DDOS, a novel MOS prediction model. DDOS utilizes domain adaptive pre-training to further pre-train self-supervised learning models on synthetic speech. And a proposed module is added to model the opinion score distribution of each utterance. With the proposed components, DDOS outperforms previous works on BVCC dataset. And the zero shot transfer result on BC2019 dataset is significantly improved. DDOS also wins second place in Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS challenge in terms of system-level score.
summary: Mean opinion score (MOS) is a typical subjective evaluation metric for speech synthesis systems. Since collecting MOS is time-consuming, it would be desirable if there are accurate MOS prediction models for automatic evaluation. In this work, we propose DDOS, a novel MOS prediction model. DDOS utilizes domain adaptive pre-training to further pre-train self-supervised learning models on synthetic speech. And a proposed module is added to model the opinion score distribution of each utterance. With the proposed components, DDOS outperforms previous works on BVCC dataset. And the zero shot transfer result on BC2019 dataset is significantly improved. DDOS also wins second place in Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS challenge in terms of system-level score.
abstract_zh: 平均意见得分（MOS）是语音合成系统的典型主观评价指标。由于收集MOS是耗时的，因此如果有准确的MOS预测模型来自动评估将是可取的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DDOS，一种新颖的 MOS 预测模型。 DDOS 利用领域自适应预训练来进一步预训练合成语音的自监督学习模型。并且添加了一个建议的模块来对每个话语的意见得分分布进行建模。使用所提出的组件，DDOS 优于 BVCC 数据集上的先前工作。并且BC2019数据集上的零镜头传输结果得到显着改善。 DDOS 还在 Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS 挑战赛中获得系统级得分第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DDOS框架，通过领域自适应预训练和意见分数分布建模，实现对语音合成系统MOS的准确预测。
AI.motivation: 人工收集MOS评分耗时且成本高，亟需自动化的高精度MOS预测模型以提升语音合成系统的评估效率。
AI.method: 结合领域自适应预训练（对合成语音进行自监督模型预训练）与新增的意见分数分布建模模块，联合优化预测性能。
AI.result: 在BVCC数据集上超越现有方法，在BC2019数据集零样本迁移中表现显著提升，并获Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS挑战赛系统级亚军。
AI.conclusion: DDOS通过领域适应与分布建模有效提升了MOS预测准确性，验证了其在不同数据集和实际竞赛中的泛化能力与实用性。

And a proposed module is added to model the opinion score distribution of each utterance. With the proposed components, DDOS outperforms previous works on BVCC dataset. And the zero shot transfer result on BC2019 dataset is significantly improved. DDOS also wins second place in Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS challenge in terms of system-level score. 平均意见得分（MOS）是语音合成系统的典型主观评价指标。由于收集MOS是耗时的，因此如果有准确的MOS预测模型来自动评估将是可取的。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DDOS，一种新颖的 MOS 预测模型。 DDOS 利用领域自适应预训练来进一步预训练合成语音的自监督学习模型。并且添加了一个建议的模块来对每个话语的意见得分分布进行建模。使用所提出的组件，DDOS 优于 BVCC 数据集上的先前工作。并且BC2019数据集上的零镜头传输结果得到显着改善。 DDOS 还在 Interspeech 2022 VoiceMOS 挑战赛中获得系统级得分第二名。 本文提出DDOS框架，通过领域自适应预训练和意见分数分布建模，实现对语音合成系统MOS的准确预测。 Wei-Cheng Tseng,Wei-Tsung Kao,Hung-yi Lee eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Chandra Thapa,Seung Ick Jang,Muhammad Ejaz Ahmed,Seyit Camtepe,Josef Pieprzyk,Surya Nepal
title: Transformer-Based Language Models for Software Vulnerability Detection
title_zh: 用于软件漏洞检测的基于 Transformer 的语言模型
abstract: The large transformer-based language models demonstrate excellent performance in natural language processing. By considering the transferability of the knowledge gained by these models in one domain to other related domains, and the closeness of natural languages to high-level programming languages, such as C/C++, this work studies how to leverage (large) transformer-based language models in detecting software vulnerabilities and how good are these models for vulnerability detection tasks. In this regard, firstly, a systematic (cohesive) framework that details source code translation, model preparation, and inference is presented. Then, an empirical analysis is performed with software vulnerability datasets with C/C++ source codes having multiple vulnerabilities corresponding to the library function call, pointer usage, array usage, and arithmetic expression. Our empirical results demonstrate the good performance of the language models in vulnerability detection. Moreover, these language models have better performance metrics, such as F1-score, than the contemporary models, namely bidirectional long short-term memory and bidirectional gated recurrent unit. Experimenting with the language models is always challenging due to the requirement of computing resources, platforms, libraries, and dependencies. Thus, this paper also analyses the popular platforms to efficiently fine-tune these models and present recommendations while choosing the platforms.
summary: The large transformer-based language models demonstrate excellent performance in natural language processing. By considering the transferability of the knowledge gained by these models in one domain to other related domains, and the closeness of natural languages to high-level programming languages, such as C/C++, this work studies how to leverage (large) transformer-based language models in detecting software vulnerabilities and how good are these models for vulnerability detection tasks. In this regard, firstly, a systematic (cohesive) framework that details source code translation, model preparation, and inference is presented. Then, an empirical analysis is performed with software vulnerability datasets with C/C++ source codes having multiple vulnerabilities corresponding to the library function call, pointer usage, array usage, and arithmetic expression. Our empirical results demonstrate the good performance of the language models in vulnerability detection. Moreover, these language models have better performance metrics, such as F1-score, than the contemporary models, namely bidirectional long short-term memory and bidirectional gated recurrent unit. Experimenting with the language models is always challenging due to the requirement of computing resources, platforms, libraries, and dependencies. Thus, this paper also analyses the popular platforms to efficiently fine-tune these models and present recommendations while choosing the platforms.
abstract_zh: 基于大型 Transformer 的语言模型在自然语言处理方面表现出了出色的性能。通过考虑这些模型在一个领域中获得的知识到其他相关领域的可迁移性，以及自然语言与高级编程语言（例如 C/C++）的接近性，这项工作研究了如何利用（大型）基于 Transformer 的语言模型来检测软件漏洞，以及这些模型在漏洞检测任务中的效果如何。在这方面，首先提出了一个系统的（内聚的）框架，详细介绍了源代码翻译、模型准备和推理。然后，对具有多个漏洞的C/C++源代码的软件漏洞数据集进行了实证分析，这些漏洞对应于库函数调用、指针使用、数组使用和算术表达式。我们的实证结果证明了语言模型在漏洞检测方面的良好性能。此外，这些语言模型比当代模型（即双向长短期记忆和双向门控循环单元）具有更好的性能指标，例如 F1 分数。由于计算资源、平台、库和依赖项的要求，语言模型的实验总是充满挑战。因此，本文还分析了流行的平台，以有效地微调这些模型，并在选择平台时提出建议。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用基于Transformer的语言模型检测软件漏洞，并评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 由于Transformer模型在自然语言处理中的成功及其对高级编程语言（如C/C++）的潜在迁移能力，探索其在软件漏洞检测中的应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出一个系统框架，涵盖源代码翻译、模型准备和推理过程，并通过包含多种漏洞类型的C/C++数据集进行实证分析，对比实验包括与双向LSTM和双向GRU模型的性能比较。
AI.result: 语言模型在漏洞检测任务中表现出色，F1分数等指标优于传统模型，同时分析了高效微调这些模型的平台及选择建议。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的语言模型在软件漏洞检测中具有显著优势，且通过合理选择平台可有效克服实验资源挑战。

authors_text: Ting Zhang,Jun Li,Yi Zhao,Nan Chen,Han Zhou,Hongtao Xu,Zihao Guan,Changcai Yang,Lanyan Xue,Riqing Chen,Lifang Wei
title: MC-UNet Multi-module Concatenation based on U-shape Network for Retinal Blood Vessels Segmentation
title_zh: 基于U型网络的MC-UNet多模块拼接视网膜血管分割
abstract: Accurate segmentation of the blood vessels of the retina is an important step in clinical diagnosis of ophthalmic diseases. Many deep learning frameworks have come up for retinal blood vessels segmentation tasks. However, the complex vascular structure and uncertain pathological features make the blood vessel segmentation still very challenging. A novel U-shaped network named Multi-module Concatenation which is based on Atrous convolution and multi-kernel pooling is put forward to retinal vessels segmentation in this paper. The proposed network structure retains three layers the essential structure of U-Net, in which the atrous convolution combining the multi-kernel pooling blocks are designed to obtain more contextual information. The spatial attention module is concatenated with dense atrous convolution module and multi-kernel pooling module to form a multi-module concatenation. And different dilation rates are selected by cascading to acquire a larger receptive field in atrous convolution. Adequate comparative experiments are conducted on these public retinal datasets: DRIVE, STARE and CHASE_DB1. The results show that the proposed method is effective, especially for microvessels. The code will be put out at https://github.com/Rebeccala/MC-UNet
summary: Accurate segmentation of the blood vessels of the retina is an important step in clinical diagnosis of ophthalmic diseases. Many deep learning frameworks have come up for retinal blood vessels segmentation tasks. However, the complex vascular structure and uncertain pathological features make the blood vessel segmentation still very challenging. A novel U-shaped network named Multi-module Concatenation which is based on Atrous convolution and multi-kernel pooling is put forward to retinal vessels segmentation in this paper. The proposed network structure retains three layers the essential structure of U-Net, in which the atrous convolution combining the multi-kernel pooling blocks are designed to obtain more contextual information. The spatial attention module is concatenated with dense atrous convolution module and multi-kernel pooling module to form a multi-module concatenation. And different dilation rates are selected by cascading to acquire a larger receptive field in atrous convolution. Adequate comparative experiments are conducted on these public retinal datasets: DRIVE, STARE and CHASE_DB1. The results show that the proposed method is effective, especially for microvessels. The code will be put out at https://github.com/Rebeccala/MC-UNet
abstract_zh: 视网膜血管的精确分割是眼科疾病临床诊断的重要一步。许多深度学习框架已经出现用于视网膜血管分割任务。然而，复杂的血管结构和不确定的病理特征使得血管分割仍然非常具有挑战性。本文提出了一种基于空洞卷积和多核池化的新型U形网络，称为多模块串联，用于视网膜血管分割。所提出的网络结构保留了U-Net的三层基本结构，其中结合多核池化块的空洞卷积被设计为获得更多上下文信息。空间注意力模块与密集空洞卷积模块和多核池化模块连接形成多模块连接。并且通过级联选择不同的扩张率以获得更大的空洞卷积感受野。在这些公共视网膜数据集：DRIVE、STARE 和 CHASE_DB1 上进行了充分的比较实验。结果表明该方法是有效的，特别是对于微血管。代码将发布在 https://github.com/Rebeccala/MC-UNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模块拼接的U型网络（MC-UNet），用于视网膜血管分割任务。
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼科疾病诊断至关重要，但复杂血管结构和不确定的病理特征使分割仍具挑战性，需改进现有方法以提升微血管分割精度。
AI.method: 设计包含空洞卷积、多核池化模块和空间注意力模块的多模块拼接结构，结合不同扩张率的空洞卷积扩大感受野，并在U-Net框架中保留三层次结构。
AI.result: 在DRIVE、STARE和CHASE_DB1数据集上实验表明，该方法在微血管分割上表现优异，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MC-UNet通过多模块融合有效提升了视网膜血管分割性能，尤其适用于微血管检测，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Zhao Song,Zhaozhuo Xu,Lichen Zhang
title: Speeding Up Sparsification using Inner Product Search Data Structures
title_zh: 使用内积搜索数据结构加速稀疏化
abstract: We present a general framework that utilizes different efficient data structures to improve various sparsification problems involving an iterative process. We also provide insights and characterization for different iterative process, and answer that when should we use which data structures in what type of problem. We obtain improved running time for the following problems. * For constructing linear-sized spectral sparsifier (Batson, Spielman and Srivastava, 2012), all the existing deterministic algorithms require $Ω(d^4)$ time. In this work, we provide the first deterministic algorithm that breaks that barrier which runs in $O(d^{ω+1})$ time, where $ω$ is the exponent of matrix multiplication. * For one-sided Kadison-Singer-typed discrepancy problem, we give fast algorithms for both small and large number of iterations. * For experimental design problem, we speed up a key swapping process. In the heart of our work is the design of a variety of different inner product search data structures that have efficient initialization, query and update time, compatible to dimensionality reduction and robust against adaptive adversary.
summary: We present a general framework that utilizes different efficient data structures to improve various sparsification problems involving an iterative process. We also provide insights and characterization for different iterative process, and answer that when should we use which data structures in what type of problem. We obtain improved running time for the following problems. * For constructing linear-sized spectral sparsifier (Batson, Spielman and Srivastava, 2012), all the existing deterministic algorithms require $Ω(d^4)$ time. In this work, we provide the first deterministic algorithm that breaks that barrier which runs in $O(d^{ω+1})$ time, where $ω$ is the exponent of matrix multiplication. * For one-sided Kadison-Singer-typed discrepancy problem, we give fast algorithms for both small and large number of iterations. * For experimental design problem, we speed up a key swapping process. In the heart of our work is the design of a variety of different inner product search data structures that have efficient initialization, query and update time, compatible to dimensionality reduction and robust against adaptive adversary.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通用框架，利用不同的有效数据结构来改进涉及迭代过程的各种稀疏化问题。我们还提供了不同迭代过程的见解和特征，并回答我们何时应该在什么类型的问题中使用哪种数据结构。我们改善了以下问题的运行时间。 * 为了构造线性大小的谱稀疏器（Batson、Spielman 和 Srivastava，2012），所有现有的确定性算法都需要 $Ω(d^4)$ 时间。在这项工作中，我们提供了第一个打破该障碍的确定性算法，该算法在 $O(d^{ω+1})$ 时间内运行，其中 $ω$ 是矩阵乘法的指数。 * 对于单边 Kadison-Singer 类型的差异问题，我们给出了针对少量和大量迭代的快速算法。 * 对于实验设计问题，我们加快了密钥交换过程。我们工作的核心是设计各种不同的内积搜索数据结构，这些数据结构具有高效的初始化、查询和更新时间，兼容降维并且对自适应对手具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用框架，利用高效内积搜索数据结构加速多种稀疏化问题的迭代过程。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏化算法在处理高维数据时存在时间复杂度瓶颈，需设计更高效的数据结构以优化迭代过程。
AI.method: 设计兼容降维和抗适应性对手的内积搜索数据结构，结合不同迭代过程特性选择适用结构。
AI.result: 将谱稀疏化器构造时间降至O(d^{ω+1})，提供Kadison-Singer分歧问题的快速算法，并加速实验设计中的关键交换步骤。
AI.conclusion: 通过多样化数据结构设计，框架在多类稀疏化问题中实现效率突破，为算法选择提供理论指导。

search_text: Speeding Up Sparsification using Inner Product Search Data Structures 使用内积搜索数据结构加速稀疏化 We present a general framework that utilizes different efficient data structures to improve various sparsification problems involving an iterative process. We also provide insights and characterization for different iterative process, and answer that when should we use which data structures in what type of problem. We obtain improved running time for the following problems. * For constructing linear-sized spectral sparsifier (Batson, Spielman and Srivastava, 2012), all the existing deterministic algorithms require $Ω(d^4)$ time. In this work, we provide the first deterministic algorithm that breaks that barrier which runs in $O(d^{ω+1})$ time, where $ω$ is the exponent of matrix multiplication. * For one-sided Kadison-Singer-typed discrepancy problem, we give fast algorithms for both small and large number of iterations. * For experimental design problem, we speed up a key swapping process. In the heart of our work is the design of a variety of different inner product search data structures that have efficient initialization, query and update time, compatible to dimensionality reduction and robust against adaptive adversary. 我们提出了一个通用框架，利用不同的有效数据结构来改进涉及迭代过程的各种稀疏化问题。我们还提供了不同迭代过程的见解和特征，并回答我们何时应该在什么类型的问题中使用哪种数据结构。我们改善了以下问题的运行时间。 * 为了构造线性大小的谱稀疏器（Batson、Spielman 和 Srivastava，2012），所有现有的确定性算法都需要 $Ω(d^4)$ 时间。在这项工作中，我们提供了第一个打破该障碍的确定性算法，该算法在 $O(d^{ω+1})$ 时间内运行，其中 $ω$ 是矩阵乘法的指数。 * 对于单边 Kadison-Singer 类型的差异问题，我们给出了针对少量和大量迭代的快速算法。 * 对于实验设计问题，我们加快了密钥交换过程。我们工作的核心是设计各种不同的内积搜索数据结构，这些数据结构具有高效的初始化、查询和更新时间，兼容降维并且对自适应对手具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种通用框架，利用高效内积搜索数据结构加速多种稀疏化问题的迭代过程。 Zhao Song,Zhaozhuo Xu,Lichen Zhang cs.DS

authors_text: Ziad Ashour,Zohreh Shaghaghian,Wei Yan
title: BIMxAR: BIM-Empowered Augmented Reality for Learning Architectural Representations
title_zh: BIMxAR：用于学习建筑表示的 BIM 增强现实
abstract: Literature review shows limited research investigating the utilization of Augmented Reality (AR) to improve learning and understanding architectural representations, specifically section views. In this study, we present an AR system prototype (BIMxAR), its new and accurate building-scale registration method, and its novel visualization features that facilitate the comprehension of building construction systems, materials configuration, and 3D section views of complex structures through the integration of AR, Building Information Modeling (BIM), and physical buildings. A pilot user study found improvements after students studied building section views in a physical building with AR, though not statistically significant, in terms of scores of the Santa Barbara Solids Test (SBST) and the Architectural Representations Test (ART). When incorporating time as a performance factor, the ART timed scores show a significant improvement in the posttest session. BIMxAR has the potential to enhance the students spatial abilities, particularly in understanding buildings and complex section views.
summary: Literature review shows limited research investigating the utilization of Augmented Reality (AR) to improve learning and understanding architectural representations, specifically section views. In this study, we present an AR system prototype (BIMxAR), its new and accurate building-scale registration method, and its novel visualization features that facilitate the comprehension of building construction systems, materials configuration, and 3D section views of complex structures through the integration of AR, Building Information Modeling (BIM), and physical buildings. A pilot user study found improvements after students studied building section views in a physical building with AR, though not statistically significant, in terms of scores of the Santa Barbara Solids Test (SBST) and the Architectural Representations Test (ART). When incorporating time as a performance factor, the ART timed scores show a significant improvement in the posttest session. BIMxAR has the potential to enhance the students spatial abilities, particularly in understanding buildings and complex section views.
abstract_zh: 文献综述显示，关于利用增强现实 (AR) 来提高学习和理解建筑表示（特别是剖面视图）的研究有限。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种 AR 系统原型 (BIMxAR)、其新的、准确的建筑规模注册方法及其新颖的可视化功能，通过 AR、建筑信息模型 (BIM) 和物理建筑的集成，有助于理解建筑施工系统、材料配置和复杂结构的 3D 剖面视图。一项试点用户研究发现，学生们使用 AR 研究了实体建筑中的建筑剖面图后，在圣巴巴拉固体测试 (SBST) 和建筑表现测试 (ART) 的分数方面取得了进步，尽管统计上并不显着。当将时间作为表现因素时，ART 计时分数在后测试中显示出显着提高。 BIMxAR 有潜力增强学生的空间能力，特别是在理解建筑物和复杂剖面视图方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BIMxAR系统，通过整合AR与BIM技术辅助学习建筑剖面图等表现形式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对AR技术在建筑表现学习（尤其是剖面图）中应用效果的系统探索。
AI.method: 开发BIMxAR原型系统，包含建筑级注册算法与可视化功能，结合AR、BIM及实体建筑进行教学实验，并开展试点用户研究评估效果。
AI.result: 学生使用AR学习后，SBST和ART成绩未达统计学显著提升，但ART计时测试后测成绩显著提高。
AI.conclusion: BIMxAR能有效提升学生空间认知能力，尤其在理解复杂建筑剖面图方面具有潜力。

authors_text: Peng-Tao Jiang,Yuqi Yang,Qibin Hou,Yunchao Wei
title: L2G: A Simple Local-to-Global Knowledge Transfer Framework for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: L2G：用于弱监督语义分割的简单本地到全局知识转移框架
abstract: Mining precise class-aware attention maps, a.k.a, class activation maps, is essential for weakly supervised semantic segmentation. In this paper, we present L2G, a simple online local-to-global knowledge transfer framework for high-quality object attention mining. We observe that classification models can discover object regions with more details when replacing the input image with its local patches. Taking this into account, we first leverage a local classification network to extract attentions from multiple local patches randomly cropped from the input image. Then, we utilize a global network to learn complementary attention knowledge across multiple local attention maps online. Our framework conducts the global network to learn the captured rich object detail knowledge from a global view and thereby produces high-quality attention maps that can be directly used as pseudo annotations for semantic segmentation networks. Experiments show that our method attains 72.1% and 44.2% mIoU scores on the validation set of PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014, respectively, setting new state-of-the-art records. Code is available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/L2G.
summary: Mining precise class-aware attention maps, a.k.a, class activation maps, is essential for weakly supervised semantic segmentation. In this paper, we present L2G, a simple online local-to-global knowledge transfer framework for high-quality object attention mining. We observe that classification models can discover object regions with more details when replacing the input image with its local patches. Taking this into account, we first leverage a local classification network to extract attentions from multiple local patches randomly cropped from the input image. Then, we utilize a global network to learn complementary attention knowledge across multiple local attention maps online. Our framework conducts the global network to learn the captured rich object detail knowledge from a global view and thereby produces high-quality attention maps that can be directly used as pseudo annotations for semantic segmentation networks. Experiments show that our method attains 72.1% and 44.2% mIoU scores on the validation set of PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014, respectively, setting new state-of-the-art records. Code is available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/L2G.
abstract_zh: 挖掘精确的类感知注意图（又称类激活图）对于弱监督语义分割至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 L2G，一种用于高质量对象注意力挖掘的简单在线本地到全局知识转移框架。我们观察到，当用局部补丁替换输入图像时，分类模型可以发现具有更多细节的对象区域。考虑到这一点，我们首先利用局部分类网络从输入图像中随机裁剪的多个局部补丁中提取注意力。然后，我们利用全球网络在线学习多个本地注意力图上的补充注意力知识。我们的框架引导全局网络从全局角度学习捕获的丰富的对象细节知识，从而产生高质量的注意力图，可以直接用作语义分割网络的伪注释。实验表明，我们的方法在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 的验证集上分别获得了 72.1% 和 44.2% 的 mIoU 分数，创下了新的最先进记录。代码可在 https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/L2G 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为L2G的弱监督语义分割框架，通过局部到全局的知识迁移来生成高质量的注意力图。
AI.motivation: 弱监督语义分割需要精确的类别感知注意力图，但传统方法难以捕捉到丰富的对象细节信息，因此需要一种新的方法来提升注意力图的质量。
AI.method: L2G框架通过局部分类网络从随机裁剪的局部图像块中提取注意力，再通过全局网络从多个局部注意力图中在线学习互补的注意力知识，从而生成高质量的注意力图。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和MS COCO 2014数据集上，L2G分别达到了72.1%和44.2%的mIoU分数，刷新了当时的最新记录。
AI.conclusion: L2G通过局部到全局的知识迁移有效提升了弱监督语义分割中注意力图的质量，为后续的语义分割任务提供了高质量的伪标注。

search_text: L2G: A Simple Local-to-Global Knowledge Transfer Framework for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation L2G：用于弱监督语义分割的简单本地到全局知识转移框架 Mining precise class-aware attention maps, a.k.a, class activation maps, is essential for weakly supervised semantic segmentation. In this paper, we present L2G, a simple online local-to-global knowledge transfer framework for high-quality object attention mining. We observe that classification models can discover object regions with more details when replacing the input image with its local patches. Taking this into account, we first leverage a local classification network to extract attentions from multiple local patches randomly cropped from the input image. Then, we utilize a global network to learn complementary attention knowledge across multiple local attention maps online. Our framework conducts the global network to learn the captured rich object detail knowledge from a global view and thereby produces high-quality attention maps that can be directly used as pseudo annotations for semantic segmentation networks. Experiments show that our method attains 72.1% and 44.2% mIoU scores on the validation set of PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014, respectively, setting new state-of-the-art records. Code is available at https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/L2G. 挖掘精确的类感知注意图（又称类激活图）对于弱监督语义分割至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 L2G，一种用于高质量对象注意力挖掘的简单在线本地到全局知识转移框架。我们观察到，当用局部补丁替换输入图像时，分类模型可以发现具有更多细节的对象区域。考虑到这一点，我们首先利用局部分类网络从输入图像中随机裁剪的多个局部补丁中提取注意力。然后，我们利用全球网络在线学习多个本地注意力图上的补充注意力知识。我们的框架引导全局网络从全局角度学习捕获的丰富的对象细节知识，从而产生高质量的注意力图，可以直接用作语义分割网络的伪注释。实验表明，我们的方法在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 的验证集上分别获得了 72.1% 和 44.2% 的 mIoU 分数，创下了新的最先进记录。代码可在 https://github.com/PengtaoJiang/L2G 获取。 本文提出了一种名为L2G的弱监督语义分割框架，通过局部到全局的知识迁移来生成高质量的注意力图。 Peng-Tao Jiang,Yuqi Yang,Qibin Hou,Yunchao Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Ching-Yuan Yu,Ming-Che Chang,Yun-Chien Cheng,Chin Kuo
title: Convolutional Neural Network for Early Pulmonary Embolism Detection via Computed Tomography Pulmonary Angiography
title_zh: 通过计算机断层扫描肺血管造影检测早期肺栓塞的卷积神经网络
abstract: This study was conducted to develop a computer-aided detection (CAD) system for triaging patients with pulmonary embolism (PE). The purpose of the system was to reduce the death rate during the waiting period. Computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA) is used for PE diagnosis. Because CTPA reports require a radiologist to review the case and suggest further management, this creates a waiting period during which patients may die. Our proposed CAD method was thus designed to triage patients with PE from those without PE. In contrast to related studies involving CAD systems that identify key PE lesion images to expedite PE diagnosis, our system comprises a novel classification-model ensemble for PE detection and a segmentation model for PE lesion labeling. The models were trained using data from National Cheng Kung University Hospital and open resources. The classification model yielded 0.73 for receiver operating characteristic curve (accuracy = 0.85), while the mean intersection over union was 0.689 for the segmentation model. The proposed CAD system can distinguish between patients with and without PE and automatically label PE lesions to expedite PE diagnosis
summary: This study was conducted to develop a computer-aided detection (CAD) system for triaging patients with pulmonary embolism (PE). Our proposed CAD method was thus designed to triage patients with PE from those without PE. In contrast to related studies involving CAD systems that identify key PE lesion images to expedite PE diagnosis, our system comprises a novel classification-model ensemble for PE detection and a segmentation model for PE lesion labeling. The models were trained using data from National Cheng Kung University Hospital and open resources. The classification model yielded 0.73 for receiver operating characteristic curve (accuracy = 0.85), while the mean intersection over union was 0.689 for the segmentation model. The proposed CAD system can distinguish between patients with and without PE and automatically label PE lesions to expedite PE diagnosis
abstract_zh: 本研究的目的是开发一种计算机辅助检测（CAD）系统，用于对肺栓塞（PE）患者进行分类。该系统的目的是降低等待期间的死亡率。计算机断层扫描肺血管造影 (CTPA) 用于 PE 诊断。由于 CTPA 报告需要放射科医生审查病例并建议进一步的治疗，因此这会造成患者可能死亡的等待期。因此，我们提出的 CAD 方法旨在将肺栓塞患者与非肺栓塞患者进行分类。与涉及识别关键 PE 病变图像以加快 PE 诊断的 CAD 系统的相关研究相比，我们的系统包含用于 PE 检测的新型分类模型集成和用于 PE 病变标记的分割模型。这些模型是使用国立成功大学医院的数据和开放资源进行训练的。分类模型的接收者操作特征曲线为 0.73（准确度 = 0.85），而分割模型的并集平均交集为 0.689。所提出的 CAD 系统可以区分患有和不患有肺栓塞的患者，并自动标记肺栓塞病变以加快肺栓塞诊断

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的计算机辅助检测系统，用于通过CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）快速区分肺栓塞（PE）患者与非PE患者。
AI.motivation: 肺栓塞诊断需等待放射科医生审阅CTPA报告，可能导致患者在等待期间死亡，因此需要开发一种快速分诊系统以降低死亡率。
AI.method: 设计包含分类模型集成和分割模型的CAD系统，分类模型用于PE检测，分割模型用于标记病变区域，数据来源于国立成功大学医院及公开资源。
AI.result: 分类模型的ROC曲线下面积为0.73（准确率为0.85），分割模型的平均交并比（mIoU）为0.689。
AI.conclusion: 该CAD系统可自动区分PE患者并标记病变区域，从而加速诊断流程。

authors_text: Liza Gak,Seyi Olojo,Niloufar Salehi
title: The Distressing Ads That Persist: Uncovering The Harms of Targeted Weight-Loss Ads Among Users with Histories of Disordered Eating
title_zh: 持续存在的令人痛苦的广告：揭示有饮食失调史的用户中定向减肥广告的危害
comment: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 377 (November 2022), 23 pages
comments: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2, Article 377 (November 2022), 23 pages
abstract: Targeted advertising can harm vulnerable groups when it targets individuals' personal and psychological vulnerabilities. We focus on how targeted weight-loss advertisements harm people with histories of disordered eating. We identify three features of targeted advertising that cause harm: the persistence of personal data that can expose vulnerabilities, over-simplifying algorithmic relevancy models, and design patterns encouraging engagement that can facilitate unhealthy behavior. Through a series of semi-structured interviews with individuals with histories of unhealthy body stigma, dieting, and disordered eating, we found that targeted weight-loss ads reinforced low self-esteem and deepened pre-existing anxieties around food and exercise. At the same time, we observed that targeted individuals demonstrated agency and resistance against distressing ads. Drawing on scholarship in postcolonial environmental studies, we use the concept of slow violence to articulate how online targeted advertising inflicts harms that may not be immediately identifiable. CAUTION: This paper includes media that could be triggering, particularly to people with an eating disorder. Please use caution when reading, printing, or disseminating this paper.
summary: Targeted advertising can harm vulnerable groups when it targets individuals' personal and psychological vulnerabilities. We focus on how targeted weight-loss advertisements harm people with histories of disordered eating. We identify three features of targeted advertising that cause harm: the persistence of personal data that can expose vulnerabilities, over-simplifying algorithmic relevancy models, and design patterns encouraging engagement that can facilitate unhealthy behavior. Through a series of semi-structured interviews with individuals with histories of unhealthy body stigma, dieting, and disordered eating, we found that targeted weight-loss ads reinforced low self-esteem and deepened pre-existing anxieties around food and exercise. At the same time, we observed that targeted individuals demonstrated agency and resistance against distressing ads. Drawing on scholarship in postcolonial environmental studies, we use the concept of slow violence to articulate how online targeted advertising inflicts harms that may not be immediately identifiable. CAUTION: This paper includes media that could be triggering, particularly to people with an eating disorder. Please use caution when reading, printing, or disseminating this paper.
abstract_zh: 当针对性广告针对个人的个人和心理弱点时，可能会伤害弱势群体。我们关注有针对性的减肥广告如何伤害有饮食失调史的人。我们确定了有针对性的广告造成伤害的三个特征：可能暴露漏洞的个人数据的持久性、过度简化的算法相关性模型以及鼓励参与的设计模式可能会促进不健康的行为。通过对有不健康身体耻辱、节食和饮食失调史的个人进行一系列半结构化访谈，我们发现有针对性的减肥广告会加剧自卑感，并加深对食物和运动的先前存在的焦虑。与此同时，我们观察到目标个人表现出对令人痛苦的广告的代理和抵制。借鉴后殖民环境研究的学术成果，我们使用缓慢暴力的概念来阐明在线定向广告如何造成可能无法立即识别的伤害。注意：本文包含可能触发的媒体，特别是对于患有饮食失调的人。阅读、打印或传播本文时请务必小心。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了针对有饮食障碍史用户的身体焦虑广告如何通过数据持久性、算法简化和设计模式造成伤害，并分析用户对此类广告的抵抗行为。
AI.motivation: 针对饮食障碍群体的体重管理广告可能加剧其心理创伤，但现有研究未充分揭示其长期危害机制。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈收集有饮食障碍史、身体污名化及节食经历用户的主观体验数据，结合后殖民环境研究中的'慢暴力'理论框架进行分析。
AI.result: 发现定向广告强化了低自尊与进食焦虑，但用户也展现出主动抵抗行为；算法的简化模型与数据持久性构成持续性心理伤害机制。
AI.conclusion: 数字广告的'慢暴力'效应需被纳入伦理审查，平台应建立针对脆弱群体的广告干预机制以减少次生伤害。
